We perform input-level ablation studies to assess the contribution of individual and combinations of poetic devices; construct an interpretable vector representation of attention maps; cluster these representations and train linear probes to predict safety outcomes and literary format. Our results show that models distinguish poetic from prose formats with high accuracy, yet struggle to predict jailbreak success within each format. Clustering further reveals clear separation by literary format, but not by safety label. These findings indicate that jailbreak success is not caused by a failure to recognize poetic formatting; rather, poetic prompts induce distinct processing patterns that remain largely independent of harmful-content detection. Overall, literary jailbreaks appear to misalign large language models not through any single poetic device, but through accumulated stylistic irregularities that alter prompt processing and avoid lexical triggers considered during post-training. This suggests that robustness requires safety mechanisms that account for style-induced shifts in model behavior. We use Qwen3-14B as a representative open-weight case study.

</details>


### [219] [Latent Causal Void: Explicit Missing-Context Reconstruction for Misinformation Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12156)
*Hui Li,Zhongquan Jian,Jinsong Su,Junfeng Yao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Latent Causal Void (LCV)方法，通过显式重构虚假新闻中缺失的上下文事实，并将其作为文本跨源关系用于图推理，在双语言基准上显著提升了误导信息检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有omission-aware方法要么将检索到的上下文作为辅助证据附加，要么推断出一个分类的遗漏信号，但都未能显式地建模被遗漏的具体事实，导致检测效果受限。

Method: LCV首先检索时间对齐的上下文文章，利用冻结的指令微调大语言模型为每个句子-文章对生成简短的缺失上下文描述，然后将这些关系文本输入到由目标句子和上下文文章构成的异构图中进行推理。

Result: 在双语基准上，LCV相比最强omission-aware基线在英文和中文上分别提升2.56和2.84个macro-F1点。

Conclusion: 显式建模缺失的跨源事实本身，而不仅仅是附加检索证据或预测遗漏信号，是一种更有效的omission-aware误导信息检测表示方法。

Abstract: Automatic misinformation detection performs well when deception is visible in what an article explicitly states. However, some misinformation articles remain locally coherent and only become misleading once compared with contemporaneous reports that supply background facts the article omits. We study this omission-relevant setting and observe that current omission-aware approaches typically either attach retrieved context as auxiliary evidence or infer a categorical omission signal, leaving the specific missing fact implicit. We propose \emph{Latent Causal Void} (LCV), a retrieval-guided detector that explicitly reconstructs the missing fact for each target sentence and uses it as a textual cross-source relation in graph reasoning. Concretely, LCV retrieves temporally aligned context articles, asks a frozen instruction-tuned large language model to generate a short missing-context description for each sentence--article pair, and feeds the resulting relation text into a heterograph over target sentences and context articles. On the bilingual benchmark of Sheng et al., LCV improves over the strongest omission-aware baseline by $2.56$ and $2.84$ macro-F1 points on the English and Chinese splits, respectively. The results indicate that modeling the missing cross-source fact itself, rather than only attaching retrieved evidence or predicting an omission signal, is a useful representation for omission-aware misinformation detection.

</details>


### [220] [Correcting Selection Bias in Sparse User Feedback for Large Language Model Quality Estimation: A Multi-Agent Hierarchical Bayesian Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12177)
*Andrea Morandi,Mahesh Viswanathan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种三智能体分层贝叶斯流水线，用于纠正LLM生产部署中的非随机用户反馈偏差。该方法通过主题聚类、偏差建模和合成重加权，在无需个体交互真实标签的情况下，将偏差校正后的质量估计误差从40-50个百分点降低到4-13个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM生产部署中收到的用户反馈并非随机采样——用户评分主要集中在满意度分布的极端尾部，直接取平均会导致估计的系统质量与实际质量相差40-50个百分点。现有方法无法有效处理这种主题和情感分层的选择性偏差问题。

Method: 提出三级流水线：1) 主题聚类代理(UMAP+HDBSCAN)对文本嵌入进行流分区；2) 偏差建模代理(NUTS下的两阶段分层Beta-Binomial)推断每主题选择率s_c和质量q_c，含部分池化；3) 合成代理通过真实主题流行度重加权q_c，输出偏差校正的聚合后验Q̄及可信区间，并提供漂移信号用于在线重新校准。

Result: 在UltraFeedback数据集(N=10,232, C=18, Q*=0.6249)上，模拟主题和情感依赖的选择偏差。与Naive和IPW基线相比，使用反馈通道先验的分层知情模型在偏差比从1:1到30:1范围内，误差保持在4-13个百分点，95%可信区间在50/50随机种子复制中覆盖Q*。而无通道先验的弱先验变体误差达22-33个百分点。

Conclusion: 核心发现：每个聚类的充分统计量允许一族同样好的拟合，打破简并的关键在于偏差通道的先验（而非潜在质量的先验）。只需从生产仪表盘可读的典型正向反馈率和负正比作为温和先验，即可有效识别偏差。

Abstract: [Abridged] Production LLM deployments receive feedback from a non-random fraction of users: thumbs sit mostly in the tails of the satisfaction distribution, and a naive average over them can land 40-50 percentage points away from true system quality. We treat this as a topic- and sentiment- stratified selection-bias problem and propose a three-agent hierarchical Bayesian pipeline that does not require ground-truth labels on individual interactions. A Topic Clustering Agent partitions the stream via UMAP + HDBSCAN over text embeddings; a Bias Modeling Agent fits a two-stage hierarchical Beta-Binomial under NUTS, inferring per-topic selection rates $s_c$ and quality $q_c$ with partial pooling; a Synthesis Agent reweights $q_c$ by true topic prevalence $\hatπ_c = n_c/N$ to report a bias-corrected aggregate posterior $\bar Q = \sum_c \hatπ_c q_c$ with credible interval, plus drift signals for online recalibration. Validation uses UltraFeedback (N=10,232 retained interactions, $C=18$ clusters, $Q^\star=0.6249$) with simulated topic- and sentiment-dependent selection biases. We compare five Bayesian variants against Naive and IPW baselines. A mild prior on the feedback channel (typical positive-feedback rate and negative-to-positive ratio, both readable from any production dashboard without labels) keeps Hierarchical-Informed within 4-13 pp of $Q^\star$ as the bias ratio sweeps from 1:1 to 30:1, with 95% credible intervals covering $Q^\star$ in 50/50 random-seed replicates at $κ_{\max}=10$. Without channel-side priors, every weak-prior variant misses $Q^\star$ by 22-33 pp: the per-cluster sufficient statistics admit a one-parameter family of equally good fits, and the prior on the bias channel (not on latent quality) is what breaks the degeneracy.

</details>


### [221] [Mitigating Context-Memory Conflicts in LLMs through Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12185)
*Yigeng Zhou,Wu Li,Yifan Lu,Yequan Wang,Xuebo Liu,Wenya Wang,Jun Yu,Min Zhang,Jing Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种两阶段动态解码方法DCRD，通过分析注意力图预测上下文与参数化知识之间的冲突，并据此选择贪心解码或动态解码路径，在多个LLM和QA数据集上达到SOTA表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识冲突处理方法（如对比解码）在无冲突场景下会破坏输出分布，而动态解码方法虽能衡量冲突程度，但在复杂真实场景中表现不佳，因此需要一种既能高效处理冲突又能在无冲突时保持准确性的解码方法。

Method: 提出两阶段解码方法DCRD：第一阶段通过分析注意力图评估上下文可信度并预测潜在冲突；第二阶段根据预测结果将输入导向两个解码路径之一——贪心解码（无冲突时）或基于上下文可信度的动态解码（有冲突时）。同时构建了ConflictKG基准数据集以模拟知识频繁更新的场景。

Result: 在4种LLM和6个QA数据集上的实验表明，DCRD在所有基线方法中表现最优，达到了SOTA性能。

Conclusion: DCRD通过动态路由机制有效平衡了知识冲突处理与无冲突场景下的解码效率，验证了注意力图分析在预测知识冲突方面的有效性。

Abstract: Large language models accumulate extensive parametric knowledge through pre-training. However, knowledge conflicts occur when outdated or incorrect parametric knowledge conflicts with external knowledge in the context. Existing methods address knowledge conflicts through contrastive decoding, but in conflict-free scenarios, static approaches disrupt output distribution. Other dynamic decoding methods attempt to measure the degree of conflict but still struggle with complex real-world situations. In this paper, we propose a two-stage decoding method called Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding (DCRD), to predict and mitigate context-memory conflicts. DCRD first analyzes the attention map to assess context fidelity and predict potential conflicts. Based on this prediction, the input is directed to one of two decoding paths: (1) greedy decoding, or (2) context fidelity-based dynamic decoding. This design enables DCRD to handle conflicts efficiently while maintaining high accuracy and decoding efficiency in conflict-free cases. Additionally, to simulate scenarios with frequent knowledge updates, we constructed ConflictKG, a knowledge conflict QA benchmark. Experiments on four LLMs across six QA datasets show that DCRD outperforms all baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [222] [Mechanistic Interpretability of ASR models using Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12225)
*Dan Pluth,Zachary Nicholas Houghton,Yu Zhou,Vijay K. Gurbani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次将稀疏自编码器（SAE）应用于音频处理模型Whisper，揭示了其编码器中的单语义特征，并展示了跨语言特征引导能力，证明了SAE在音频模型可解释性上的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度Transformer模型广泛应用于多个领域，但其内部机制仍不透明。虽然SAE已被用于解释文本LLM，但尚无研究将其应用于音频处理模型（如ASR）。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 将SAE应用于Transformer-based ASR模型Whisper，在帧级嵌入上训练高维稀疏潜空间，提取并分析编码器中的单语义特征。

Result: 发现了跨语言和非语言边界的多样化单语义特征，并成功实现了跨语言特征引导。

Conclusion: SAE在音频ASR模型上的应用是可行的，Whisper编码器编码了丰富的语言信息，为音频模型可解释性开辟了新方向。

Abstract: Understanding the internal machinations of deep Transformer-based NLP models is more crucial than ever as these models see widespread use in various domains that affect the public at large, such as industry, academia, finance, health. While these models have advanced rapidly, their internal mechanisms remain largely a mystery. Techniques such as Sparse Autoencoders (SAE) have emerged to understand these mechanisms by projecting dense representations into a sparse vector. While existing research has demonstrated the viability of the SAE in interpreting text-based Large Language Models (LLMs), there are no equivalent studies that demonstrate the application of a SAE to audio processing models like Automatic Speech Recognizers (ASRs). In this work, a SAE is applied to Whisper, a Transformer-based ASR, training a high-dimensional sparse latent space on frame-level embeddings extracted from the Whisper encoder. Our work uncovers diverse monosemantic features across linguistic and non-linguistic boundaries, and demonstrates cross-lingual feature steering. This work establishes the viability of a SAE model and demonstrates that Whisper encodes a rich amount of linguistic information.

</details>


### [223] [Combining On-Policy Optimization and Distillation for Long-Context Reasoning in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12227)
*Miguel Moura Ramos,Duarte M. Alves,André F. T. Martins*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出dGRPO方法，将GRPO与在线策略蒸馏（OPD）结合，用于长上下文推理，并构建了LongBlocks数据集，实验表明该方法比单独使用GRPO或SFT更稳定有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长上下文后训练方法存在暴露偏差（SFT/KD）、稀疏奖励导致不稳定（GRPO）或无法直接优化奖励信号（OPD）等问题，需要一种结合三者优势的方法。

Method: 提出Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization (dGRPO)，将GRPO的基于结果的策略优化与OPD的密集token级教师指导结合到统一目标函数中；并构建了包含多跳推理、上下文定位和长文本生成的LongBlocks合成数据集。

Result: 实验和消融研究表明，dGRPO在长上下文推理任务上比离策略训练和纯GRPO更稳定有效，同时保持短上下文能力不退化。

Conclusion: 将基于结果的策略优化与知识蒸馏结合到单一目标中，为长上下文对齐提供了更稳定有效的路径。

Abstract: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to long-context tasks requires post-training methods that remain accurate and coherent over thousands of tokens. Existing approaches are limited in several ways: 1) off-policy methods such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and knowledge distillation (KD) suffer from exposure bias and limited recovery from model-generated errors over long horizons; 2) on-policy reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) better align training with model-generated states, but are unstable and sample-inefficient due to sparse rewards; 3) on-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level guidance, but does not directly optimize arbitrary reward signals. In this paper, we propose Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization (dGRPO), a method for long-context reasoning that augments GRPO with dense guidance from a stronger teacher via OPD. We also introduce LongBlocks, a synthetic long-context dataset spanning multi-hop reasoning, contextual grounding, and long-form generation. We conduct extensive experiments and ablations comparing off-policy training, sparse-reward GRPO, and our combined approach, leading to an improved recipe for long-context alignment. Overall, our results show that combining outcome-based policy optimization with knowledge distillation in a single objective provides a more stable and effective path to long-context reasoning, while preserving short-context capabilities.

</details>


### [224] [Mind the Pause: Disfluency-Aware Objective Tuning for Multilingual Speech Correction with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12242)
*Deepak Kumar,Baban Gain,Asif Ekbal*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种多语言语音识别文本不流畅校正流水线，先通过序列标注器标记不流畅词元，再结合指令微调与对比学习对LLM进行优化，在印地语、孟加拉语、马拉地语上取得优于基线模型的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ASR转录文本中的不流畅现象（如填充词、重复、错误起始）会降低可读性并影响下游应用（如聊天机器人、语音助手），现有方法多基于检测后删除但会破坏语法和语义，而LLM相关研究仅聚焦检测或数据增强，缺乏全面校正方案。

Method: 构建多语言校正流水线：先用序列标注器标记不流畅词元，再通过指令微调引导LLM重写为流畅文本；同时引入对比学习目标，惩罚模型复现不流畅词元，从而保持语法和语义完整性。

Result: 在印地语、孟加拉语、马拉地语三种印度语言上的实验表明，该方法相较于包括多语言序列到序列模型在内的强基线有一致提升。

Conclusion: 仅检测策略不足以解决不流畅问题；将词元级线索与指令微调及对比学习相结合，为语音驱动的NLP系统提供了一种实用且可扩展的多语言不流畅校正方案。

Abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) transcripts often contain disfluencies, such as fillers, repetitions, and false starts, which reduce readability and hinder downstream applications like chatbots and voice assistants. If left unaddressed, such disfluencies can significantly degrade the reliability of downstream systems. Most existing approaches rely on classical models that focus on identifying disfluent tokens for removal. While this strategy is effective to some extent, it often disrupts grammatical structure and semantic coherence, leading to incomplete or unnatural sentences. Recent literature explored the use of large language models (LLMs); however, these efforts have primarily focused on disfluency detection or data augmentation, rather than performing comprehensive correction. We propose a multilingual correction pipeline where a sequence tagger first marks disfluent tokens, and these signals guide instruction fine-tuning of an LLM to rewrite transcripts into fluent text. To further improve reliability, we add a contrastive learning objective that penalizes the reproduction of disfluent tokens, encouraging the model to preserve grammar and meaning while removing disfluent artifacts. Our experiments across three Indian languages, namely Hindi, Bengali, and Marathi show consistent improvements over strong baselines, including multilingual sequence-to-sequence models. These results highlight that detection-only strategies are insufficient. Combining token-level cues with instruction tuning and contrastive learning provides a practical and scalable solution for multilingual disfluency correction in speech-driven NLP systems. We make the codes publicly available at https://github.com/deepak-kumar-98/Mind-the-Pause.

</details>


### [225] [PreScam: A Benchmark for Predicting Scam Progression from Early Conversations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12243)
*Weixiang Sun,Shang Ma,Yiyang Li,Tianyi Ma,Zehong Wang,Colby Nelson,Xusheng Xiao,Yanfang Ye*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了PreScam基准，从用户报告构建了11,573个多轮对话诈骗实例（涵盖20类），按诈骗生命周期分层标注。实验发现，当前模型虽能捕捉诈骗线索，但在实时终止预测和下一步行动预测上仍存在明显不足，揭示出从表面流畅到进程建模的鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究（如静态诈骗检测或合成诈骗）无法捕捉真实对话诈骗的多轮渐进演化过程，缺乏对诈骗如何随时间展开的建模能力。

Method: 从177,989份用户报告过滤构建11,573个对话实例，提出诈骗杀伤链（scam kill chain）分层组织实例，并在每轮对话上标注诈骗者的心理策略和受害者的反应。在两个任务（实时终止预测、诈骗者行动预测）上对多种模型进行评测。

Result: 有监督编码器在实时终止预测上显著优于零样本LLM；即使强LLM在下一行动预测上也仅取得中等成功。模型在诈骗进程建模上存在明显不足。

Conclusion: 当前模型虽能识别部分诈骗线索，但难以追踪风险升级过程和多轮操纵如何展开，需更关注对话进程建模而非仅表面语义理解。

Abstract: Conversational scams, such as romance and investment scams, are emerging as a major form of online fraud. Unlike one-shot scam lures such as fake lottery or unpaid toll messages, they unfold through multi-turn conversations in which scammers gradually manipulate victims using evolving psychological techniques. However, existing research mainly focuses on static scam detection or synthetic scams, leaving open whether language models can understand how real-world scams progress over time. We introduce PreScam, a benchmark for modeling scam progression from early conversations. Built from user-submitted scam reports, PreScam filters and structures 177,989 raw reports into 11,573 conversational scam instances spanning 20 scam categories. Each instance is hierarchically structured according to the scam lifecycle defined by the proposed scam kill chain, and further annotated at the turn level with scammer psychological actions and victim responses. We benchmark models on two tasks: real-time termination prediction, which estimates whether a conversation is approaching the termination stage, and scammer action prediction, which forecasts the scammer's subsequent actions. Results show a clear gap between surface-level fluency and progression modeling: supervised encoders substantially outperform zero-shot LLMs on real-time termination prediction, while next-action prediction remains only moderately successful even for strong LLMs. Taken together, these results show that current models can capture some scam-related cues, yet still struggle to track how risk escalates and how manipulation unfolds across turns.

</details>


### [226] [PRISM: Pareto-Efficient Retrieval over Intent-Aware Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12260)
*Jingyi Peng,Zhongwei Wan,Weiting Liu,Qiuzhuang Sun*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PRISM是一个无需训练的检索端框架，通过图结构记忆上的联合检索-压缩方法，在严格上下文预算下实现高精度、低成本的长期对话记忆管理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长期语言代理的对话历史增长远超固定上下文窗口容量，现有方法要么扩展窗口但不处理检索内容，要么进行高成本的推理时事实提取，要么依赖启发式图遍历导致准确率和效率不足，亟需更好的记忆管理方案。

Method: PRISM提出四部分推理时组件：1）分层束搜索（Hierarchical Bundle Search）在类型化关系路径上搜索；2）查询敏感边成本计算（Query-Sensitive Edge Costing）对齐查询意图；3）证据压缩（Evidence Compression）将候选束压缩为紧凑答案上下文；4）自适应意图路由（Adaptive Intent Routing）将大多数查询路由至零LLM层级。将检索公式化为类型化路径模板上的最小成本选择。

Result: 在LoCoMo基准测试上，PRISM在相同协议下比所有基线方法取得更高的LLM评判准确率，同时上下文预算降低一个数量级，占据了准确率-上下文成本前沿中此前空白的区域。

Conclusion: PRISM在无需微调或修改上游摄入管线的情况下，实现了答案质量与检索效率之间的优越平衡，填补了准确率-上下文成本前沿的空白。

Abstract: Long-horizon language agents accumulate conversation history far faster than any fixed context window can hold, making memory management critical to both answer accuracy and serving cost. Existing approaches either expand the context window without addressing what is retrieved, perform heavy ingestion-time fact extraction at substantial token cost, or rely on heuristic graph traversal that leaves both accuracy and efficiency on the table. We present PRISM, a training-free retrieval-side framework that treats long-horizon memory as a joint retrieval-and-compression problem over a graph-structured memory. PRISM combines four orthogonal inference-time components: Hierarchical Bundle Search over typed relation paths, Query-Sensitive Edge Costing that aligns traversal with detected query intent, Evidence Compression that compresses the candidate bundle into a compact answer-side context, and Adaptive Intent Routing that routes most queries through zero-LLM tiers. By formulating retrieval as min-cost selection over typed path templates and pairing it with an LLM-side compression step, PRISM surfaces the right evidence under a strict context budget without any fine-tuning or modification to the upstream ingestion pipeline. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that PRISM delivers substantially higher LLM-judge accuracy than every same-protocol baseline at an order-of-magnitude smaller context budget, occupying a previously empty corner of the accuracy-context-cost frontier and demonstrating a superior balance between answer quality and retrieval efficiency.

</details>


### [227] [What makes a word hard to learn? Modeling L1 influence on English vocabulary difficulty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12281)
*Jonas Mayer Martins,Zhuojing Huang,Aaricia Herygers,Lisa Beinborn*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究使用梯度提升模型，结合熟悉度、意义、表面形式和跨语言迁移四类特征，预测英语学习者（母语为西班牙语、德语或中文）的词汇难度。通过Shapley值分析发现：熟悉度是三大语言共享的主导因素，但西班牙语和德语学习者还依赖正字法迁移，而中文学习者因文字系统差异无法利用此机制，难度由熟悉度和表面特征共同决定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究不同母语背景（西班牙语、德语、中文）的英语学习者在词汇习得难度上的差异，以及影响难度的关键因素，为设计针对性的词汇教学大纲提供依据。

Method: 使用梯度提升模型（gradient-boosted models）进行建模，特征包括词汇熟悉度（如词频）、意义、表面形式和跨语言迁移四类；通过Shapley值量化各组特征的重要性。

Result: 熟悉度是所有语言共享的主导因素；西班牙语和德语学习者的难度还依赖于正字法迁移；中文学习者因文字差异无法利用正字法迁移，难度由熟悉度和表面特征共同决定。

Conclusion: 模型提供了可解释且针对不同母语（L1）的难度估算，可用于设计个性化的词汇教学课程。

Abstract: What makes a word difficult to learn, and how does the difficulty depend on the learner's native language? We computationally model vocabulary difficulty for English learners whose first language is Spanish, German, or Chinese with gradient-boosted models trained on features related to a word's familiarity (e.g., frequency), meaning, surface form, and cross-linguistic transfer. Using Shapley values, we determine the importance of each feature group. Word familiarity is the dominant feature group shared by all three languages. However, predictions for Spanish- and German-speaking learners rely additionally on orthographic transfer. This transfer mechanism is unavailable to Chinese learners, whose difficulty is shaped by a combination of familiarity and surface features alone. Our models provide interpretable, L1-tailored difficulty estimates that can be used to design vocabulary curricula.

</details>


### [228] [TokenRatio: Principled Token-Level Preference Optimization via Ratio Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12288)
*Truong Nguyen,Tien-Phat Nguyen,Linh Ngo Van,Duy Minh Ho Nguyen,Khoa Doan,Trung Le*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Token级Bregman偏好优化（TBPO），通过将Bradley-Terry模型扩展至token级别，利用Bregman散度密度比匹配目标，在保持DPO简洁性的同时实现token级偏好最优性，在多个对齐基准上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DPO在全序列级别建模偏好，忽略了生成过程由逐token决策驱动的特性；而现有的token级扩展方法通常仅将序列级目标分解到时间步上，未能显式实现逐前缀（状态级）最优性。

Method: 提出Token级Bradley-Terry偏好模型（基于前缀条件对下一token动作建模），推导Bregman散度密度比匹配目标（泛化Logistic/DPO损失）；提出两个实例：TBPO-Q（显式学习轻量状态基线）和TBPO-A（通过优势归一化消除基线）。

Result: 在指令遵循、有用性/无害性和摘要任务上，TBPO在对齐质量、训练稳定性和输出多样性方面均优于序列级和token级基线方法。

Conclusion: TBPO通过token级偏好建模和Bregman散度目标，在保持DPO简洁性的同时实现了更细粒度的对齐优化，验证了逐token偏好学习在语言模型对齐中的有效性。

Abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is a widely used RL-free method for aligning language models from pairwise preferences, but it models preferences over full sequences even though generation is driven by per-token decisions. Existing token-level extensions typically decompose a sequence-level Bradley-Terry objective across timesteps, leaving per-prefix (state-wise) optimality implicit. We study how to recover token-level preference optimality using only standard sequence-level pairwise comparisons. We introduce Token-level Bregman Preference Optimization (TBPO), which posits a token-level Bradley-Terry preference model over next-token actions conditioned on the prefix, and derive a Bregman-divergence density-ratio matching objective that generalizes the logistic/DPO loss while preserving the optimal policy induced by the token-level model and maintaining DPO-like simplicity. We introduce two instantiations: TBPO-Q, which explicitly learns a lightweight state baseline, and TBPO-A, which removes the baseline through advantage normalization. Across instruction following, helpfulness/harmlessness, and summarization benchmarks, TBPO improves alignment quality and training stability and increases output diversity relative to strong sequence-level and token-level baselines.

</details>


### [229] [GKnow: Measuring the Entanglement of Gender Bias and Factual Gender](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12299)
*Leonor Veloso,Hinrich Schütze*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GKnow基准来评估语言模型中的性别知识与性别偏见，发现性别偏见与事实性别在回路和神经元层面严重纠缠，导致消融去偏方法不可靠，且现有基准可能掩盖事实性别知识的下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对神经网络的性别机制解释存在两个问题：一是过于聚焦特定任务（如代词预测），二是未能区分事实性性别输出（基于语义属性）与基于刻板的性别偏见输出。作者旨在解决这一区分问题。

Method: 构建GKnow基准评估不同性别相关预测类型；通过回路和单个神经元分析识别负责性别预测的机制；在DiFair、GKnow测试集和StereoSet上测试神经元消融的影响。

Result: 性别偏见与事实性别在回路和神经元层面严重纠缠；消融作为去偏方法不可靠；现有偏见评估基准可能掩盖消融后事实性别知识的下降。

Conclusion: 性别知识与性别偏见深度纠缠，简单消融无法有效去偏；需要更鲁棒的偏见评估基准，GKnow为此做出贡献。

Abstract: Recent works have analyzed the impact of individual components of neural networks on gendered predictions, often with a focus on mitigating gender bias. However, mechanistic interpretations of gender tend to (i) focus on a very specific gender-related task, such as gendered pronoun prediction, or (ii) fail to distinguish between the production of factually gendered outputs (the correct assumption of gender given a word that carries gender as a semantic property) and gender biased outputs (based on a stereotype). To address these issues, we curate \gknow, a benchmark to assess gender knowledge and gender bias in language models across different types of gender-related predictions. \gknow allows us to identify and analyze circuits and individual neurons responsible for gendered predictions. We test the impact of neuron ablation on benchmarks for disentangling stereotypical and factual gender (DiFair and the test set of GKnow), as well as StereoSet. Results show that gender bias and factual gender are severely entangled on the level of both circuits and neurons, entailing that ablation is an unreliable debiasing method. Furthermore, we show that benchmarks for evaluating gender bias can hide the decrease in factual gender knowledge that accompanies neuron ablation. We curate GKnow as a contribution to the continuous development of robust gender bias benchmarks.

</details>


### [230] [A categorical error sensitivity index (ISEC): A preventive ordinal decision-support measure for irrecoverable errors in manual data entry systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12328)
*Ricardo Raúl Palma,Mauro Anibal Benetti,Fabricio Orlando Sanchez Varretti*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Categorical Error Sensitivity Index (ISEC)，一个整合语义距离、自定义加权形态转换成本和经验频率的复合评分指标，用于评估类别配对的结构性混淆风险。ISEC通过向量数据库架构实现约195倍性能提升，在三个异构数据集上验证有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 中小企业数据录入系统中，由于语义或形态相近的类别容易产生不可恢复的分类错误，现有标准化工具孤立评估语义和形态维度且过度依赖标准词典，对包含自定义SKU、缩写和专业术语的SME主数据效果不佳。

Method: ISEC整合三个维度：(1) 通过词嵌入计算语义距离；(2) 通过改进的Damerau-Levenshtein算法计算自定义加权形态转换成本；(3) 引入经验频率。利用向量数据库架构实现计算优化。

Result: 在政府司法记录、零售库存和合成ISO编码金属加工目录三个异构数据集上验证有效；相比暴力方法实现约195倍的性能提升。

Conclusion: ISEC提供了一个可扩展、主动的数据治理工具，使中小企业能够检测其分类数据资产中潜在的结构性风险。

Abstract: Data entry systems remain structurally vulnerable to categorical misclassifications, particularly in small and medium sized enterprises (SMEs). When nominal categories exhibit semantic or morphological proximity, human machine interaction may produce errors that are irrecoverable ex post. In the absence of automated input controls, manual data entry frequently generates irrecoverable categorical distortions that propagate into Key Performance Indicators (KPIs), thereby misleading managerial decision making. State of the art normalization tools typically evaluate semantic and morphological dimensions in isolation and rely heavily on standard dictionaries, rendering them ineffective for SME master data rich in custom SKUs, abbreviations, and domain-specific technical jargon. This paper introduces the Categorical Error Sensitivity Index (ISEC), an ordinal composite score designed to rank category pairs according to their structural susceptibility to confusion. ISEC integrates semantic distance (via word embeddings), custom weighted morphological transformation costs (through an adapted Damerau Levenshtein algorithm), and empirical frequency into a unified, mathematically robust preventive framework. By leveraging vector database architectures, ISEC reduces computational complexity, achieving approximately a 195x performance improvement over brute-force methods. Validated across three heterogeneous datasets: governmental judicial records, retail inventory, and a synthetic ISO coded metalworking catalog, ISEC provides a scalable and proactive data governance instrument that enables SMEs to detect latent structural risk embedded within their categorical data assets.

</details>


### [231] [Output Composability of QLoRA PEFT Modules for Plug-and-Play Attribute-Controlled Text Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12345)
*Michela Lorandi,Anya Belz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文探索了三种超越单任务训练/推理的PEFT泛化方法，发现输出求和组合法表现最佳，在情感控制任务上相比单任务专用模块平均提升2个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PEFT技术虽节省成本，但每项新任务都需要单独微调，缺乏跨任务的泛化能力，无法高效复用已有模块。

Method: 研究了三种泛化策略：(1)多任务联合训练；(2)推理时组合多个PEFT模块的权重矩阵；(3)推理时组合多个PEFT模块的输出。在QLoRA框架下，针对情感控制、主题控制、多属性控制三类文本生成任务进行实验。

Result: 输出求和组合法在多数场景下优于或持平其他方法，在情感控制任务中，三模块输出组合相比单任务专用模块平均提升2%的性能。

Conclusion: PEFT模块输出求和是一种简单而有效的组合方式，能提升模型在未见任务上的泛化能力，为多任务场景下的参数高效微调提供了新思路。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) techniques offer task-specific fine-tuning at a fraction of the cost of full fine-tuning, but require separate fine-tuning for every new task (combination). In this paper, we explore three ways of generalising beyond single-task training/inference: (i) training on combinations of multiple, related datasets; (ii) at inference, composing the weight matrices of separately trained PEFT modules; and (iii) at inference, composing the outputs of separately trained PEFT modules. We test these approaches on three different LLMs, QLoRA as the PEFT technique, and three sets of controlled text generation datasets for sentiment control, topic control, and multi-attribute control. We find that summing PEFT module outputs is a particularly strong composition method, which consistently either outperforms or matches the performance of alternative approaches. This is the case even when comparing against single-task specialised modules on the single-task test set, where three-module output composition achieves an average 2% point performance increase across all models for sentiment control.

</details>


### [232] [Pretraining Exposure Explains Popularity Judgments in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12382)
*Jamshid Mozafari,Bhawna Piryani,Adam Jatowt*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过可完全观测的预训练语料Dolma和OLMo模型，首次大规模分析了LLM中的流行度偏差。研究发现，预训练中的实体曝光度与Wikipedia流行度强相关，且LLM的流行度判断更接近预训练统计量而非Wikipedia，尤其在大模型和长尾分布中更明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往认为LLM对知名实体的偏好源于"流行度偏差"，但难以区分是真实世界流行度还是预训练统计曝光导致，因为大多数训练语料不可访问。本文希望利用完全公开的预训练数据来厘清这一问题。

Method: 基于开源OLMo模型及其完整预训练语料Dolma（7.4万亿token），计算2,000个实体（五类：人物、地点、组织、艺术品、产品）的精确曝光统计，并与Wikipedia页面浏览量、两种LLM流行度信号（直接标量估计和成对比较）进行对比分析。

Result: 预训练曝光度与Wikipedia流行度强相关；LLM的流行度判断更接近预训练曝光而非Wikipedia，在成对比较设置下更为显著；这种对齐在大模型中更强，在长尾分布中Wikipedia流行度不可靠时依然存在。

Conclusion: LLM中的流行度先验主要由预训练统计数据塑造，而非外部流行度信号，这为数据曝光在驱动流行度偏差中的核心作用提供了直接证据。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic preferences for well-known entities, a phenomenon often attributed to popularity bias. However, the extent to which these preferences reflect real-world popularity versus statistical exposure during pretraining remains unclear, largely due to the inaccessibility of most training corpora. We provide the first direct, large-scale analysis of popularity bias grounded in fully observable pretraining data. Leveraging the open OLMo models and their complete pretraining corpus, Dolma, we compute precise entity-level exposure statistics across 7.4 trillion tokens. We analyze 2,000 entities spanning five types (Person, Location, Organization, Art, Product) and compare pretraining exposure against Wikipedia pageviews and two elicited LLM popularity signals: direct scalar estimation and pairwise comparison. Our results show that pretraining exposure strongly correlates with Wikipedia popularity, validating exposure as a meaningful proxy for real-world salience during the training period. More importantly, we find that LLM popularity judgments align more closely with exposure than with Wikipedia, especially when elicited via pairwise comparisons. This alignment is strongest for larger models and persists in the long tail, where Wikipedia popularity becomes unreliable. Overall, our findings demonstrate that popularity priors in LLMs are primarily shaped by pretraining statistics rather than external popularity signals, offering concrete evidence that data exposure plays a central role in driving popularity bias.

</details>


### [233] [Scalable Token-Level Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12384)
*Rui Min,Tianyu Pang,Chao Du,Minhao Cheng,Yi R. Fung*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出TokenHD，一个用于训练token级幻觉检测器的全流程框架，包含可扩展的数据引擎、重要性加权的训练策略和严格的评估协议。训练后的检测器可直接在自由文本上识别幻觉，无需预定义步骤分割。实验表明，0.6B的小模型性能超越QwQ-32B等大推理模型，且性能随模型规模一致扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有步骤级幻觉检测方法粒度有限且可扩展性差，依赖于步骤分割。需要更细粒度的token级检测方法来处理推理密集型任务中看似连贯但含有逻辑错误等缺陷的幻觉。

Method: TokenHD包含三个核心组件：1) 可扩展的数据引擎，用于合成大规模幻觉标注；2) 重要性加权训练策略，实现鲁棒的模型训练；3) 严格的评估协议。检测器直接在自由文本上操作，无需步骤分割或文本重格式化。

Result: 小检测器(0.6B)在训练后超越更大推理模型(QwQ-32B)，检测性能从0.6B到8B一致扩展，且模型能很好地泛化到多种实际场景。

Conclusion: TokenHD框架有效训练了token级幻觉检测器，无需步骤分割即可工作，性能优于大型推理模型，且具有良好的可扩展性和跨域泛化能力，为进一步增强跨域泛化提供了探索方向。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but they still frequently produce hallucinations. These hallucinations are difficult to detect in reasoning-intensive tasks, where the content appears coherent but contains errors like logical flaws and unreliable intermediate results. While step-level analysis is commonly used to detect internal hallucinations, it suffers from limited granularity and poor scalability due to its reliance on step segmentation. To address these limitations, we propose TokenHD, a holistic pipeline for training token-level hallucination detectors. Specifically, TokenHD consists of a scalable data engine for synthesizing large-scale hallucination annotations along with a training recipe featuring an importance-weighted strategy for robust model training. To systematically assess the detection performance, we also provide a rigorous evaluation protocol. Through training within TokenHD, our detector operates directly on free-form text to identify hallucinations, eliminating the need for predefined step segmentation or additional text reformatting. Our experiments show that even a small detector (0.6B) achieves substantial performance gains after training, surpassing much larger reasoning models (e.g., QwQ-32B), and detection performance scales consistently with model size from 0.6B to 8B. Finally, we show that our detector can generalize well across diverse practical scenarios and explore strategies to further enhance its cross-domain generalization capability.

</details>


### [234] [A Comparative Study of Controlled Text Generation Systems Using Level-Playing-Field Evaluation Principles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12395)
*Michela Lorandi,Anya Belz*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种标准化、公平的比较评估框架（LPF），用于对受控文本生成系统进行横向对比。通过统一的数据集、评估方法和处理流程重新评估现有系统，发现大部分系统的性能显著低于原论文报告的结果，揭示了当前CTG领域缺乏标准化评估所导致的性能夸大问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前受控文本生成领域各系统使用不同数据集和评估方法，难以客观比较不同方法的实际性能优劣，亟需一种公平、信息量丰富的比较评估方案。

Method: 采用"公平竞技场"（Level-Playing-Field, LPF）方法：(i) 对所有系统输出进行标准化生成和处理；(ii) 基于当前常用评估方法，统一选用共享的评估指标和数据集进行公平比较。

Result: 对一组代表性CTG系统重新评估后，发现其性能结果与原始报告结果存在显著差异，且多数情况下性能明显下降。

Conclusion: LPF评估揭示的差异表明CTG领域迫切需要标准化、可复现的评估规范；缺乏此类规范会导致已发表的性能声明严重失实地高估系统真实能力。

Abstract: Background: Many different approaches to controlled text generation (CTG) have been proposed over recent years, but it is difficult to get a clear picture of which approach performs best, because different datasets and evaluation methods are used in each case to assess the control achieved.
  Objectives: Our aim in the work reported in this paper is to develop an approach to evaluation that enables us to comparatively evaluate different CTG systems in a manner that is both informative and fair to the individual systems.
  Methods: We use a level-playing-field (LPF) approach to comparative evaluation where we (i) generate and process all system outputs in a standardised way, and (ii) apply a shared set of evaluation methods and datasets, selected based on those currently in use, in order to ensure fair evaluation.
  Results: When re-evaluated in this way, performance results for a representative set of current CTG systems differ substantially from originally reported results, in most cases for the worse. This highlights the importance of a shared standardised way of assessing controlled generation.
  Conclusions: The discrepancies revealed by LPF evaluation demonstrate the urgent need for standardised, reproducible evaluation practices in CTG. Our results suggest that without such practices, published performance claims may substantially misrepresent true system capabilities.

</details>


### [235] [Stories in Space: In-Context Learning Trajectories in Conceptual Belief Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12412)
*Eric Bigelow,Raphaël Sarfati,Daniel Wurgaft,Owen Lewis,Thomas McGrath,Jack Merullo,Atticus Geiger,Ekdeep Singh Lubana*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出大语言模型（LLM）在低维几何空间（概念信念空间）上进行贝叶斯信念更新，上下文学习对应信念轨迹，并通过故事理解实验验证了信念轨迹的结构性、表征与行为一致性，以及几何干预的可预测性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将LLM的上下文学习视为贝叶斯推理，但潜在假设空间的结构尚不清晰。作者希望揭示LLM信念更新的几何结构，为贝叶斯解释提供具象化的表征基础。

Method: 以故事理解任务为动态信念更新的自然场景，结合行为分析（模型输出）与表征分析（内部表示），通过线性探针解码信念轨迹，并对表征进行因果干预以验证几何结构的因果作用。

Result: （1）信念更新可被描述为低维、结构化的流形上的轨迹；（2）该结构在行为与内部表征中一致体现，可用线性探针预测行为；（3）对表征的干预可因果性地改变信念轨迹，且效果可基于概念空间的几何结构预测。

Conclusion: 本文为LLM中的信念动态提供了几何解释，将贝叶斯视角的上下文学习锚定在结构化的概念表征上，揭示了信念更新背后的几何原理。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) update their behavior in context, which can be viewed as a form of Bayesian inference. However, the structure of the latent hypothesis space over which this inference operates remains unclear. In this work, we propose that LLMs assign beliefs over a low-dimensional geometric space - a conceptual belief space - and that in-context learning corresponds to a trajectory through this space as beliefs are updated over time. Using story understanding as a natural setting for dynamic belief updating, we combine behavioral and representational analyses to study these trajectories. We find that (1) belief updates are well-described as trajectories on low-dimensional, structured manifolds; (2) this structure is reflected consistently in both model behavior and internal representations and can be decoded with simple linear probes to predict behavior; and (3) interventions on these representations causally steer belief trajectories, with effects that can be predicted from the geometry of the conceptual space. Together, our results provide a geometric account of belief dynamics in LLMs, grounding Bayesian interpretations of in-context learning in structured conceptual representations.

</details>


### [236] [Predicting Disagreement with Human Raters in LLM-as-a-Judge Difficulty Assessment without Using Generation-Time Probability Signals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12422)
*Yo Ehara*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需概率信号、基于嵌入空间几何一致性来预测LLM难度评级与人工评分不一致的方法，在CEFR句子难度评估任务上优于传统基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM自动生成教育材料并分配难度等级越来越常见，但LLM-as-a-Judge与人工评分者之间存在不一致问题，现有方法依赖生成时的概率信号，难以跨模型比较且收集成本高。

Method: 利用难度等级的序数性质，采用ModernBERT等嵌入空间，基于评级集合的几何一致性来识别可能与人工评分不一致的LLM难度评级候选，无需依赖生成时的概率信号。

Result: 在CEFR基准的英语句子难度评估任务上，使用GPT-OSS-120B和Qwen3-235B-A22B进行实验，所提方法在预测与人工评分不一致方面取得了比基于概率的基线方法更高的AUC。

Conclusion: 该方法有效预测LLM难度评级与人工评分的不一致，可指导将可疑案例送交重新评级，减少人工校验成本。

Abstract: Automatic generation of educational materials using large language models (LLMs) is becoming increasingly common, but assigning difficulty levels to such materials still requires substantial human effort. LLM-as-a-Judge has therefore attracted attention, yet disagreement with human raters remains a major challenge. We propose a method for predicting which LLM-generated difficulty ratings are likely to disagree with human raters, so that such cases can be sent for re-rating. Unlike prior approaches, our method does not rely on generation-time probability signals, which must be collected during rating generation and are often difficult to compare across LLMs. Instead, exploiting the fact that difficulty is an ordinal scale, we use a separate embedding space, such as ModernBERT, and identify disagreement candidates based on the geometric consistency of the rating set. Experiments on English CEFR-based sentence difficulty assessment with GPT-OSS-120B and Qwen3-235B-A22B showed that the proposed method achieved higher AUC for predicting disagreement with human raters than probability-based baselines.

</details>


### [237] [Geometric Factual Recall in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12426)
*Shauli Ravfogel,Gilad Yehudai,Joan Bruna,Alberto Bietti*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文发现Transformer语言模型中的记忆机制并非传统观点认为的线性规模参数存储事实，而是一种几何形式的记忆：对数维度的嵌入空间即可编码大量事实，MLP层扮演关系条件选择器而非键值存储器的角色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战传统观点（权重矩阵作为关联记忆，参数量与事实数线性相关），探索Transformer是否以更高效的几何形式存储事实关联。

Method: 1) 理论证明：单层Transformer在记忆随机双射时，对数维度的嵌入空间足够，主体嵌入编码属性向量的线性叠加，小MLP通过ReLU门控作为关系条件选择器。2) 扩展至多跳查询，给出有无思维链的构造并证明容量-深度权衡。3) 实验验证梯度下降找到预测结构，且MLP可零样本迁移至全新双射。

Result: 1) 嵌入维度只需对数级别即可编码大量事实。2) MLP学习到的是通用选择机制而非具体事实。3) 存在容量-深度权衡，理论下界匹配。

Conclusion: Transformer的记忆机制是几何形式的，嵌入直接编码关系结构，MLP作为条件选择器，这比传统关联记忆更高效且可迁移。

Abstract: How do transformer language models memorize factual associations? A common view casts internal weight matrices as associative memories over pairs of embeddings, requiring parameter counts that scale linearly with the number of facts. We develop a theoretical and empirical account of an alternative, \emph{geometric} form of memorization in which learned embeddings encode relational structure directly, and the MLP plays a qualitatively different role. In a controlled setting where a single-layer transformer must memorize random bijections from subjects to a shared attribute set, we prove that a logarithmic embedding dimension suffices: subject embeddings encode \emph{linear superpositions} of their associated attribute vectors, and a small MLP acts as a relation-conditioned selector that extracts the relevant attribute via ReLU gating, and not as an associative key-value mapping. We extend these results to the multi-hop setting -- chains of relational queries such as ``Who is the mother of the wife of $x$?'' -- providing constructions with and without chain-of-thought that exhibit a provable capacity-depth tradeoff, complemented by a matching information-theoretic lower bound. Empirically, gradient descent discovers solutions with precisely the predicted structure. Once trained, the MLP transfers zero-shot to entirely new bijections when subject embeddings are appropriately re-initialized, revealing that it has learned a generic selection mechanism rather than memorized any particular set of facts.

</details>


### [238] [A Causal Language Modeling Detour Improves Encoder Continued Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12438)
*Rian Touchent,Eric de la Clergerie*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出“CLM绕行”策略：先在目标领域数据上使用因果语言模型（CLM）训练，再切换回掩码语言模型（MLM）微调，相比持续MLM训练，在生物医学领域下游任务上取得显著提升。以ModernBERT为骨干，法语任务提升1.2-2.8个百分点，英语任务提升0.3-0.8个百分点。实验表明，CLM的密集监督主要影响低层Transformer层（0-7层），这些层的变化是下游收益的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准的领域自适应方法是持续用MLM训练编码器，但作者猜想MLM的稀疏监督（仅预测被掩码的词）可能不是最优的领域适应方式，CLM的密集监督（预测每个位置的词）可能提供更丰富的学习信号。

Method: 1. 先在目标域数据上用CLM训练编码器；2. 再切换回MLM进行短期的“衰减”训练；3. 在ModernBERT架构上验证，使用法语和英语生物医学数据集。

Result: 法语8个生物医学任务提升1.2-2.8pp，英语11个任务提升0.3-0.8pp。CLM的收益主要来自低层Transformer层（0-7层），冻结低层会消除收益，冻结中层则不影响。表示变化在后续MLM阶段得以保持。

Conclusion: CLM绕行策略能有效提升编码器的领域自适应性能，其机制在于CLM的密集监督为低层Transformer层提供了更强的训练信号。该方法具有可扩展性，并且释放了在生物医学领域最先进的ModernBERT模型。

Abstract: When adapting an encoder to a new domain, the standard approach is to continue training with Masked Language Modeling (MLM). We show that temporarily switching to Causal Language Modeling (CLM) followed by a short MLM decay improves downstream performance. On biomedical texts with ModernBERT, this CLM detour outperforms MLM baselines trained on identical data and compute across 8 French and 11 English biomedical tasks, by +1.2-2.8pp and +0.3-0.8pp respectively, depending on model size. We investigate the reasons for these gains. We find that CLM's dense supervision impacts low transformer layers (0-7) far more than MLM does. Freezing low layers during CLM eliminates the downstream benefit; freezing mid layers preserves it. The representational changes persist through the MLM decay phase, even when it matches the CLM phase in length, and they scale with model capacity. We release ModernCamemBERT-bio and ModernBERT-bio as state-of-the-art biomedical encoders in Base and Large sizes.

</details>


### [239] [The Algorithmic Caricature: Auditing LLM-Generated Political Discourse Across Crisis Events](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12452)
*Gunjan,Sidahmed Benabderrahmane,Talal Rahwan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文提出从计算社会科学（CSS）视角评估合成政治话语的"人口现实性"（population realism），通过对比九个危机事件中178万条观测数据与AI生成文本，发现合成话语虽流畅但存在情绪更负面、结构更规则、词汇更抽象等系统性偏差。作者提出"讽刺差距"（Caricature Gap）这一事件级指标，指出合成话语的主要缺陷不在语法流畅性，而在于缺乏真实人群的多样性表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI文本检测主要关注句子层面的困惑度、突发性等线索，但随着生成模型性能提升，这些信号可能减弱。作者转向计算社会科学视角，探究合成政治话语是否像真实的在线人群一样具有群体层面的现实性，从而为检测提供新的维度。

Method: 构建包含九个危机事件（COVID-19、国会山袭击、2020/2024选举等）的配对语料库，共1,789,406条帖子。每个事件中对比真实社交媒体话语与相同上下文的合成话语，从四个维度（情感强度、结构规律性、词汇-意识形态框架、跨事件依赖性）进行评估，使用均值差距和离散度证据。

Result: 合成话语整体更负面且情感离散度更低、结构更规则、词汇更抽象。真实话语呈现更广泛的情感波动、长尾结构分布和更具体、口语化的词汇标记。这些差异具有事件依赖性：在快速变化的去中心化危机中更大，在正式或制度中介导的事件中较小。论文提出了"讽刺差距"这一事件级度量指标。

Conclusion: 合成政治话语的主要限制不在语法或流畅性，而在于缺乏人口现实性（population realism）。人口级审计（population-level auditing）可以补充传统的文本检测方法，为评估生成话语的社会现实性提供CSS框架。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent political text at scale, raising concerns about synthetic discourse during crises and social conflict. Existing AI-text detection often focuses on sentence-level cues such as perplexity, burstiness, or token irregularities, but these signals may weaken as generative systems improve. We instead adopt a Computational Social Science perspective and ask whether synthetic political discourse behaves like an observed online population. We construct a paired corpus of 1,789,406 posts across nine crisis events: COVID-19, the Jan. 6 Capitol attack, the 2020 and 2024 U.S. elections, Dobbs/Roe v. Wade, the 2020 BLM protests, U.S. midterms, the Utah shooting, and the U.S.-Iran war. For each event, we compare observed discourse from social platforms with synthetic discourse generated for the same context. We evaluate four dimensions: emotional intensity, structural regularity, lexical-ideological framing, and cross-event dependency, using mean gaps and dispersion evidence. Across events, synthetic discourse is fluent but population-level unrealistic. It is generally more negative and less dispersed in sentiment, structurally more regular, and lexically more abstract than observed discourse. Observed discourse instead shows broader emotional variation, longer-tailed structural distributions, and more context-specific, colloquial lexical markers. These differences are event-dependent: larger for fast-moving, decentralized crises and smaller for formal or institutionally mediated events. We summarize them with a simple event-level measure, the Caricature Gap. Our findings suggest that the main limitation of synthetic political discourse is not grammar or fluency, but reduced population realism. Population-level auditing complements traditional text-detection and provides a CSS framework for evaluating the social realism of generated discourse.

</details>


### [240] [LongMemEval-V2: Evaluating Long-Term Agent Memory Toward Experienced Colleagues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12493)
*Di Wu,Zixiang Ji,Asmi Kawatkar,Bryan Kwan,Jia-Chen Gu,Nanyun Peng,Kai-Wei Chang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出LongMemEval-V2 (LME-V2)基准，用于评估Web智能体在特定环境中的长期记忆能力。该基准包含451个手动设计的问题，覆盖五种核心记忆能力。作者提出两种记忆方法：AgentRunbook-R（基于RAG）和AgentRunbook-C（基于编码智能体）。实验表明AgentRunbook-C以72.5%的准确率最优，但延迟成本高。LME-V2被证明是一个具有挑战性的测试平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体记忆基准主要关注用户历史、短轨迹或下游任务成功，缺乏直接评估记忆系统能否有效内化环境特定经验的基准。为此，作者提出LME-V2来填补这一空白。

Method: 构建包含451个问题的基准LME-V2，涵盖静态状态回忆、动态状态追踪、工作流知识、环境陷阱和前提意识五种能力。提出两种方法：(1) AgentRunbook-R：基于RAG，使用知识池存储原始状态观察、事件和策略笔记；(2) AgentRunbook-C：将轨迹存储为文件，调用编码智能体在增强沙箱中收集证据。

Result: AgentRunbook-C达到72.5%平均准确率，优于最强RAG基线（48.5%）和现成编码智能体基线（69.3%）。但编码智能体方法延迟成本高。

Conclusion: LME-V2是一个具有挑战性的长期记忆测试基准；AgentRunbook-C推进了准确率-延迟帕累托前沿，但仍有较大改进空间。

Abstract: Long-term memory is crucial for agents in specialized web environments, where success depends on recalling interface affordances, state dynamics, workflows, and recurring failure modes. However, existing memory benchmarks for agents mostly focus on user histories, short traces, or downstream task success, leaving open how to directly evaluate whether memory systems effectively internalize environment-specific experience. To address this gap, we introduce LongMemEval-V2 (LME-V2), a benchmark for evaluating whether memory systems can help agents acquire the experience needed to become knowledgeable colleagues in customized environments. LME-V2 contains 451 manually curated questions covering five core memory abilities for web agents: static state recall, dynamic state tracking, workflow knowledge, environment gotchas, and premise awareness. Questions are paired with history trajectories containing up to 500 trajectories and 115M tokens. We use a context gathering formulation: memory systems consume history trajectories and return compact evidence for downstream question answering. We propose a suite of two memory methods: AgentRunbook-R, an efficient RAG-based memory with knowledge pools for raw state observations, events, and strategy notes, and AgentRunbook-C, which stores trajectories as files and invokes a coding agent to gather evidence in an augmented sandbox. Experiments show that AgentRunbook-C achieves the best performance with 72.5% average accuracy, outperforming the strongest RAG baseline (48.5%) and the off-the-shelf coding agent baseline (69.3%). Despite the strong performance gains, coding agent based methods have high latency costs. While AgentRunbook-C advances the accuracy-latency Pareto frontier, substantial room for improvement remains. Together, these results establish LME-V2 as a challenging testbed for developing long-term memory systems for environment experience.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [241] [Skill Drift Is Contract Violation: Proactive Maintenance for LLM Agent Skill Libraries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10990)
*Linfeng Fan,Yuan Tian,Ziwei Li,Zhiwu Lu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SkillGuard，通过将技能漂移形式化为合约违反，从技能文档中提取可执行环境合约并验证角色承载假设，从而将噪声监控转变为精确优先的维护信号，在599个无漂移案例中零误报，在真实技能中发现漂移的保守精确率达86%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM代理依赖的可复用技能库会因外部服务、包、API和配置的演变而悄然退化，现有监控工具在错误粒度上检测变化（观察数值而非数值在技能中扮演的角色），导致大量误报。

Method: 将技能漂移形式化为合约违反，从技能文档中提取可执行环境合约，仅验证那些承载特定角色的假设是否与已知或当前条件匹配，区分角色承载信息与无关信息。

Result: 无合约的CI探针产生40%假阳性，而SkillGuard在599个无漂移和硬负例案例中零误报（Wilson 95% CI [0,0.6]%）；在已知漂移验证中达到100%精确率和76%召回率；在49个真实技能研究中发现漂移的保守精确率达86%；修复成功率从10%提升至78%。

Conclusion: 通过合约机制实现精确的技能漂移检测，显著降低误报率，并使修复变得可行，同时发布了包含880对样本的技能退化基准数据集。

Abstract: LLM agents increasingly rely on reusable skill libraries, but these skills silently decay as the external services, packages, APIs, and configurations they reference evolve. Existing monitors detect such changes at the wrong granularity: they observe values, not the role those values play in a skill. A version string in a comment is noise; the same string in a pinned dependency is an operational obligation. We formulate skill drift as contract violation and introduce \sgname{}, which extracts executable environment contracts from skill documents and validates only those role-bearing assumptions against known or live conditions. This distinction turns noisy monitoring into a precision-first maintenance signal. Contract-free CI probes produce 40\% false positives, while \sgname{} raises zero false alarms over 599 no-drift and hard-negative cases (Wilson 95\% CI $[0,0.6]\%$). In known-drift verification, \sgname{} achieves 100\% precision and 76\% recall with the strongest backbone; in a pre-registered study over 49 real skills, it discovers live drift with 86\% conservative precision. Violated contracts also make repair actionable, improving one-round success from 10\% without localization to 78\%. We release \dbname{}, an 880-pair benchmark for skill degradation.

</details>


### [242] [An Execution-Verified Multi-Language Benchmark for Code Semantic Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11006)
*Yikun Li,Jinfeng Jiang,Ting Zhang,Chengran Yang,Chenxing Zhong,Yin Yide,Leow Wen Bin,Eng Lieh Ouh,Lwin Khin Shar,David Lo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: TraceEval 是一个执行验证的、多语言的代码语义推理基准，用于评估 LLM 从源代码恢复运行时调用结构的能力，包含 10,583 个真实程序，最强模型 Claude-Opus-4.6 达到 72.9% F1，微调后 Qwen2.5-Coder-32B 可达 71.2% F1。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码基准仅关注通过测试的输出结果（如 HumanEval、SWE-Bench），无法有效诊断模型对执行相关程序结构的理解能力，缺乏评估 LLM 从源代码恢复运行时调用结构的执行验证基准。

Method: 构建 TraceEval 基准：(1) 从 1,600+ 开源仓库中提取 10,583 个真实程序（Python/JavaScript/Java）；(2) 通过 LLM 辅助的 harness 生成管道和 tracer 验证，确保每个正边都被执行验证；(3) 提供可复现的管道，可将任意开源仓库转换为新的验证实例。

Result: 评估 10 个 LLM 在零样本下，最强模型 Claude-Opus-4.6 平均 F1 为 72.9%；在训练集上微调 Qwen2.5-Coder 系列，最高提升 +55.6 F1，使 Qwen2.5-Coder-32B 达到 71.2% F1，仅落后 Claude-Opus-4.6 1.7 个点。

Conclusion: TraceEval 填补了代码语义推理基准的空白，通过执行验证确保了标签的可靠性和可复现性，同时证明了其训练集作为微调资源的有效性。

Abstract: Evaluating whether large language models (LLMs) can recover execution-relevant program structure, rather than only produce code that passes tests, remains an open problem. Existing code benchmarks emphasize test-passing outputs, from standalone programming tasks (HumanEval, MBPP, LiveCodeBench) to repository repair (SWE-Bench); this is useful, but offers limited diagnostic signal about which program semantics a model can recover from source. We introduce TraceEval, to our knowledge the first execution-verified, multi-language benchmark for code semantic reasoning: recovering a program's runtime call structure from source code. Unlike prior call-graph benchmarks that rely on static-tool output or hand-annotated ground truth, every positive edge in TraceEval is mechanically witnessed by validation execution, eliminating annotator disagreement and label noise for observed behavior. TraceEval consists of (i) 10,583 real-world programs (2,129 test, 8,454 train) extracted from 1,600+ open-source repositories across Python, JavaScript, and Java via an LLM-assisted harness-generation pipeline with tracer validation; and (ii) a reproducible pipeline that converts any open-source repository into new verified benchmark instances. We evaluate 10 LLMs at zero-shot on the held-out test split. The strongest model, Claude-Opus-4.6, reaches an average F1 of 72.9% across the three languages. To demonstrate the train split's utility as a supervision substrate, we fine-tune the Qwen2.5-Coder family on it: lifts of up to +55.6 F1 bring tuned Qwen2.5-Coder-32B to 71.2%, within 1.7 F1 of zero-shot Claude-Opus-4.6. We release the benchmark, pipeline, baselines, and a datasheet at https://github.com/yikun-li/TraceEva

</details>


### [243] [From Code-Centric to Intent-Centric Software Engineering: A Reflexive Thematic Analysis of Generative AI, Agentic Systems, and Engineering Accountability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11027)
*Elyson De La Cruz*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过反思性主题分析和解释现象学分析，结合同行评议文献、技术基准、公开演讲、技术公告和X平台讨论，发现生成式AI和智能体系统正在将软件工程从以代码为中心的生产转向以意图为中心的人机协作，工程师的角色从代码编写者转变为监督、验证和治理社会技术系统的管理者。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多关注代码生成、AI结对编程和软件工程智能体，但对于公共技术讨论和同行评审证据如何共同塑造该职业的近期转型尚缺乏系统理解。

Method: 采用反思性主题分析（RTA）为主、解释现象学分析（IPA）为辅的方法，对同行评议文献、技术基准、公开演讲、技术公告及X平台上的AI和软件工程领域意见领袖的讨论进行系统性文档分析，并通过语料库登记表、编码手册、编码矩阵、主题-来源可追溯性表、DOI/参考文献审计和可重复性协议来组织和管理数据源。

Result: 生成式AI降低了生成可行代码的成本，同时提升了意图规范、上下文策展、架构知识、验证、安全、溯源、治理和可问责的人类判断的重要性。软件工程正从孤立的代码创作转变为对由人类、智能体、工具和证据关卡组成的社会技术系统进行监督、验证和治理。

Conclusion: 速度导向的采用可能积累隐性技术债务和责任缺口，而有边界的自主性可以维护质量、安全性、可维护性和信任。

Abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) and agentic systems are moving software engineering from code-centric production toward intent-centric human-agent work in which natural language, repository context, tools, tests, and governance shape delivery. Prior studies examine code generation, AI pair programming, and software engineering agents, but less is known about how public technical discourse and peer-reviewed evidence together frame the profession's near-term transition. This study addresses that gap through a reflexive thematic analysis (RTA) dominant and interpretative phenomenological analysis (IPA) informed public-discourse and document analysis. The corpus combines peer-reviewed software engineering and AI literature, technical benchmarks, public talks and interviews, essays, product-facing technical announcements, and X-originated discourse from prominent AI and software engineering voices. Sources were organized through a corpus register, codebook, coding matrix, theme-to-source traceability table, DOI/reference audit, and reproducibility protocol. The analysis shows that GenAI lowers the cost of producing plausible code while increasing the importance of intent specification, context curation, architecture knowledge, verification, security, provenance, governance, and accountable human judgment. The findings indicate that software engineering is becoming less about isolated code authorship and more about supervising, validating, and governing socio-technical systems of humans, agents, tools, and evidence gates. This matters because speed-focused adoption can accumulate hidden technical debt and accountability gaps, whereas bounded autonomy can preserve quality, security, maintainability, and trust.

</details>


### [244] [An Executable Benchmarking Suite for Tool-Using Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11030)
*Zhiqing Zhong,Zhijing Ye,Jiamin Wang,Xiaodong Yu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个可执行的基准测试套件，通过明确的证据准入契约，统一了WebArena Verified、SWE-Gym/SWE-bench和MiniWoB++等工具使用环境的评估标准，并验证了该契约对决策结果有实质性影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有闭环工具使用智能体的基准测试常混淆工作负载、动作生成驱动和系统级证据，导致评估混乱且不可复现，亟需一套明确证据准入标准的统一评估框架。

Method: 设计了一个可执行基准测试套件，将工作负载适配器、任务清单、事件模式、重放/冻结策略、声明驱动和报告管线等组件显式分离，并通过证据准入门控机制区分面向论文的证据与其他诊断性数据。

Result: 在WebArena Verified的控制器对比研究中，不同评估条件（清洁基线vs中等压力）在相同工作负载和准入契约下选择了不同的固定控制器变体，表明该门控机制对决策有实质性影响。

Conclusion: 该套件定义了可审计的证据准入契约，明确了评估范围（非新策略/排行榜/后端比较），为工具使用智能体的可复现评估提供了基础设施。

Abstract: Closed-loop tool-using agents are increasingly evaluated in executable web, code, and micro-task environments, but benchmark reports often conflate workloads, action-generating drivers, and the evidence admitted for systems-facing claims. We present an executable benchmarking suite that makes these objects explicit under a shared evidence-admission contract. The suite connects WebArena Verified, a SWE-Gym slice with SWE-bench-compatible verification, and MiniWoB++ through common workload adapters, task manifests, event schemas, replay/freeze policy, declared drivers, and reporting pipelines. In the canonical release, the gate separates paper-facing evidence from preflight, fixture, smoke, and diagnostic rows while preserving non-admitted artifacts for audit and onboarding. The admitted evidence records latency, invalid-action behavior, patch-generation cost, verifier metadata, replay bindings, and provenance under one auditable contract. The gate is decision-relevant rather than merely clerical: in a separate WebArena Verified controller study, clean-baseline and medium live-stressed evaluation select different fixed controller variants under the same workload and admission contract. The release is scoped as a benchmarking suite and admitted evidence, not a new agent policy, model leaderboard, backend comparison, or autonomous SWE-bench solver.

</details>


### [245] [Read, Extract, Classify: A Tool for Smarter Requirements Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11045)
*Paheli Bhattacharya,Manojit Chakraborty,Santhosh Kumar Arumugam,Rishabh Gupta*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ReXCL是一个自动化需求提取与分类工具，通过启发式方法和预测建模处理半结构化需求文档，并利用自适应微调编码器模型进行分类，显著提升了需求管理的效率与准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需求工程中，手动提取和分类需求文档耗时且易出错，缺乏自动化方法来自动处理半结构化需求文档的模式化。

Method: 提出ReXCL工具，包含两个模块：(1) 提取模块：使用启发式方法和预测建模将原始需求文档处理为预定义模式；(2) 分类模块：利用自适应微调（adaptive fine-tuning）的编码器模型为需求分配类别标签。最终输出可导出至外部需求工程工具。

Result: 性能评估显示，ReXCL在需求管理的效率和准确性上均有显著提升，证明了自动化半结构化需求文档模式化的有效性与新颖性。

Conclusion: ReXCL是一种新颖的自动化方法，能够高效、准确地对半结构化需求文档进行提取和分类，可集成到现有需求工程工具链中，提升软件开发全生命周期。

Abstract: This paper presents the ReXCL tool, which automates the extraction and classification processes in requirements engineering, enhancing the software development life-cycle. The tool features two main modules: Extraction, which processes raw requirement documents into a predefined schema using heuristics and predictive modeling, and Classification, which assigns class labels to requirements using adaptive fine-tuning of encoder-based models. The final output can be exported to external requirement engineering tools. Performance evaluations indicate that ReXCL significantly improves efficiency and accuracy in managing requirements, marking a novel approach to automating the schematization of semi-structured requirement documents.

</details>


### [246] [On Problems of Implicit Context Compression for Software Engineering Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11051)
*Kirill Gelvan,Igor Slinko,Felix Steinbauer,Egor Bogomolov,Florian Kofler,Yaroslav Zharov*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文探讨了将In-Context Autoencoder应用于LLM软件工程智能体时，在长上下文任务中遇到的瓶颈——虽然该方法在单次常识和代码理解任务上表现良好，但在多步骤智能体编码任务中失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM软件工程智能体在处理复杂、长周期任务时受限于上下文长度，现有方法（如In-Context Autoencoder）虽然在单次任务中有效，但在多步骤场景下失效，需要探究其失败原因。

Method: 采用In-Context Autoencoder将上下文编码为连续嵌入（而非离散标记），以更密集地存储信息，并在多步骤智能体编码任务中测试其表现。

Result: 该方法在单次常识和代码理解任务中表现良好，但在多步骤智能体编码任务中失败。

Conclusion: 需要进一步探讨In-Context Autoencoder在多步骤智能体编码任务中失败的可能因素。

Abstract: LLM-based Software Engineering agents face a critical bottleneck: context length limitations cause failures on complex, long-horizon tasks. One promising solution is to encode context as continuous embeddings rather than discrete tokens, enabling denser information storage. We apply the recently proposed In-Context Autoencoder for this purpose. While the method performs well on single-shot common-knowledge and code-understanding tasks, our experiments demonstrate that it fails on multi-step agentic coding tasks. In this paper, we explore this phenomenon and discuss possible factors contributing to this failure.

</details>


### [247] [SHIA: A Direct SysML-Hardware Interface Architecture for Model-Centric Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11248)
*Charles Lewis,Amal Elsokary,Siyuan Ji*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SHIA架构，通过在SysML模型与物理硬件之间建立直接双向通信链路，使系统模型能够直接参与硬件验证循环，避免模型与实现脱节。基于逻辑门案例验证，模型输出与硬件输出完全一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前MBSE中，系统模型在硬件验证阶段被弃用，模型与实现逐渐脱节，缺乏一种让SysML模型直接参与硬件验证的方法。

Method: 提出SHIA架构，包含SysML侧服务器（IBM Rhapsody中嵌入C++实现）和硬件侧服务器（运行于树莓派），建立数字模型与物理系统之间的双向通信链路。

Result: 逻辑门案例中，集成系统双向消息交换正确，SysML生成输出与硬件生成输出的卡诺图对比显示零差异。

Conclusion: SysML配合合适接口后，可成为执行层直接激励、观察和验证硬件行为，实现模型主导的验证，缩短系统架构与硬件实现之间的数字线程。

Abstract: Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) is widely treated as the backbone of digital engineering, with languages such as the Systems Modeling Language (SysML) providing the means to capture system structure, behaviour, and verification intent. Yet once verification moves to hardware, the system model is routinely left behind. Domain-specific simulation environments, model transformations, and bespoke tool integrations take over, and the model that began as the authoritative reference drifts out of sync with the implementation it was meant to govern. This paper introduces the SysML Hardware Interface Architecture (SHIA), which keeps an executable SysML model directly inside the verification loop, exchanging messages with physical hardware without intermediate transformation chains, co-simulation platforms, or broker-mediated plugins. SHIA is realised through a SysML side server, written in embedded C++ within IBM Rhapsody, and a hardware side server running on a Raspberry Pi, together establishing a bidirectional link between the digital model and the physical system. A logic gate case study demonstrates the approach end-to-end, from hardware model construction and prototype assembly to test harness design, behavioural statechart control, and staged verification of each component before integration. The integrated system exchanged messages correctly in both directions, and Karnaugh map comparison between the SysML-generated and hardware-generated outputs showed zero discrepancy. The result shows that, when paired with a suitable interface, SysML need not remain a static description that informs downstream tools; it can serve as the executable layer through which hardware behaviour is stimulated, observed, and verified. The work demonstrates a route to model-governed verification and a shorter digital thread between system architecture and the hardware that realises it.

</details>


### [248] [Natural Language based Specification and Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11315)
*Zhaorui Li,Chengyu Song*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文探索了一种新方法：利用大语言模型（LLMs）既生成用自然语言表达的规范，又基于这些规范对代码实现进行组合式验证，以防止LLM生成含漏洞的代码。初步结果表明该方法具有潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 防止LLM生成的代码包含安全漏洞；现有形式化验证需要严格的规范语言，而LLM此前生成规范的效果有限。

Method: 使用LLM以自然语言形式生成规范，并基于这些自然语言规范对代码实现进行组合式验证（compositional verification）。

Result: 初步实验表明该方法是promising（有前景的）的。

Conclusion: 用自然语言表达规范替代传统形式语言，结合LLM生成规范与验证代码，为减少LLM生成漏洞代码提供了新路径。

Abstract: Recent frontier large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance in identifying security vulnerabilities in large, mature open-source systems. As LLM-generated code becomes increasingly common, a natural goal is to prevent such models from producing vulnerable implementations in the first place. Formal verification offers a principled route to this objective, but existing verification pipelines typically require specifications written in rigid formal languages. Prior work has explored using LLMs to synthesize such specifications, with limited success. In this paper, we investigate a different approach: using LLMs both to generate specifications and to verify implementations compositionally when the specifications are expressed in natural language. Our preliminary results suggest that this approach is promising.

</details>


### [249] [NeuroFlake: A Neuro-Symbolic LLM Framework for Flaky Test Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11482)
*Khondaker Tasnia Hoque,Toukir Ahammed*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: NeuroFlake是一个神经符号框架，通过判别性Token挖掘模块自动发现高保真源码token并将其注入LLM注意力机制，在不平衡真实数据集上将flaky测试分类F1分数提升至69.34%（此前最佳65.79%），且在对抗扰动下仅下降4-7个百分点（基线模型下降8-18个百分点）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在flaky测试分类中过度拟合表面文本伪影（如特定变量名），无法真正理解测试不稳定性的逻辑，导致在不平衡真实数据集上泛化能力差，且对扰动敏感。

Method: 提出NeuroFlake神经符号框架：(1) 判别性Token挖掘(DTM)模块自动发现统计上显著的源码token（如并发原语、异步等待）；(2) 将这些强潜在信号注入LLM注意力机制，实现神经直觉与符号精确性的融合。

Result: 在FlakeBench真实不平衡数据集上，分类F1分数达69.34%（此前SOTA 65.79%）；在语义保持的对抗扰动下（死代码注入、变量重命名），性能仅下降4-7个百分点，基线模型下降8-18个百分点。

Conclusion: 神经符号融合能显著提升flaky测试分类性能与鲁棒性，弥合了神经网络直觉与符号精确性之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Flaky tests, which exhibit non-deterministic pass/fail behavior for the same version of code, pose significant challenges to reliable regression testing. While large language models (LLMs) promise for automated flaky test classification, they often fail to comprehend the actual logic behind test flakiness, instead overfitting to superficial textual artifacts (e.g., specific variable names). This semantic fragility leads to poor generalization on real-world imbalance dataset and vulnerability to perturbations. In this paper, we introduce NeuroFlake, a novel neuro-Symbolic framework for classifying flaky tests on highly imbalanced, real-world datasets (FlakeBench). Unlike prior approaches that rely on brittle manual rule and black box learning, NeuroFlake integrates a Discriminative Token Mining (DTM) module to automate the discovery of high-fidelity, statistically significant source code tokens (e.g., specific concurrency primitives or async waits). By injecting these strong latent signals directly into LLM's attention mechanism, we bridge the gap between neural intuition and symbolic precision. Our experiments demonstrate that neuro-symbolic fusion significantly improves classification performance by leveraging classification F1-score to 69.34% while prior state-of-art shows best F1-score 65.79%. However, we rigorously evaluate NeuroFlake's robustness through adversarial stress testing, introducing semantic preserving augmentations (e.g., dead code injection, variable renaming). While baseline models exhibit performance degradation of 8-18 percentage points (pp) on perturbed tests, NeuroFlake maintains performance stability on unseen augmentations dropping only 4-7 pp.

</details>


### [250] [Decaf: Improving Neural Decompilation with Automatic Feedback and Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11501)
*Alexander Shypula,Osbert Bastani,Edward Schwartz*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Decaf系统通过编译器反馈搜索机制，将神经反编译的成功率从26.0%提升至83.9%，在不牺牲源码相似度的前提下显著改善了反编译结果的语义正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的确定性反编译器难以推断惯用语法和标识符名称，而神经反编译器虽能重建高级语法但存在幻觉问题（生成不正确的编程结构和语义）。作者认为仅靠增加数据和训练无法从根本上解决语义正确性问题。

Method: 提出Decaf系统，核心思想是利用编译器反馈作为搜索指导，对神经反编译器的输出进行迭代优化：生成候选代码→编译检查→根据编译错误反馈调整输出，通过搜索过程提升语义正确性。

Result: 在ExeBench数据集上的Real -O2子集上，Decaf将神经反编译成功率从26.0%提升至83.9%，且不损失与原始源码的相似度。该方法对较弱的神经反编译模型同样有效。

Conclusion: 编译器反馈是一种有效提升神经反编译器语义正确性的方法，比单纯增加数据和训练更高效，尤其适用于提升弱模型的性能。

Abstract: Decompilers are useful tools used in reverse engineering to understand compiled source code. Reconstructing source code from compiled binaries is a challenging task, because high-level syntax, identifiers, and custom data types are generally lost as the compiler translates human-readable code to low-level machine code. Deterministic decompilers are useful tools for binary analysis, but can struggle to infer idiomatic syntax and identifier names. Generative AI models are a natural fit for reconstructing high-level syntax, identifiers, and types, but they can still suffer by hallucinating improper programming constructs and semantics. Instead of attempting to improve neural decompilers with more data and more training, we argue that compiler feedback can be used to dramatically improve the semantic correctness of neural decompiler outputs via search. Our system, Decaf (DECompilation with Automated Feedback), raises the neural decompilation rate from 26.0% on ExeBench to 83.9% on the Real -O2 split without sacrificing similarity to the original source code. We also find our automatic feedback methodology is highly effective for improving weaker neural decompilation models.

</details>


### [251] [A Research Agenda on Agents and Software Engineering: Outcomes from the Rio A2SE Seminar](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11720)
*Davide Taibi,Henry Muccini,Karthik Vaidhyanathan,Marcos Kalinowski,Michele Albano,Antonio Pedro Santos Alves,Renato Cerqueira,Mateus Devino,Matteo Esposito,Rodrigo Falcão,Vinicius Henning,Foutse Khomh,Valentina Lenarduzzi,Qinghua Lu,Matías Martínez,Henrique Mello,Daniel Mendez,Lucas Romao*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过A2SE研讨会，汇聚18位学术与工业界专家，识别出治理、代理的软件工程、软件架构代理、质量与评估、可持续性、代码六大主题领域，为AI代理时代的软件工程研究提供了社区驱动的研究议程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI代理的崛起正从两个交织方向重塑软件工程：代理越来越多地用于支持软件工程任务，而代理AI系统本身作为复杂系统需要重新思考现有软件工程实践。为绘制涵盖这两个方向的连贯研究议程，组织者举办了A2SE研讨会。

Method: 在里约热内卢组织A2SE研讨会，召集18位学术与工业界专家，通过结构化报告、协作主题聚类和聚焦小组讨论，识别六大主题领域并确定短期与长期研究优先级。

Result: 识别出六大主题领域：治理（Governance）、代理的软件工程（Software Engineering for Agents）、软件架构代理（Agents for Software Architecture）、质量与评估（Quality and Evaluation）、可持续性（Sustainability）和代码（Code），并为每个领域确定了短期和长期研究方向。

Conclusion: 本文提供了社区驱动的、有观点性的研究议程，为软件工程社区在这一关键时期协调努力提供了结构化基础。

Abstract: The rise of agentic AI is reshaping software engineering in two intertwined directions: agents are increasingly applied to support software engineering tasks, and Agentic AI systems themselves are complex systems that require re-thinking currently established software engineering practices. To chart a coherent research agenda covering the two directions, we organized the A2SE seminar in Rio de Janeiro, bringing together 18 experts from academia and industry. Through structured presentations, collaborative topic clustering, and focused group discussions, participants identified six thematic areas: Governance, Software Engineering for Agents, Agents for Software Architecture, Quality and Evaluation, Sustainability, and Code, and they prioritized short-term and long-term research directions for each. This paper presents the resulting community-driven, opinionated research agenda, offering the SE community a structured foundation for coordinating efforts at this critical juncture.

</details>


### [252] [Breaking the Dependency Chaos: A Constraint-Driven Python Dependency Resolution Strategy with Selective LLM Imputation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11772)
*Kowshik Chowdhury,Dipayan Banik,Shazibul Islam Shamim*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SMT-LLM，一种结合形式化约束求解（Z3 SMT求解器）与LLM的混合系统，用于解决Python生态中的依赖解析问题。相比纯LLM方法PLLM，SMT-LLM在HG2.9K基准上将解析成功率从54.8%提升至83.6%，中位时间从151.5秒降至23.9秒（快6.3倍），LLM调用次数从~24.9次降至2.26次（减少11倍）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Python生态中依赖解析是一个关键痛点，由于Python 2/3不兼容、包废弃以及元数据缺失等问题，构建失败频发。现有LLM方法（如PLLM）依赖LLM反复猜测版本并迭代修复，效率低下且成功率有限。

Method: SMT-LLM采用混合架构：1）通过AST分析进行确定性导入提取和Python版本检测；2）使用vermin工具推断最低Python版本；3）五层导入到包解析器（优先查询PyPI，最后才调用LLM）；4）基于PyPI元数据和LLM填补的缺失依赖构建约束图；5）使用Z3 SMT求解器求解一致的版本分配。

Result: 在HG2.9K基准上使用Gemma2:9B模型，SMT-LLM解析成功率为83.6%（PLLM为54.8%），中位解析时间23.9秒（PLLM为151.5秒，快6.3倍），平均每个代码片段仅需2.26次LLM调用（PLLM约24.9次，减少11倍）。

Conclusion: 将形式化约束求解与LLM相结合的方法在依赖解析任务上显著优于纯LLM方法，大幅降低了对LLM的依赖，同时提升了效率、速度和准确性。SMT-LLM展示了在软件工程任务中，符号推理与神经方法协同工作的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Dependency resolution is the task of selecting package versions that can be installed together without conflicts. It accounts for a significant share of build failures in modern software projects. In the Python ecosystem, this task is especially challenging due to Python 2/3 incompatibilities, deprecated packages, and widespread missing metadata. Recent work, such as PLLM, tackles this problem by using large language models (LLMs) to infer Python and package versions from code and iteratively repairing them based on build errors. We present SMT-LLM, a hybrid system that replaces LLM-only version guessing with formal constraint solving. SMT-LLM uses deterministic import extraction and Python version detection via abstract syntax tree (AST) analysis, the vermin tool to infer minimum Python versions, and a five-tier import-to-package resolver that queries PyPI before any LLM call. We construct a constraint graph from PyPI metadata and LLM-imputed dependencies for packages with missing metadata, then solve for consistent version assignments using a Z3 satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solver. On the HG2.9K benchmark using Gemma2:9B (10 GB VRAM), SMT-LLM resolves 83.6% of snippets compared to PLLM's 54.8%, while reducing median resolution time from 151.5 s to 23.9 s (6.3x faster) and average LLM calls from ~24.9 to 2.26 per snippet (11x reduction).

</details>


### [253] [An Extensive Replication Study of the ABLoTS Approach for Bug Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11790)
*Feifei Niu,Enshuo Zhang,Christoph Mayr-Dorn,Wesley Klewerton Guez Assunção,Liguo Huang,Jidong Ge,Bin Luo,Alexander Egyed*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文对ABLoTS方法进行了复现研究，发现其核心组件TraceScore在扩展数据集上表现良好甚至更优，但由于原始论文中错误选择截止日期导致测试数据泄漏到训练数据中，无法复现其原始结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估ABLoTS方法的可复现性及其在实际应用中的可靠性，特别是在原始数据集和扩展数据集上的表现。

Method: 在原始数据集（11个Java项目，8,494个bug报告）和两个扩展数据集（16个额外Java项目含25,893个bug报告，12个Python项目含1,289个bug报告）上复现ABLoTS方法。

Result: TraceScore组件在扩展数据集上表现可比甚至更优，但无法复现ABLoTS原始论文中的结果。

Conclusion: ABLoTS原始结果因数据泄漏（错误截止日期导致测试数据泄漏到训练数据）而不可靠，揭示了IRBL研究中数据划分正确性的重要性。

Abstract: Bug localization is the task of recommending source code locations (typically files) that contain the cause of a bug and hence need to be changed to fix the bug. Along these lines, information retrieval-based bug localization (IRBL) approaches have been adopted, which identify the most bug-prone files from the source code space. In current practice, a series of state-of-the-art IRBL techniques leverage the combination of different components (e.g., similar reports, version history, and code structure) to achieve better performance. ABLoTS is a recently proposed approach with the core component, TraceScore, that utilizes requirements and traceability information between different issue reports (i.e., feature requests and bug reports) to identify buggy source code snippets with promising results. To evaluate the accuracy of these results and obtain additional insights into the practical applicability of ABLoTS, we conducted a replication study of this approach with the original dataset and also on two extended datasets (i.e., additional Java dataset and Python dataset). The original dataset consists of 11 open source Java projects with 8,494 bug reports. The extended Java dataset includes 16 more projects comprising 25,893 bug reports and corresponding source code commits. The extended Python dataset consists of 12 projects with 1,289 bug reports. While we find that the TraceScore component, which is the core of ABLoTS, produces comparable or even better results with the extended datasets, we also find that we cannot reproduce the ABLoTS results, as reported in its original paper, due to an overlooked side effect of incorrectly choosing a cut-off date that led to test data leaking into training data with significant effects on performance.

</details>


### [254] [The Death Spiral of Open Source Projects: A Post-Mortem Analysis of Pull Request Workflow Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11844)
*Mohit Kaushik,Kuljit Kaur Chahal*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究首次大规模分析1,736个非活跃GitHub仓库及130万个PR的"死后"数据，发现PR工作流中的摩擦、审查延迟和负面评论是平台普遍现象；项目消亡存在"死亡螺旋"（创新下降、积压增长、合并延迟）；项目存活率主要由流行度和创新度决定，而非工作流效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: OSS项目存活率低，已有研究多关注宏观指标（提交活动、开发者流失、生态系统依赖），但微观层面的PR工作流动态被严重忽视。

Method: 采用混合方法量化设计，对1,736个非活跃GitHub仓库和130万个人工PR进行事后分析，包含比较描述性分析、演化分析和解释性建模三个维度。

Result: (1) 工作流摩擦、审查周期延长和负面惩罚是GitHub平台的普遍现象；(2) 发现"死亡螺旋"：创新率下降、积压指数增长、合并延迟上升，崩溃以沉默和脱离为特征；(3) 项目寿命由流行度和创新度等价值因素决定，而非工作流效率。

Conclusion: OSS死亡是一个社会技术现象，放弃和生态系统价值主导生存结果，PR层面的工作流纪律起次要作用。

Abstract: Open Source Software projects (OSS) are central to modern technology, yet their survival rates remain low. Prior research has examined project mortality through macro-level indicators such as commit activity, developer abandonment, and ecosystem dependencies, but the micro-level dynamics of the Pull Request (PR) workflow have been largely overlooked. This study provides the first large-scale post-mortem analysis of PR workflows across 1,736 inactive GitHub repositories and 1.3 million human-driven PRs. Using a mixed-method quantitative design, we investigate three dimensions of mortality. First, our comparative descriptive analysis shows that workflow friction, extended review cycles, and negativity penalties are endemic properties of the entire GitHub platform across both active and inactive projects. Rejected PRs consistently attract higher discussion and negativity regardless of project health. Second, our evolutionary analysis identifies a universal ``death spiral" marked by declining innovation rates, exponential backlog growth, rising merge latency. The collapse was defined by silence and disengagement. Labeling formalization remained endemic throughout the lifecycle, while toxicity did not intensify. Finally, our explanatory modeling demonstrates that project lifespan is not determined by workflow efficiency but by inherent value and ecosystem dynamics.
