Popularity and innovation emerge as strong positive predictors of survival, while friction, rejection rates, labeling formalization, and negativity scale with longevity as byproducts rather than causes of failure. Robustness checks across alternative inactivity thresholds confirm these findings. Together, this work reframes OSS mortality as a socio-technical phenomenon in which abandonment and ecosystem value dominate survival outcomes, while PR-level workflow discipline plays a secondary role.

</details>


### [255] [StepCodeReasoner: Aligning Code Reasoning with Stepwise Execution Traces via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11922)
*Hao Wang,Rui Li,Lei Sha,Jie M. Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出StepCodeReasoner框架，通过在代码中插入执行轨迹锚点进行中间状态监督，配合Bi-Level GRPO强化学习算法在两层分配信用，显著提升代码推理性能，7B模型超越GPT-4o和更大规模基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码推理方法仅监督最终输出，忽略中间执行状态，导致奖励篡改（reward hacking）问题——模型通过不一致的推理路径获得正确答案。缺乏对中间推理步骤的验证机制。

Method: 1) StepCodeReasoner：自动在代码中插入结构化的print-based执行轨迹锚点，将代码推理转化为可验证的逐步执行建模问题；2) Bi-Level GRPO：双层强化学习算法，在轨迹间（比较不同执行路径）和轨迹内（基于中间步骤对最终正确性的影响分配奖励）进行结构化信用分配。

Result: 7B模型在CRUXEval达91.1%，LiveCodeBench达86.5%，超越CodeReasoner-7B（86.0%/77.7%）和GPT-4o（85.6%/75.1%）；在REval执行轨迹基准上达82.9%，超越基线72.3%和GPT-4o 77.3%。代码生成能力也得到提升。

Conclusion: 显式的执行建模能够同时提升代码推理和代码生成性能，中间状态监督是解决代码推理中奖励篡改问题的有效手段。

Abstract: Existing code reasoning methods primarily supervise final code outputs, ignoring intermediate states, often leading to reward hacking where correct answers are obtained through inconsistent reasoning. We propose StepCodeReasoner, a framework that introduces explicit intermediate execution-state supervision. By automatically inserting structured print-based execution-trace anchors into code, the model is trained to predict runtime states at each step, transforming code reasoning into a verifiable, stepwise execution modeling problem. Building on this execution-aware method, we introduce Bi-Level GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm for structured credit assignment at two levels: inter-trajectory, comparing alternative execution paths, and intra-trajectory, rewarding intermediate accuracy based on its impact on downstream correctness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that StepCodeReasoner achieves SOTA performance in code reasoning. In particular, our 7B model achieves 91.1\% on CRUXEval and 86.5\% on LiveCodeBench, outperforming the CodeReasoner-7B baseline (86.0\% and 77.7\%) and GPT-4o (85.6\% and 75.1\%). Furthermore, on the execution-trace benchmark REval, our model scores 82.9\%, outperforming baseline CodeReasoner-7B (72.3\%), its 14B counterpart (81.1\%), and GPT-4o (77.3\%). Additionally, our approach also improves code generation performance, demonstrating that explicit execution modeling enhances both code reasoning and code generation.

</details>


### [256] [Property-Level Reconstructability of Agent Decisions: An Anchor-Level Pilot Across Vendor SDK Adapter Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12078)
*Oleg Solozobov*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出决策轨迹重建器（DTR），用于在跨六种商业AI代理SDK协议和两种比较列中，评估代理决策的可重建性。基于决策事件模式（DES）的七个属性，研究发现严格治理完备性从42.9%到85.7%不等，存在一个跨体制的共同缺口（推理轨迹）和四个依赖体制的缺口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的AI代理系统在运行时审计中缺乏统一的属性级评估框架，跨不同系统（如云代理、可观测性、工具使用、遥测和协议追踪）的失败无法在同一模式下进行评估，导致事后重建困难且缺少可比性。

Method: 使用决策轨迹重建器（DTR）对来自六个商业SDK体制的固定工作示例锚点进行分析，使用决策事件模式（DES）的七个属性进行分类（完全可填充、部分可填充、结构不可填充或不透明），并进行单注释者、每个单元一个锚点的描述性分析。

Result: 治理完备性分为三个等级（42.9%至85.7%），发现一个跨体制缺口（推理轨迹）、四个依赖体制的缺口和一个混合属性。不同体制间同一DES属性的可重建性已存在差异。

Conclusion: 当前AI代理系统在决策审计方面存在体制性差异和共同缺陷，推理轨迹的普遍缺失表明需要标准化的决策记录机制；结果可通过可验证的复现包确认。

Abstract: Agentic AI failures need post-hoc reconstruction: what the agent did, on whose authority, against which policy, and from what reasoning. Cross-regime feasibility remains unmeasured under one property-level schema. We apply the Decision Trace Reconstructor unmodified to pinned worked-example anchors from six public vendor SDK regimes spanning cloud-agent, observability, tool-use, telemetry, and protocol traces, plus two comparator columns. Each Decision Event Schema (DES) property is classified as fully fillable, partially fillable, structurally unfillable, or opaque. Per-property reconstructability of an agent decision already varies between regimes at this anchor scale. Strict-governance-completeness separates into three tiers ranging from 42.9% to 85.7%, yielding one regime-independent gap (reasoning trace), four regime-dependent gaps, and one Mixed property; the pilot is single-annotator, one anchor per cell, descriptive, with outputs checksum-verifiable from a deposited reproducibility package.

</details>


### [257] [HM-Req: A Framework for Embedding Values within CPS Human Monitoring Requirements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12100)
*Zoe Pfister,Ruth Breu,Michael Vierhauser*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了HM-Req框架，通过受控自然语言（CNL）定义人类监控需求，并整合利益相关者的价值观到Value Dashboard中，以检测和解决需求冲突，从而在CPS设计中更好地体现伦理原则和隐私考量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在信息物理系统（CPS）中，人类监控对安全高效的人机协作至关重要，但软件工程中常忽略人类价值观，导致需求中伦理和隐私问题未被充分捕捉；同时非结构化的自然语言需求存在歧义，难以解决价值观冲突。

Method: 提出HM-Req框架，包括：1）受控自然语言（CNL）用于形式化定义人类监控需求；2）将利益相关者的价值观增强到需求中；3）构建Value Dashboard可视化检测潜在价值观冲突。

Result: 通过在不同数据集上应用CNL、进行问卷调查和专家访谈，验证了CNL能捕获多样化的人类监控需求，且HM-Req对需求 elicitation 活动具有实用性。

Conclusion: HM-Req框架能有效捕捉人类监控需求中的价值观冲突，有助于在CPS设计早期阶段融入伦理和隐私考量，提升需求工程的系统性和透明度。

Abstract: Monitoring humans, for example, their movement or location, is essential for safe and efficient human-machine collaboration in Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS). This information allows CPS to ensure safety properties, adapt their behaviour dynamically, and coordinate with humans. To ensure that the design of a CPS respects ethical principles and the privacy of its stakeholders, system requirements, particularly those related to human monitoring, must reflect the human values of all involved stakeholders. However, human values are often underrepresented in Software Engineering -- particularly during requirements elicitation and system design, crucial phases when introducing ethically critical functionality. Stakeholder values are often implicit and conflicting, yet rarely systematically captured. Furthermore, unstructured natural language requirements introduce ambiguity and vagueness, complicating conflict resolution. To address these problems, we propose HM-Req, a novel requirements elicitation framework including a Controlled Natural Language (CNL) for defining human monitoring requirements. These requirements are then augmented with human values from relevant stakeholders and integrated into a Value Dashboard to detect potential conflicts that require further discussion and resolution. Validation results, applying the CNL to different datasets and conducting a survey and expert interview, confirms the CNL's ability to capture diverse human monitoring requirements and show HM-Req's usefulness for requirements elicitation activities.

</details>


### [258] [It's Not the Size: Harness Design Determines Operational Stability in Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12129)
*Yong-eun Cho*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文实验分析了小型语言模型（2-3B参数）在不同工程化程度下的操作性能。三种工程条件（纯模型、最小外壳、四阶段流水线）应用于三个模型，共24个任务。流水线工程在Gemma4 E2B上达到TSR=0.952和VTSR=1.000。发现最小外壳TSR低于纯模型的非单调现象。消融实验显示规划和恢复各贡献约24.7%的总增益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究工程化程度（harness engineering）对小型语言模型（SLMs）操作性能的影响，特别是在复杂格式要求下模型的行为表现。

Method: 对三个SLM模型（Gemma4 E2B、Qwen3.5:2B、LLaMA 3.2 3B）应用三种工程条件：纯模型（原始提示）、最小外壳（包装标签）、四阶段流水线（计划→执行→验证→恢复）。在24个任务上比较任务成功率（TSR）和有效任务成功率（VTSR），并进行消融实验。

Result: 流水线工程在Gemma4 E2B上达到TSR=0.952和VTSR=1.000；发现最小外壳TSR低于纯模型的非单调现象；LLaMA 3.2 3B纯模型下TSR=0.429，出现脚手架坍缩；消融显示规划和恢复各贡献约24.7%的总增益；VCR=0.625。

Conclusion: 工程化程度对SLM性能有显著影响，但并非单调递增；适当的流水线工程能显著提升性能；模型在复杂格式要求下可能出现脚手架坍缩现象；规划和恢复机制是关键增益来源。

Abstract: This paper experimentally analyzes how the level of harness engineering affects the operational performance of small language models (SLMs, 2-3B parameters). Three harness conditions - model-only (raw prompt), minimal-shell (wrapper tags), and a 4-stage pipeline (plan->execute->verify->recover) - are applied to three models (Gemma4 E2B, Qwen3.5:2B, LLaMA 3.2 3B) across 24 tasks, comparing Task Success Rate (TSR) and Valid TSR (VTSR). The pipeline harness achieves TSR=0.952 and VTSR=1.000 on Gemma4 E2B (T1-T5, 21 tasks). A non-monotonic phenomenon - minimal-shell TSR < model-only TSR - is observed in two models. In LLaMA 3.2 3B model-only, seven format violations yield TSR=0.429, revealing scaffold collapse: the model abandons JSON structure under complex format requirements without harness support. Ablation shows planning and recovery each contribute approximately 24.7% of total gain. VCR (Verification Catch Rate)=0.625 across all pipeline runs.

</details>


### [259] [CIDR: A Large-Scale Industrial Source Code Dataset for Software Engineering Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12153)
*Vladislav Savenkov*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了CIDR，一个通过与12家工业伙伴直接合作收集的2440个真实世界软件仓库的大规模数据集，包含138种编程语言、3.73亿行代码及结构化元数据，支持代码智能、软件质量分析、代码语言模型训练等研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码语料库主要来源于公开的开源平台，缺乏对专有生产代码库的覆盖，难以充分支持工业场景下的代码智能研究。

Method: 通过正式数据共享协议与12家工业伙伴合作收集代码；采用多阶段处理流水线，包括结构化伙伴接入、两阶段质量选择（自动元数据过滤+人工代码审查）、以及覆盖完整版本历史的确定性匿名化流程。

Result: 构建了包含2,440个仓库、138种编程语言、3.73亿行代码的数据集，覆盖企业Web/移动开发、金融科技、定制软件咨询等领域。

Conclusion: CIDR可用于代码智能、软件质量分析、代码语言模型预训练与微调、开发者行为研究及智能体评估基准构建等研究方向。

Abstract: We present Curated Industrial Developer Repository (CIDR), a large-scale dataset of real-world software repositories collected through direct collaboration with 12 industrial partner organizations. The dataset comprises 2,440 repositories spanning 138 programming languages and totalling 373 million lines of code, accompanied by structured per-repository metadata. Unlike existing code corpora derived from public open-source platforms, CIDR consists exclusively of proprietary production codebases contributed under formal data sharing agreements, covering application domains including enterprise web and mobile development, fintech, and custom software consultancy. All repositories were processed through a multi-stage pipeline encompassing structured partner onboarding, two-stage quality selection combining automated metadata filtering with manual code review, and a deterministic anonymization pipeline covering the full version control history. The dataset is intended to support research in code intelligence, software quality analysis, pre-training and fine-tuning of code language models, developer behaviour studies, and construction of agent evaluation benchmarks. Access is provided under a restricted commercial license; details are available at https://fermatix.ai/#Contact.

</details>


### [260] [ReproBreak: A Dataset of Reproducible Web Locator Breaks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12158)
*Thiago Santos de Moura,Leon Adamietz,Samra Mehboob,Yannic Noller*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了ReproBreak，一个包含449个可复现的Web GUI测试定位器断裂问题的数据集，基于对359个开源仓库的分析构建，旨在支持定位器脆弱性、修复技术和测试鲁棒性的研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动化GUI测试框架（如Cypress和Playwright）依赖定位器来查找和交互Web元素，但定位器断裂（locator break）会导致测试在功能未变化时失效。然而，目前缺乏用于评估Cypress和Playwright中定位器脆弱性的大规模数据集。

Method: 分析了359个开源仓库，识别包含定位器变更的提交；在定位器变更数量最多的4个项目中复现确认了449个定位器断裂，并提供了自动化复现脚本。

Result: 构建了ReproBreak数据集，包含449个可复现的定位器断裂案例，并提供了自动化复现脚本和相关资源链接。

Conclusion: ReproBreak可作为有价值的资源，支持定位器脆弱性分析、修复技术和测试鲁棒性等研究方向。

Abstract: Automated GUI testing frameworks such as Cypress and Playwright rely on locators to find and interact with web elements. A locator break occurs when a structural change in the application under test causes a locator to no longer find its target element, resulting in test breakages even when the underlying functionality remains unchanged. Despite its impact on test maintenance, no dataset exists to evaluate locator fragility in Cypress and Playwright at scale. In this paper, we present ReproBreak, a dataset of reproducible locator breaks in web application GUI tests. We analyzed 359 open-source repositories to identify commits that contain locator changes. To confirm whether these changes are indeed locator breaks, we reproduced them in the top 4 projects with the largest number of locator changes and found 449 locator breaks, which are provided in the dataset along with scripts for automated reproduction. We believe ReproBreak serves as a valuable artifact to support research on locator fragility, repair techniques, and test robustness. The video is available at: https://youtu.be/mZByS_TnCvE. The dataset is at https://github.com/rub-sq/ReproBreak.

</details>


### [261] [Uncertainty Quantification for LLM-based Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12201)
*Senrong Xu,Yuhao Tan,Yanke Zhou,Guangyuan Wu,Zenan Li,Yuan Yao,Taolue Chen,Feng Xu,Xiaoxing Ma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出RisCoSet方法，利用多重假设检验为LLM代码生成构建风险可控的预测集（部分程序），在保证高置信度包含正确解的同时，最多减少24.5%的代码移除量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PAC预测集方法存在强单调性假设和单标签分类框架的限制，无法处理代码生成中多个有效输出的问题，亟需更灵活的风险控制方法。

Method: 基于多重假设检验构建风险可控的预测集，以部分程序形式表示，确保高概率包含正确解。

Result: 在三个LLM上实验，相比SOTA方法，在相同风险水平下代码移除量减少高达24.5%。

Conclusion: RisCoSet有效克服了现有方法的局限，为LLM代码生成提供了更高效、更灵活的不确定性量化方案。

Abstract: Prediction sets provide a theoretically grounded framework for quantifying uncertainty in machine learning models. Adapting them to structured generation tasks, in particular, large language model (LLM) based code generation, remains a challenging problem. An existing attempt proposes PAC prediction sets but is limited by its strong monotonicity assumption on risk and single-label classification framework, which severely limits the space of candidate programs and cannot accommodate the multiple valid outputs inherent to code generation. To address these limitations, we propose an approach RisCoSet that leverages multiple hypothesis testing to construct risk-controlling predictions for LLM-based code generation. Given a trained code generation model, we produce a prediction set represented by a partial program, which is guaranteed to contain a correct solution with high confidence. Extensive experiments on three LLMs demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. For instance, compared with the state-of-the-art, our method can significantly reduce the code removal by up to 24.5%, at the same level of risk.

</details>


### [262] [Characterizing the Failure Modes of LLMs in Resolving Real-World GitHub Issues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12270)
*Yanjie Jiang,Yian Huang,Guancheng Wang,Junjie Chen,Hui Liu,Lionel Briand*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文评估了三种前沿LLM（Claude 4.5 Sonnet、Gemini 3 Pro、GPT-5）在SWE-bench Verified数据集上解决真实GitHub问题的表现，通过对900次尝试中243次失败的手动分析，构建了统一失败分类法，发现策略制定与逻辑合成是最易出错的阶段，而故障定位失败率最低，并提出了缓解失败的可行策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管LLM越来越多地被用于解决真实的GitHub问题，但其在复杂修复任务中的具体失败模式尚未被充分理解，亟需系统性地刻画LLM行为与人类开发者实践之间的差异。

Method: 在SWE-bench Verified数据集上评估Claude 4.5 Sonnet、Gemini 3 Pro、GPT-5三种模型，对900次总尝试中的243次失败进行了严格的手动分析，从症状和根本原因两个维度进行归类，构建了包含五个阶段的统一失败分类法。

Result: （1）构建了涵盖修复流水线五个阶段的统一失败分类法；（2）策略制定与逻辑合成是最易出错的阶段，其次是问题理解，而故障定位失败率最低；（3）不同模型在鲁棒性和操作成本（尤其失败场景下）存在显著差异；（4）现有评估工具偶尔因表面差异或隐藏约束误判正确补丁。

Conclusion: LLM可能在故障定位这一传统上被认为是自动程序修复中最艰巨的挑战上表现出色，但策略制定和逻辑合成仍需改进。研究结果为提高LLM问题解决的有效性和可靠性提供了有前景的方向。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed to resolve real-world GitHub issues. However, despite their potential, the specific failure modes of these models in complex repair tasks remain poorly understood. To characterize how LLM behavior diverges from human developer practices, this paper evaluates three state-of-the-art models, i.e., Claude 4.5 Sonnet, Gemini 3 Pro, and GPT-5, on the SWE-bench Verified dataset. We conduct a rigorous manual analysis of the symptoms and root causes underlying 243 failed attempts across 900 total trials. Our investigation first yields a unified failure taxonomy encompassing five distinct stages of the repair pipeline, within which we categorize typical failure symptoms and their prevalence. Secondly, our findings reveal that for all evaluated LLMs, strategy formulation and logic synthesis constitutes the most error-prone stage, followed by problem understanding, whereas localization exhibits the lowest failure rate. This suggests that LLMs may excel at fault localization, a task traditionally regarded as one of the most formidable challenges in automated program repair. Furthermore, we observe that robustness and operational costs (particularly in failure scenarios) vary significantly across different models. Finally, we uncover the root causes of these failures and propose actionable strategies to mitigate them. A particularly notable finding is that existing evaluation harnesses occasionally misjudge correct patches due to superficial discrepancies or hidden constraints. Collectively, our insights may provide promising directions for enhancing the effectiveness and reliability of LLM-based issue resolution.

</details>


### [263] [Minimalistic Terminal Editor for Julia Programming -- MinTEJ: A Friendly Approach for a Scientific Programmer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12275)
*Poornachandratejasvi Laxman Bhattar,Payal V. Dahiwale,Krishnarjunulu Thota,Anurag Sharma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了MinTEJ，一个基于Julia语言构建的终端编辑器，以及SMIA架构。该架构通过统一的命令驱动工作流整合文件管理、代码编辑、执行和调试功能，并以缓冲区为核心数据结构贯穿所有模式。实验表明，与VS Code和Notepad++相比，MinTEJ在内存和CPU资源消耗上更低，是一种轻量级的高效迭代开发工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具在Julia编程语言环境中缺乏对编辑、执行、文件管理和调试等集成工作流的统一支持，开发者频繁面临上下文切换开销和碎片化的工具交互问题。

Method: 提出了MinTEJ终端编辑器及SMIA架构。SMIA采用命令驱动的工作流，以缓冲区作为跨模式的核心数据结构，每个模式按特定规则解释和操作缓冲区，中央控制器负责协调缓冲区访问并强制模式间的顺序转换。

Result: 通过性能基准测试，将MinTEJ与VS Code和Notepad++对比，结果显示MinTEJ在内存消耗和CPU利用率上资源开销更低。

Conclusion: 集成的终端编辑器环境是一种实用的轻量级软件工具，能够支持高效的迭代开发。

Abstract: Developers rely on lightweight, terminal-centric workflows for rapid code iteration. However, within a unified environment for Julia programming language, existing tools provide limited support for integrated workflow such as editing, execution, file management, and debugging. As a result, developers frequently incur context-switching overhead and fragmented tool interactions. Therefore, the proposed work predominantly focuses on the minimalistic approach for developing native terminal editor for Julia programming language. This paper introduces MinTEJ, a terminal-based editor built in Julia, and proposes a Sequential Modal Interaction Architecture (SMIA) that unifies file management, code editing, execution, and debugging through a command-oriented workflow. The presented work formalizes model interaction and reduces cognitive load & errors while transitioning among different modes. In SMIA, buffer is the central data structure that persists across all modes. Each mode interprets and manipulates the buffer according to mode-specific rules. The central controller mediates access to the buffer and enforces sequential transitions between modes. To evaluate the approach, the performance benchmarking of MinTEJ is compared against existing tools i.e., VS code and Notepad++. The effectiveness of the proposed MinTEJ is evaluated based on memory consumption and CPU utilization demonstrating that it has less resource overhead. Findings suggest that integrated terminal-based editor environment is a practical lightweight software tool enabling efficient iterative development.

</details>


### [264] [Iterative Audit Convergence in LLM-Managed Multi-Agent Systems: A Case Study in Prompt Engineering Quality Assurance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12280)
*Elias Calboreanu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过一个生产级七通道编排系统AEGIS的案例研究，展示了由Claude子代理执行的九轮迭代审计，在约7150行提示规范中发现了51个一致性问题，并提出了一套七类别缺陷分类法和审计协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体LLM系统的提示规范承载了跨多个相互依赖文件的数据契约和集成逻辑，但很少受到结构化检查。作者希望填补这一空白，为提示规范的审计提供系统化方法。

Method: 采用单一系统实证案例研究方法，针对AEGIS系统的7150行提示规范（6907行七通道PROMPT.md文件 + 245行共享票据契约），由Claude子代理使用基于Weinberg和Freedman改编的检查表驱动走查法，执行九轮顺序审计。

Result: 共发现51个提示规范一致性缺陷（区别于同行预印本中51个STRIDE分类的对抗性代码发现），各轮次发现数分别为：15、8、12、2、8、1、4、1、0。提出了七类别事后缺陷分类法及显式编码规则，观察到与非单调收敛一致的模式。

Conclusion: 单文件审查会遗漏只有后期扩展范围的审计轮次才能发现的缺陷类别。相同的LLM家族同时编写和审计了规范，需要不同模型和人类评审者的复制实验才能推广结论。

Abstract: Prompt specifications for multi-agent large language model (LLM) systems carry data contracts and integration logic across many interdependent files but are rarely subjected to structured-inspection rigor. This paper reports a single-system empirical case study of iterative, agent-driven auditing applied to AEGIS (Autonomous Engineering Governance and Intelligence System), a production seven-lane orchestration pipeline whose prompt-specification surface comprises approximately 7150 lines: 6907 across seven lane PROMPT.md files and a 245-line shared Ticket Contract. Nine sequential audit rounds, executed by Claude sub-agents using a checklist-driven walkthrough adapted from Weinberg and Freedman, surfaced 51 prompt-specification consistency defects, distinct from the 51 STRIDE-categorized adversarial code findings reported in the companion preprint. Per-round counts were 15, 8, 12, 2, 8, 1, 4, 1, and 0. We report a seven-category post-hoc defect taxonomy with explicit coding rules, observed non-monotonic convergence consistent with cascading edits and audit-scope expansion, and an audit protocol distilled from the study, with the final locked checklist released as a reproducibility appendix. Single-file review missed defect classes that were surfaced only by later expanded-scope rounds in this system. The same LLM family authored and audited the specifications; replication with dissimilar models and human reviewers is required before generalization.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [265] [Mechanism Design for Quality-Preserving LLM Advertising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10964)
*Jiale Han,Xiaowu Dai*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于检索增强生成（RAG）的质量保留拍卖框架，通过在机制设计中显式融入内容保真度，实现在不损害输出质量的前提下进行LLM广告变现，实验表明该方法在收入和质量指标上均优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM广告方法忽略收入优化与内容质量之间的根本矛盾，常常强制插入不相关广告，损害用户体验。

Method: 提出质量保留拍卖框架：(1)基于RAG，将有机内容作为参考；(2)推导内生保留价，筛选边际社会福利贡献非正的广告；(3)提出KL正则化的单分配机制（Myerson支付）和筛选VCG多分配机制，两者均满足占优策略激励相容和个体理性。

Result: 实验结果表明，所提机制在每广告收入和与无广告响应的语义相似度等指标上优于现有基线。

Conclusion: 建立了LLM广告的新范式，实现了在不损害输出质量的前提下进行货币化。

Abstract: Embedding advertisements into large language model (LLM) outputs introduces a fundamental tension: revenue optimization can distort content and degrade user experience. Existing approaches largely ignore this trade-off, often forcing irrelevant ads into responses. We propose a quality-preserving auction framework that explicitly integrates content fidelity into the mechanism design. Built on retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), our approach treats organic content as a reference and derives an endogenous reserve price that screens out ads with non-positive marginal social welfare contributions. We develop a KL-regularized single-allocation mechanism with Myerson payments and a screened VCG multi-allocation mechanism, both satisfying dominant-strategy incentive compatibility and individual rationality. Experiments across diverse scenarios demonstrate that our mechanisms outperform existing baselines in metrics such as revenue per ad and semantic similarity to no-ad responses. Our results establish a new paradigm for LLM advertising that enables monetization without compromising output quality.

</details>


### [266] [Towards Model-Free Learning in Dynamic Population Games: An Application to Karma Economies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11042)
*Matteo Cederle,Saverio Bolognani,Gian Antonio Susto*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了Karma动态种群博弈中的无模型均衡学习问题，首次证明了当新加入代理使用DQN学习时，策略次优性受DQN近似误差O(1/√Ns)和平均场扰动误差O(1/N)约束；对于从零学习SNE的问题，提出结合深度强化学习、虚构博弈和平滑策略迭代的方法，使代理能以无模型方式收敛到接近集中式计算的SNE配置。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有DPG计算工具假设完全知晓博弈模型并以集中式方式运行，限制了其在真实场景中的应用——在现实中，智能体只能访问自身的私有经验，无法获知全局模型信息。

Method: 1) 针对新加入代理在已有SNE的Karma DPG中学习的情况，采用Deep Q-Networks (DQN)进行无模型学习，并利用DQN收敛理论推导次优性界；2) 针对从零学习SNE的困难问题，提出将深度强化学习与虚构博弈(fictitious play)及平滑策略迭代(smoothed policy iteration)相结合的无模型方法。

Result: 建立了由两项误差组成的次优性界：DQN近似误差O(1/√Ns)和平均场扰动误差O(1/N)；经验性实验表明，结合DRL、虚构博弈和平滑策略迭代的方法能使代理以无模型方式收敛到接近集中式计算的SNE。

Conclusion: 这些贡献支持了Karma经济作为公平资源分配实用工具的愿景，为DPG从理论走向实际应用迈出了关键一步。

Abstract: Dynamic Population Games (DPGs) provide a tractable framework for modeling strategic interactions in large populations of self-interested agents, and have been successfully applied to the design of Karma economies, a class of fair non-monetary resource allocation mechanisms. Despite their appealing theoretical properties, existing computational tools for DPGs assume full knowledge of the game model and operate in a centralized fashion, limiting their applicability in realistic settings where agents have access only to their own private experience. This paper takes a step towards addressing this gap by studying model-free equilibrium learning in Karma DPGs. First, we analyze the setting in which a novel agent joins a Karma DPG already at its Stationary Nash Equilibrium (SNE) and learns a policy via Deep Q-Networks (DQN) without knowledge of the game model. Leveraging recent convergence results for DQN, we establish a suboptimality bound consisting of a DQN approximation error of order $O(1/\sqrt{N_s})$ and a mean field perturbation error of order $O(1/N)$, where $N_s$ is the replay buffer size and $N$ is the population size. Second, we consider the challenging problem of learning the SNE from scratch. We show empirically that combining deep RL with fictitious play and smoothed policy iteration allows agents to converge, in a model-free fashion, to a configuration close to the centrally computed SNE. Together, these contributions support the vision of Karma economies as practical tools for fair resource allocation.

</details>


### [267] [The Price of Proportional Representation in Temporal Voting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11157)
*Nicholas Teh*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究时间投票模型中，强制执行比例代表制（如JR及其变体）所带来的社会福利效率损失。发现JR的福利损失随时间推移渐近消失，而更强公理的冲突持续存在；同时证明了各公理下的福利最大化问题是NP完全的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作大量研究了时间投票中比例代表制公理（如JR）的适配与验证，但对其与社会福利之间的冲突缺乏量化理解。本文旨在揭示为了保证比例性需要付出多少效率代价。

Method: 通过最坏情况比率（最大可达功利福利与受比例性公理约束的最大福利之比）来形式化福利-比例性张力；进行公理间的分离分析；并证明各公理下福利最大化的计算复杂性（NP完备性、APX困难性），同时提出固定参数算法。

Result: （1）施加比例代表制会导致随选民数或轮数增长而增大但亚线性的福利损失；（2）JR的福利损失随时间渐近消失，而更强公理的冲突持续存在；（3）各公理下的福利最大化是NP完全的且APX困难的，但在某些结构参数下存在固定参数算法。

Conclusion: 时间投票中比例代表制与社会福利之间存在本质张力，但JR提供了较强的效率保证（渐近无损失）；更强的比例性公理则存在持续的效率代价；计算上，相应优化问题固有难解性，但可通过结构参数获得可解性。

Abstract: We study proportional representation in the temporal voting model, where collective decisions are made repeatedly over time over a fixed horizon. Prior work has extensively investigated how proportional representation axioms from multiwinner voting (e.g., justified representation (JR) and its variants) can be adapted, satisfied, and verified in this setting. However, much less is understood about their interaction with social welfare. In this work, we quantify the efficiency cost of enforcing proportionality. We formalize the welfare-proportionality tension via the worst-case ratio between the maximum achievable utilitarian welfare and the maximum welfare attainable subject to a proportionality axiom. We show that imposing proportional representation in the temporal setting can incur a growing, yet sublinear, welfare loss as the number of voters or rounds increases. We further identify a clean separation among axioms: for JR, the welfare loss diminishes as the time horizon grows and vanishes asymptotically, whereas for stronger axioms this conflict persists even with many rounds. Moreover, we prove that welfare maximization under each axiom is NP-complete and APX-hard, even under static preferences and bounded-degree approvals, and provide fixed-parameter algorithms under several natural structural parameters.

</details>


### [268] [When to Ask a Question: Understanding Communication Strategies in Generative AI Tools](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11240)
*Charlotte Park,Kate Donahue,Manish Raghavan*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了生成式AI中用户偏好推断与主动信息征询之间的权衡，提出了一个理论模型来分析最优信息征询量，表明适当的信息征询可以减少推断偏差，在效率和公平性之间取得平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI模型允许用户灵活输入，但模型在填补缺失信息时可能偏向多数派观点，损害具有非典型偏好的用户的公平性。现有研究较少探讨如何通过主动信息征询来缓解这一问题。

Method: 构建了一个用户与LLM交互的简化理论模型，设计了包含用户负担和偏好表征的优化目标，基于偏好相关性分析，刻画了在内容生成前最优的信息征询量。

Result: 理论结果表明，信息征询可以有效缓解偏好推断的系统性偏差；实证评估验证了模型预测并展示了其实际意义。

Conclusion: 适当的信息征询能够在保持效率的同时，更好地融入多样化的用户视角，实现更公平的生成式AI设计。

Abstract: Generative AI models differ from traditional machine learning tools in that they allow users to provide as much or as little information as they choose in their inputs. This flexibility often leads users to omit certain details, relying on the models to infer and fill in under-specified information based on distributional knowledge of user preferences. Such inferences may privilege majority viewpoints and disadvantage users with atypical preferences, raising concerns about fairness. Unlike more traditional recommender systems, LLMs can explicitly solicit more information from users through natural language. However, while directly eliciting user preferences could increase personalization and mitigate inequality, excessive querying places a burden on users who value efficiency. We develop a stylized model of user-LLM interaction and develop an objective that captures tradeoff between user burden and preference representation. Building on the observation that individual preferences are often correlated, we analyze how AI systems should balance inference and elicitation, characterizing the optimal amount of information to solicit before content generation. Ultimately, we show that information elicitation can mitigate the systematic biases of preference inference, enabling the design of generative tools that better incorporate diverse user perspectives while maintaining efficiency. We complement this theoretical analysis with an empirical evaluation illustrating the model's predictions and exploring their practical implications.

</details>


### [269] [Optimal Interventions on the Linear Threshold Model in Large-Scale Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11337)
*Leonardo Cianfanelli,Sebastiano Messina,Giacomo Como,Fabio Fagnani*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究线性阈值模型下的最优干预问题，基于局部平均场近似将问题转化为线性规划，并在仅知网络统计信息的情况下求解近似干预策略，数值实验验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有线性阈值模型的最优干预问题是NP难的，且精确解需要完整的网络结构信息，但在大规模网络中难以实现。因此需要一种仅依赖网络统计信息的近似求解方法。

Method: 基于局部平均场近似将最优干预问题转化为具有无穷约束的线性规划，再进一步近似为有限约束的标准线性规划问题来求解。

Result: 在真实世界网络上的数值实验验证了所提方法的有效性，并与最优种子选择和最低成本影响算法进行了比较。

Conclusion: 本文提出的基于平均场近似的线性规划方法能在仅知网络统计信息的情况下有效求解大规模网络上的最优干预问题。

Abstract: We study an optimal intervention problem on the linear threshold model (LTM) in which a social planner aims to design minimal-cost interventions that modify the agents' thresholds, under the constraint that at least a predefined fraction of agents reaches a given state after a finite number of iterations. While this problem is known to be NP-hard and its exact solution requires full knowledge of the network structure, we focus on approximate solutions for large-scale networks and assume that the planner has only statistical knowledge of the network. In particular, we build on a local mean-field approximation of the LTM that is known to hold true on large-scale random networks, and reformulate the optimal intervention problem as a linear program with an infinite set of constraints. We then show how to approximate the solutions of the latter problem by standard linear programs with finitely many constraints. Finally, our approach is validated through numerical experiments on real-world networks and compared both with optimal seeding and state-of-the-art algorithms for the least-cost influence.

</details>


### [270] [Human-AI Productivity Paradoxes: Modeling the Interplay of Skill, Effort, and AI Assistance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11350)
*Ali Aouad,Thodoris Lykouris,Huiying Zhong*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文通过构建人类-AI交互模型，发现当考虑技能发展的内生性或AI不可靠性时，AI辅助增加反而可能导致生产力下降（生产力悖论），并且在考虑AI素养异质性时，长期会出现技能极化现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对AI提升生产力的实证证据存在矛盾，作者希望从理论层面解释为什么AI辅助并不总是提升生产力，以及AI对技能分布的长期影响。

Method: 构建了一个人类-AI交互的理论模型：异质性技能水平的代理人通过效用最大化决策投入努力，在AI辅助下完成任务。模型中引入技能发展的内生性、AI不可靠性以及AI素养（识别和适应AI错误的能力）的异质性。

Result: (1) 技能内生性或AI不可靠性均可导致"生产力悖论"——AI辅助增强反而降低生产力；(2) 长期稳态下，AI素养的异质性会导致技能极化（skill polarization）。

Conclusion: 揭示了人类-AI交互中生产力悖论和技能极化的多种机制，并提出了刻画这些现象出现的简单度量指标。

Abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools are rapidly adopted in the workplace and in education, yet the empirical evidence on AI's impact remains mixed. We propose a model of human-AI interaction to better understand and analyze several mechanisms by which AI affects productivity. In our setup, human agents with varying skill levels exert utility-maximizing effort to produce certain task outcomes with AI assistance. We find that incorporating either endogeneity in skill development or in AI unreliability can induce a productivity paradox: increased levels of AI assistance may degrade productivity, leading to potentially significant shortfalls. Moreover, we examine the long-term distributional effect of AI on skill, and demonstrate that skill polarization can emerge in steady state when accounting for heterogeneity in AI literacy -- the agent's capability to identify and adapt to inaccurate AI outputs. Our results elucidate several mechanisms that may explain the emergence of human-AI productivity paradoxes and skill polarization, and identify simple measures that characterize when they arise.

</details>


### [271] [Approximate Strategyproofness in Approval-based Budget Division](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11736)
*Haris Aziz,Patrick Lederer,Jeremy Vollen*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究批准制预算分配中的近似策略真实性，证明纳什乘积规则（NASH）的激励比率为2，在放松策略真实性条件下绕过了Brandl等人提出的不可能性定理，并证明该比率在给定公平与效率约束下是最优的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Brandl等人[2021]证明了在批准制预算分配中，不存在同时满足策略真实性、效率和公平的分配规则。本文希望绕过这一不可能性定理，通过放松策略真实性要求，寻找近似策略真实的可行方案。

Method: 引入激励比率（incentive ratio）概念来衡量分配规则的近似策略真实性程度，从理论上分析多个经典规则的激励比率，并重点证明纳什乘积规则（NASH）的激励比率为2；同时证明该比率在给定公平与效率条件下是最优的，并将结果推广至凹效用函数场景。

Result: 经典分配规则的激励比率较大（即易受操纵），而纳什乘积规则的激励比率为2；在NASH满足的某些公平与效率性质下，激励比率2是最优的；该结果在选民报告任意凹效用函数时依然成立。

Conclusion: 通过放宽策略真实性要求，纳什乘积规则可以绕过不可能性定理，实现可接受的近似策略真实性（激励比率2），并辅以实验分析验证理论结果。

Abstract: In approval-based budget division, the task is to allocate a divisible resource to the candidates based on the voters' approval preferences over the candidates. For this setting, Brandl et al. [2021] have shown that no distribution rule can be strategyproof, efficient, and fair at the same time. In this paper, we aim to circumvent this impossibility theorem by focusing on approximate strategyproofness. To this end, we analyze the incentive ratio of distribution rules, which quantifies the maximum multiplicative utility gain of a voter by manipulating. While it turns out that several classical rules have a large incentive ratio, we prove that the Nash product rule ($\mathsf{NASH}$) has an incentive ratio of $2$, thereby demonstrating that we can bypass the impossibility of Brandl et al. by relaxing strategyproofness. Moreover, we show that an incentive ratio of $2$ is optimal subject to some of the fairness and efficiency properties of $\mathsf{NASH}$, and that the positive result for the Nash product rule even holds when voters may report arbitrary concave utility functions. Finally, we complement our results with an experimental analysis.

</details>


### [272] [Position Auctions with a Capacity Constraint](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12040)
*Eleni Batziou,Georgios Birmpas,Georgios Chionas,Piotr Krysta*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了带有容量约束的位置拍卖匹配问题，提出了一种超越贪心算法的近似机制，并证明了其在单参数代理和位置依赖点击率下的真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代广告形式中广告具有异构大小，平台需在全局空间约束下联合选择并分配广告子集，经典位置拍卖模型（固定槽位分配）已不适用。

Method: 将问题建模为带容量约束的匹配问题，提出基于密度排序结合容量感知局部改进的分配规则，并进行微小修改实现通用真实性随机机制。

Result: 算法在容量约束下实现常数因子近似保证；修改后得到首个真实常数近似机制。

Conclusion: 该机制是首个针对此容量约束匹配变体的真实常数近似机制。

Abstract: Sponsored search auctions are commonly modeled as an assignment of a fixed set of slots (positions) to a set of advertisers, with welfare maximization being reducible to a standard matching problem. Motivated by modern ad formats, we study a richer variant of the classical position auctions model, in which ads have heterogeneous sizes and the platform must jointly select and assign a subset of ads to positions subject to a global space constraint. We formulate this as a matching problem with a capacity constraint, and propose an algorithmic technique that goes beyond simple greedy methods while achieving constant factor approximation guarantees. Our allocation rule augments density-based ordering with capacity-aware local improvements, which allow for re-allocations that improve welfare, while respecting the capacity constraint.
  Applied in the context of position auctions, we analyze this mechanism under the assumption of single-parameter agents and position-dependent click-through-rates (CTRs). We show that a minor modification to our approach yields a universally truthful randomized mechanism with a constant factor approximation guarantee. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first truthful constant-approximation mechanism for this variant of capacity-constrained matching.

</details>


### [273] [Bayesian Persuasion with a Risk-Conscious Receiver](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12094)
*Yujing Chen*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究当接收者使用条件风险价值(CVaR)而非期望效用评估行动时，贝叶斯说服的复杂性。CVaR偏好破坏了标准的行动直接推荐简化，但通过细化推荐和主动面揭示原理，可在有限状态模型中通过多项式规模线性规划精确求解。同时揭示了表示边界：列出的多面体风险仍可处理，而简洁表示的面族使精确说服成为NP难问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的贝叶斯说服假设接收者使用期望效用评估行动，但现实中决策者常关注尾部风险。CVaR作为广泛使用的风险度量，其引入会破坏标准简化方法，需要重新审视说服问题的可解性边界。

Method: 提出主动面揭示原理(active-facet revelation principle)，将每个CVaR行动值表示为后验的最大仿射函数，通过细化推荐至活跃仿射片段，构建精确的多项式规模线性规划。

Result: CVaR偏好下的贝叶斯说服在有限状态模型中可通过多项式规模线性规划精确求解；但若风险偏好由简洁表示的面族定义，精确说服变为NP难问题；对于有限稳定后验统计量决定的风险偏好，给出了有限精度近似方案。

Conclusion: CVaR偏好虽破坏标准简化，但并未使问题不可解，存在明确的表示边界区分可解与难解情形，为风险规避下的信息设计提供了理论框架。

Abstract: We study Bayesian persuasion when the receiver evaluates actions by reward-side Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) rather than expected utility. CVaR preferences break the standard action-based direct-recommendation reduction: merging signals that recommend the same action can change the receiver's tail-risk ranking and destroy incentive compatibility. We show that this failure does not imply intractability in the explicit finite-state model. Each CVaR action value is max-affine in the posterior, and refining recommendations by the active affine piece yields an active-facet revelation principle and an exact polynomial-size linear program. We further identify a representation boundary: listed polyhedral risks remain tractable by the same LP, whereas succinctly represented facet families make exact persuasion NP-hard. Finally, we give a finite-precision approximation scheme for risk preferences determined by finitely many stable posterior statistics.

</details>


### [274] [Sure-almost-sure and Sure-limit-sure Window Mean Payoff in Markov Decision Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12191)
*Pranshu Gaba,Shibashis Guha*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究了马尔可夫决策过程中窗口平均收益目标的"必然-几乎必然"和"必然-极限必然"问题，证明了固定变体（ℓ以一元给出）在P中，有界变体在NP ∩ coNP中，并给出了策略记忆需求的界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在MDP中，同时保证路径的确定性下界（α）和概率性下界（β）是一个重要但未充分研究的问题。窗口平均收益目标作为标准平均收益目标的强化版（要求滑动窗口的平均收益超过阈值），其多目标同时满足问题尚未解决。

Method: 针对固定窗口长度变体（ℓ给定）和有界窗口长度变体（长度有界但不给定），分别建立了"必然-几乎必然"和"必然-极限必然"问题的形式化框架。通过分析这两种目标下的策略结构，给出了计算复杂性的归约和证明，并分析了获胜策略所需的内存大小。

Result: 固定窗口变体（ℓ以一元形式给出）的必然-几乎必然和必然-极限必然问题均在P中；有界窗口变体则在NP ∩ coNP中。这一复杂性结果与将这些目标单独考虑时的计算复杂性相匹配。同时给出了各问题获胜策略的内存需求上界。

Conclusion: 本文完整地刻画了窗口平均收益目标下必然-几乎必然和必然-极限必然问题的计算复杂性，表明这些多目标问题的解决并未增加额外的计算难度，且为实际应用中策略的设计提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Given rationals $α$ and $β$, the sure-almost-sure problem for a quantitative objective $\varphi$ in a Markov decision process (MDP) asks if one can simultaneously ensure that all outcomes of the MDP have $\varphi$-value at least $α$ (i.e. sure $α$ satisfaction) and with probability $1$ the outcome has $\varphi$-value at least $β$ (i.e. almost-sure $β$ satisfaction). The sure-limit-sure problem asks if for all $\varepsilon > 0$ one can simultaneously ensure that all outcomes have $\varphi$-value at least $α$ and with probability at least $1 - \varepsilon$ the outcome has $\varphi$-value at least $β$. Moreover, if simultaneous satisfaction of objectives is possible, then one would also like to construct a strategy (for sure-almost-sure) or a family of strategies (for sure-limit-sure) that achieves this.
  In this paper, we solve the sure-almost-sure and sure-limit-sure problems for window mean-payoff objectives. The window mean-payoff objective strengthens the standard mean-payoff objective by requiring that the average payoff of a finite window that slides over an infinite run be greater than a given threshold. We study two variants of window mean payoff: in the fixed variant, the window length $\ell$ is given, while in the bounded variant, the length is not given but is required to be bounded throughout the run. We show that the sure-almost-sure problem and the sure-limit-sure problem are both in P for the fixed variant (if $\ell$ is given in unary) and are both in NP $\cap$ coNP for the bounded variant, matching the computational complexity of sure satisfaction and almost-sure satisfaction when considered separately for these objectives. We also give bounds for the memory requirement of winning strategies for all considered problems.

</details>


### [275] [Social Welfare under Heterogeneous Time Preferences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12251)
*Sarvin Bahmani,Soumyajit Paul,Sven Schewe,Shadi Tasdighi Kalat,Ashutosh Trivedi*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究多主体在马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中具有异质性时间偏好的决策问题。作者提出了一个基于功利主义社会福利的优化框架，证明最优策略不再是位置性的（positional），但仍具有结构简单性（纯有限内存计数策略），并且可以在多项式时间内合成。同时，限制为位置性最优策略的阈值判定问题是NP难的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源分配、气候政策、AI对齐等关键决策场景中，多个主体（principals）在同一环境中交互，但现有研究大多假设主体具有相同的时间偏好。现实中，不同主体对未来收益的折扣因子可能不同，导致对同一决策产生不同效用。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究如何在异质性时间偏好下合成AI代理的策略。

Method: 本文在MDP框架中引入异质性时间偏好：每个主体拥有不同的奖励函数和折扣因子。采用功利主义社会福利（utilitarian social welfare）作为优化目标，即所有主体效用之和。通过理论分析，研究最优策略的结构性质与计算复杂度。

Result: 1）异质性时间偏好下，即使所有主体获得相同奖励，最优策略也不再是位置性的（即不依赖当前状态即可做出决策）。2）最优策略仍具有简单结构：可以用纯有限内存计数策略实现，所需内存与系统规模成多项式关系，且可在多项式时间内合成。3）若强行要求策略为位置性，则阈值判定问题为NP难，说明位置性策略既不能保证可追踪合成，也无法维护社会福利。

Conclusion: 异质性时间偏好显著改变了最优策略的性质（非位置性），但并未导致计算不可行。本文揭示了位置性策略与最优性之间存在根本性权衡：牺牲位置性可以用多项式时间获得最优社会福利，而坚持位置性则导致NP难且社会福利受损。

Abstract: In several socioeconomic-critical decision-making settings, such as fair resource allocation, climate policy, or AI alignment, multiple principals interact within a common arena. While it is well established that these principals may have differing preferences, decision-making under heterogeneous time preferences remains relatively unexplored. In particular, principals may weigh future outcomes differently and may derive distinct utilities from the same decisions. Motivated by such scenarios, we introduce the notion of heterogeneous time preferences in MDPs, where multiple principals possess distinct reward functions and apply different discount factors to future rewards. To compute meaningful decisions in such settings, an AI agent must rely on a notion of optimality that accounts for the preferences of all principals. We adopt a utilitarian notion of social welfare, defined as the sum of utilities accrued to all principals, and study the synthesis of agent strategies that maximise this welfare. Under heterogeneous time preferences, we show that optimal strategies are no longer positional, even when all principals receive identical rewards. Nevertheless, optimal strategies remain structurally simple: they can be realized as pure finite-memory counting strategies, require only polynomial memory in the system size, and can be synthesized in polynomial time. On the other hand, we show that deciding threshold questions for optimal positional strategies is NP-hard, exposing a poor trade-off: insisting on positional simplicity neither makes synthesis tractable nor preserves social welfare.

</details>


### [276] [Check, Please: Verifiably Fair Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12317)
*Yu He,Jeremy Vollen,Edith Elkind*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究聚类中比例代表制验证的计算复杂性。证明mPJR验证是coNP-hard的，并提出DC-mPJR+这一新概念，它在限制性联盟上提供比例保证，且拥有O(mn log n + mnk)的高效验证算法，同时与全局公平性有理论关联。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于质心的聚类方法优化全局目标，可能无法充分代表大规模数据点群组。为了在实践中能够检查标准聚类算法（如k-means）是否在特定输入上输出比例代表的结果，需要可验证的比例代表制概念。

Method: 首先证明验证mPJR是coNP-hard的；随后引入聚类场景下的mPJR+（基于委员会投票中的PJR+）；进一步提出DC-mPJR+，仅对未选中质心周围的限制性联盟提供代表保证，并设计O(mn log n + mnk)的验证算法，同时证明满足γ-DC-mPJR+的解也满足(γ+2)-mPJR+。

Result: mPJR验证是coNP-hard；mPJR+验证依赖重复子模最小化，不适用于大规模；DC-mPJR+可实现高效验证，且SEAR算法满足该性质，并且与mPJR有理论保证的关联。

Conclusion: DC-mPJR+为聚类比例代表制的实际审计提供了理论上合理且计算高效的路径。

Abstract: Popular centroid-based clustering methods are typically optimized for global objectives and may fail to adequately represent large groups of datapoints. To address this concern, recent work puts forward clustering analogs of social choice proportionality concepts, such as Proportionally Representative Fairness (also known as mPJR). For proportionality guarantees to be useful in practice, they must be (a) achievable and (b) efficiently auditable, so that one can check whether standard approaches, such as $k$-means, which are not guaranteed to provide proportional representation in general, nevertheless output proportional solutions on specific inputs. In this work, we study the computational complexity of verifying proportional representation in clustering. We first show that verifying mPJR is coNP-hard. Inspired by PJR+ -- a strengthening of PJR that is polynomial-time verifiable in the committee voting setting -- we introduce mPJR+ as its metric analog. However, verifying mPJR+ relies on repeated submodular minimization, rendering it impractical at scale. Hence, we introduce Default Coalitions mPJR+ (DC-mPJR+): a new proportionality concept that offers representation guarantees to a restricted set of coalitions around unselected centers, and as a result, admits an $O(mn \log n + mnk)$ verification algorithm. DC-mPJR+ is satisfied by SEAR and remains a meaningful proxy for global fairness: any solution satisfying $γ$-DC-mPJR+ also satisfies $(γ+ 2)$-mPJR+. Together, our results identify a practical and theoretically grounded path for auditing proportional representation in clustering.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [277] [Debiasing Message Passing to Mitigate Popularity Bias in GNN-based Collaborative Filtering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11145)
*Md Aminul Islam,Ahmed Sayeed Faruk,Sourav Medya,Elena Zheleva*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 针对GNN协同过滤中的 popularity bias问题，提出DPAA框架，通过在消息传递中集成自适应嵌入感知交互权重和层级权重来去偏。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GNN-based CF模型因交互分布倾斜和邻域高阶传播会放大热门物品的影响、抑制长尾物品，而现有去偏方法在GNN场景下效果有限。

Method: DPAA包含两种权重机制：(1) 交互级权重——基于表示感知的 popularity信号，并通过从预训练到模型嵌入的平滑过渡来稳定训练；(2) 层级权重——放大高阶邻域，暴露与多样化和曝光不足物品的长程交互。

Result: 在真实和半合成数据集上，DPAA在GNN-based CF场景下优于现有SOTA popularity偏差校正方法。

Conclusion: 直接在GNN的消息聚合过程中嵌入自适应去偏权重，能有效缓解popularity bias且优于后处理或重加权等传统方法。

Abstract: Collaborative filtering (CF) models based on graph neural networks (GNNs) achieve strong performance in recommender systems by propagating user-item signals over interaction graphs. However, they are highly susceptible to popularity bias, since skewed interaction distributions and repeated message passing across high-order neighborhoods amplify the influence of popular items while suppressing long-tail ones. Existing debiasing approaches, including re-weighting objectives, regularization, causal methods, and post-processing, are less effective in GNN-based settings because they do not directly counteract bias propagated through the aggregation process, and recent in-aggregation weighting methods often rely on static heuristics or unstable embedding estimates. We propose Debiasing Popularity Amplification in Aggregation (DPAA), a popularity debiasing framework for GNN-based CF that integrates adaptive, embedding-aware interaction weighting and layer-wise weighting directly into message passing. DPAA assigns interaction-level weights from a representation-aware popularity signal, stabilized by a smooth transition from pre-trained to evolving model embeddings during training. It further introduces a layer-wise weighting that amplifies higher-order neighborhoods, surfacing long-range interactions with diverse and underexposed items. Experiments on real-world and semi-synthetic datasets show that DPAA outperforms state-of-the-art popularity-bias correction methods for GNN-based CF.

</details>


### [278] [MIRA: An LLM-Assisted Benchmark for Multi-Category Integrated Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11254)
*Mehmet Deniz Türkmen,Suchana Datta,Dwaipayan Roy,Daniel Hienert,Philipp Mayr,Derek Greene*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: MIRA是一个基于社会科学搜索平台的新型基准测试集，支持跨异构类别（研究数据、变量、工具等）的统一排序评估，利用LLM降低成本并实现多维度评价。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IR评估基准未能反映现代搜索系统跨数据源、跨格式统一检索的需求，缺乏代表当代搜索领域多样性的测试集。

Method: 基于大规模社会科学搜索平台构建，包含真实用户查询、四类学术条目（研究数据、变量、工具等），并利用大语言模型生成主题描述和相关性判断以降低标注成本。

Result: 提供了一个独特的跨类别统一评估基准，在真实性、多样性和成本效率方面具有优势。

Conclusion: MIRA为多面向、类别感知、跨类别信息检索研究提供了基础测试平台，有助于推动搜索系统向统一接口方向发展。

Abstract: Users increasingly expect modern search systems to offer a unified interface that seamlessly retrieves information from diverse data sources and formats. However, current information retrieval (IR) evaluation benchmarks have not kept pace with this development, primarily due to the lack of test collections that represent the diversity of contemporary search domains. We address this critical gap with MIRA, a novel benchmark based on a large-scale social science search platform. MIRA is designed for category-aware ranking across heterogeneous categories - Publications, Research Data, Variables, and Instruments & Tools - within a single, unified evaluation framework. The proposed collection is distinctive in several ways: (1) it is built upon real user queries, providing a more realistic basis for evaluation; (2) it covers scholarly items from four distinct categories, enabling multi-faceted evaluation; and (3) it leverages a Large Language Model to generate topic descriptions and narratives, as well as for relevance assessment with respect to these topics, substantially reducing the labor and cost of test collection generation. We release this resource to benefit the community by providing a foundational testbed for the research on multi-faceted, category-aware, integrated, or cross-category information retrieval.

</details>


### [279] [Beyond Similarity Search: Tenure and the Case for Structured Belief State in LLM Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11325)
*Jeffrey Flynt*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Tenure，一个本地优先的代理，通过维护带认知状态的类型化信念存储、版本化替代和范围隔离，解决LLM跨会话记忆问题。与传统基于相似度搜索的RAG方法不同，Tenure将跨会话记忆视为状态管理问题而非搜索问题，利用精准优先检索注入上下文。实验表明，别名加权BM25在72个检索案例中平均精度达到1.0（72/72通过），而稠密嵌入余弦相似度仅为0.12（8/72通过）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM会话是无状态的，导致迭代性、会话密集型工作流需要反复重新建立上下文。传统的RAG方法将跨会话记忆视为搜索问题，但对于同一用户或工程团队这类有限词汇上下文，语义相似度搜索在命名实体解析上表现不佳，因为信念在语义上天然相近。

Method: Tenure是一个本地优先代理，包含：(1) 类型化信念存储，记录认知状态；(2) 版本化替代和范围隔离；(3) 硬范围隔离保证信念只在授权边界内出现；(4) 类型化模式将提取的事实通过"为什么重要"字段转化为可执行指令；(5) 别名加权BM25检索替代余弦相似度检索；(6) 别名富集飞轮持续索引用户特定词汇。

Result: 在72个检索案例的对照评估中，稠密嵌入余弦相似度平均精度仅0.12（8/72通过），而别名加权BM25平均精度达1.0（72/72通过）。在多变话题漂移下，向量后端在噪声关键轮次产生0.43-0.50的漂移分数，而BM25保持0。

Conclusion: 跨会话记忆本质上是一个状态管理问题，而非搜索问题。通过结构化的状态管理（范围隔离、版本控制、精准检索），可以显著优于基于语义相似度的检索方法。别名加权BM25在有限词汇上下文中表现优异，且别名富集飞轮机制持续改进。

Abstract: Why do we need another AI to help the AI? We argue you don't. Stateless LLM sessions impose re-orientation costs on iterative, session-heavy workflows. Prior work addresses cross-session memory through retrieval-augmented approaches: store history, embed it, retrieve by semantic similarity. Cross-session memory is a state management problem, not a search problem. Similarity search fails for named entity resolution within bounded vocabulary contexts because beliefs about a shared technical domain are semantically proximate by construction. A single user is the simplest bounded vocabulary context; engineering teams converge on the same property through shared codebases and terminology.
  We present Tenure, a local-first proxy that maintains a typed belief store with epistemic status, versioned supersession, and scope isolation, injecting curated context into every LLM session through precision-first retrieval. Hard scope isolation provides a structural guarantee: the right beliefs surface, and only within the boundaries the user has authorized. Tenure's typed schema converts extracted facts into imperative instructions via a why it matters field, making injected beliefs directly actionable rather than raw material for the model to re-derive.
  A controlled evaluation on 72 retrieval cases demonstrates the gap. Cosine similarity over dense embeddings achieves mean precision of 0.12. Alias-weighted BM25 maintains mean precision of 1.0, passing 72/72 cases versus 8/72 for cosine similarity on the same corpus. Hybrid retrieval typically solves vocabulary mismatch between disparate authors; Tenure eliminates this structurally: query and belief authors are the same person, and an alias enrichment flywheel continuously indexes their specific vocabulary. Under multi-turn topic drift this worsens: the vector backend produces drift scores of 0.43--0.50 on noise-critical turns where BM25 maintains 0.

</details>


### [280] [Much of Geospatial Web Search Is Beyond Traditional GIS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11336)
*Ilya Ilyankou,Stefano Cavazzi,James Haworth*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文通过对MS MARCO语料库中101万条真实Bing查询进行分析，发现18%的查询具有地理空间属性（远超原始标注的6.17%），并构建了包含88个类别的分类体系，揭示了地理空间搜索以交易性和实用性查询为主（如成本价格占15.3%），讨论了其对混合检索架构和大语言模型地理推理基准的启示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有标注方案严重低估了网络搜索中地理相关查询的比例，人们对地理空间搜索查询的类别和频率缺乏大规模、系统性的刻画。

Method: 使用密集句子嵌入、轻量级SetFit分类器和密度聚类方法，对MS MARCO语料库中101万条真实Bing查询进行无先验过滤的全量分析，识别出181,827条地理空间查询，并归纳出88个查询类别。

Result: 地理空间查询占18.0%，是原始标注（6.17%）的近三倍；构建了88个类别的分类体系；成本与价格类查询占地理空间查询的15.3%，几乎两倍于整个自然地理主题。

Conclusion: 大量地理空间查询（如成本、营业时间、天气、旅行推荐等）超出了传统GIS系统和知识图谱的服务范围；不同类别在答案确定性上差异显著，对混合检索架构和大语言模型地理推理能力提出了新的要求。

Abstract: Web search queries concern place far more often than existing labelling schemes suggest, yet the landscape of geospatial web search queries - what people ask of place, and how often - remains poorly characterised at scale. We apply dense sentence embeddings, a lightweight SetFit classifier, and density-based clustering to the full MS MARCO corpus of 1.01 million real Bing queries without prior filtering for toponyms or spatial keywords, identifying 181,827 geospatial queries (18.0%), nearly threefold the 6.17% labelled as Location in the original annotations. The resulting taxonomy of 88 query categories reveals that geospatial web search is dominated by transactional and practical lookups: costs and prices alone account for 15.3% of geospatial queries, nearly twice the size of the entire physical geography theme. Much of this activity - costs, opening hours, contact details, weather, travel recommendations - falls outside the scope traditional GIS systems and knowledge graphs are built to serve. The categories vary substantially in the kind of answer they admit, from deterministic lookups answerable from spatial databases or knowledge graphs to evaluative or temporally volatile queries that require generative or real-time systems. We discuss implications for hybrid retrieval architectures and for benchmarks of geographic reasoning in large language models. We openly release the labelled dataset, classifier, and taxonomy.

</details>


### [281] [AgentDisCo: Towards Disentanglement and Collaboration in Open-ended Deep Research Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11732)
*Jiarui Jin,Zexuan Yan,Shijian Wang,Wenxiang Jiao,Yuan Lu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: AgentDisCo 是一种将深度研究建模为信息探索与利用之间对抗优化问题的解耦协作智能体架构，通过批评智能体和生成智能体的迭代协作来优化提纲和搜索查询，并引入元优化框架实现策略自动发现，在多个基准上达到领先水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将信息探索与利用混为一个模块，导致两者相互干扰。同时，现有基准无法真实反映实际用户需求。

Method: 将深度研究形式化为对抗优化问题：批评智能体评估提纲并优化搜索查询，生成智能体检索结果并修订提纲，迭代优化后交由下游报告撰写者合成报告。通过元优化框架，将生成智能体重用作评分智能体，利用代码生成智能体系统探索配置并构建策略库，实现自我优化。

Result: 在 DeepResearchBench、DeepConsult、DeepResearchGym 三个基准上使用 Gemini-2.5-Pro 达到与领先闭源系统相当或更优的性能。引入 GALA 基准，从用户历史浏览行为中挖掘潜在研究兴趣。

Conclusion: AgentDisCo 通过解耦信息探索与利用，配合元优化策略自动发现，有效提升了深度研究的质量和自动化程度。同时，GALA 基准和个性化产品演示了该框架在实际场景中的应用潜力。

Abstract: In this paper, we present AgentDisCo, a novel Disentangled and Collaborative agentic architecture that formulates deep research as an adversarial optimization problem between information exploration and exploitation. Unlike existing approaches that conflate these two processes into a single module, AgentDisCo employs a critic agent to evaluate generated outlines and refine search queries, and a generator agent to retrieve updated results and revise outlines accordingly. The iteratively refined outline is then passed to a downstream report writer that synthesizes a comprehensive research report. The overall workflow supports both handcrafted and automatically discovered design strategies via a meta-optimization harness, in which the generator agent is repurposed as a scoring agent to evaluate critic outputs and generate quality signals. Powerful code-generation agents (e.g., Claude-Code, Codex) systematically explore agent configurations and construct a policy bank, a structured repository of reusable design strategies, enabling the framework to self-refine without extensive human intervention. We evaluate AgentDisCo on three established deep research benchmarks (DeepResearchBench, DeepConsult, DeepResearchGym) using Gemini-2.5-Pro, achieving performance comparable to or surpassing leading closed-source systems. Observing that existing benchmarks inadequately reflect real-world user needs, we introduce GALA (General AI Life Assistants), a benchmark that mines latent research interests from users' historical browsing behavior. We further develop a rendering agent that converts research reports into visually rich poster presentations, and demonstrate an end-to-end product, AutoResearch Your Interest, which delivers personalized deep research recommendations derived from individual browsing histories.

</details>


### [282] [FedMM: Federated Collaborative Signal Quantization for Multi-Market CTR Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11433)
*Jun Zhang,Dugang Liu,Xing Tang,Xiuqiang He,Zhong Ming*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为FedMM的联邦多市场推荐方法，利用离散码本机制（RQ-VAE双层码本）在保护隐私的前提下对齐跨市场的ID空间，同时捕捉共享与市场特有的协同信号，显著提升CTR预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MMR方法采用预训练-微调范式，忽略了市场数据隐私；传统联邦学习聚合全局模型无法解决市场异质性和ID空间不重叠导致的嵌入聚合失效问题。

Method: 提出FedMM方法，核心是离散码本机制：1) 使用残差量化变分自编码器（RQ-VAE）将协同嵌入量化；2) 第一层全局联邦码本通过聚合更新捕捉共享模式，第二层本地码本学习市场特有语义；3) 离散码整合通用与特有信号，输入下游CTR模型。

Result: 在基准数据集上的大量实验表明，FedMM在保护隐私的前提下显著提升了推荐性能。

Conclusion: FedMM通过离散码本机制有效解决了联邦多市场CTR预测中的隐私保护、市场异质性和ID空间对齐问题，为跨市场推荐提供了新思路。

Abstract: Online platforms such as Amazon and Netflix serve users across multiple countries and regions, underscoring the importance of multi-market recommendation (MMR). Most MMR methods adopt a pre-training and fine-tuning paradigm, in which a unified model is first trained on centralized, global data and subsequently adapted to specific markets. However, this approach ignores the privacy of market data. While traditional federated learning preserves privacy, it typically aims to obtain a global model by aggregating model parameters and does not account for significant market heterogeneity. Additionally, because ID spaces are disjoint across markets, embedding-based aggregation strategies become ineffective. To overcome these challenges, we propose a federated collaborative signal quantization (FedMM) method for multi-market click-through rate (CTR) prediction. Our core idea leverages a discrete codebook mechanism to achieve privacy-preserving transmission and align disjoint ID spaces. We further employ a hierarchical codebook structure to capture cross-market shared patterns and market-specific characteristics. Specifically, we deploy a residual quantized variational autoencoder (RQ-VAE) with a dual-layer codebook mechanism for each market to quantize collaborative embeddings. The first layer utilizes a global federated codebook, updated via aggregation to capture universally shared collaborative patterns, while the second layer maintains a local codebook to learn market-specific semantics. Finally, the learned discrete codes, which integrate both general and specific collaborative signals, are incorporated into downstream CTR models to enhance prediction accuracy across all markets. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that FedMM significantly improves recommendation performance with privacy guarantees.

</details>


### [283] [Very Efficient Listwise Multimodal Reranking for Long Documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11864)
*Yiqun Sun,Pengfei Wei,Lawrence B. Hsieh*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: ZipRerank 提出了一种高效的多模态列表式重排序方法，通过查询-图像早期交互减少输入长度、单次前向评分替代自回归解码，配合两阶段训练策略，在 MMDocIR 基准上达到 SOTA 性能，同时将 LLM 推理延迟降低一个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于 VLM 的重排序器虽然准确率高，但受限于长视觉 token 序列和多步自回归解码，计算开销大、推理延迟高，难以用于实际场景。

Method: (1) 轻量级查询-图像早期交互机制缩短输入长度；(2) 单次前向传播对所有候选打分，消除自回归解码；(3) 两阶段训练：先在渲染为图像的大规模文本数据上做列表式预训练，再通过 VLM 教师蒸馏的软排序监督进行多模态微调。

Result: 在 MMDocIR 基准上，ZipRerank 匹配或超越 SOTA 多模态重排序器，同时将 LLM 推理延迟降低最高达一个数量级。

Conclusion: ZipRerank 在保持高精度的同时大幅提升效率，适合延迟敏感的实际系统。

Abstract: Listwise reranking is a key yet computationally expensive component in vision-centric retrieval and multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (M-RAG) over long documents. While recent VLM-based rerankers achieve strong accuracy, their practicality is often limited by long visual-token sequences and multi-step autoregressive decoding. We propose ZipRerank, a highly efficient listwise multimodal reranker that directly addresses both bottlenecks. It reduces input length via a lightweight query-image early interaction mechanism and eliminates autoregressive decoding by scoring all candidates in a single forward pass. To enable effective learning, ZipRerank adopts a two-stage training strategy: (i) listwise pretraining on large-scale text data rendered as images, and (ii) multimodal finetuning with VLM-teacher-distilled soft-ranking supervision. Extensive experiments on the MMDocIR benchmark show that ZipRerank matches or surpasses state-of-the-art multimodal rerankers while reducing LLM inference latency by up to an order of magnitude, making it well-suited for latency-sensitive real-world systems. The code is available at https://github.com/dukesun99/ZipRerank.

</details>


### [284] [Conditional Memory Enhanced Item Representation for Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11447)
*Ziwei Liu,Yejing Wang,Shengyu Zhou,Xinhang Li,Xiangyu Zhao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出ComeIR框架，通过条件记忆增强和令牌粒度恢复，解决生成式推荐中表示构建导致的身份-结构冲突和输入-输出粒度不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式推荐方法的表示构建存在两个问题：直接合并SID令牌嵌入会放大量化信息损失并模糊编码关系；而外部输入方法虽增强语义但无法保留SID结构化信息，导致身份-结构保存冲突和输入-输出粒度不匹配。

Method: 提出ComeIR框架，包含三个关键组件：MM引导的令牌评分（自适应估计SID内各编码贡献）、双层级记忆模块（捕获码内组合与码间转换模式）、记忆恢复预测头（在SID解码时重用记忆信息）。

Result: 大量实验证明了ComeIR的有效性和灵活性，并揭示了扩大条件记忆规模可带来可扩展的性能提升。

Conclusion: ComeIR通过条件记忆增强的表示重构，有效解决了生成式推荐中表示构建的瓶颈问题，为提升推荐系统性能提供了新思路。

Abstract: Generative recommendation (GR) has emerged as a promising paradigm that predicts target items by autoregressively generating their semantic identifiers (SID). Most GR methods follow a quantization-representation-generation pipeline, first assigning each item a SID, then constructing input representations from SID-token embeddings, and finally predicting the target SID through autoregressive generation. Existing item-level representation constructions mainly take two forms: directly merging SID-token embeddings into a compact vector, or enriching item-level representations with external inputs through additional networks. However, these item-level constructors still expose two practical challenges: direct merging may amplify the information loss caused by quantization and ID collision while obscuring SID code relations, whereas external-input-based methods can strengthen item semantics but cannot reliably preserve the SID-structured evidence required for token-level generation. These limitations make representation construction an underexplored bottleneck, leading to two severe problems, \ie{} the Identity-Structure Preservation Conflict and Input-Output Granularity Mismatch. To this end, we propose ComeIR, a Conditional Memory enhanced Item Representation framework that reconstructs SID-token embeddings into item-aware inputs and restores the token granularity during SID decoding. Specifically, MM-guided token scoring adaptively estimates the contribution of each code within the SID, dual-level Engram memory captures intra-item code composition and inter-item transition patterns, and a memory-restoring prediction head reuses the memories during SID decoding. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of ComeIR, and further reveal scalable gains from enlarging conditional memory.

</details>


### [285] [TwiSTAR:Think Fast, Think Slow, Then Act,Generative Recommendation with Adaptive Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11553)
*Shiteng Cao,Kaian Jiang,Yunlong Gong,Zhiheng Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出"先快思、后慢思、再行动"框架，通过可学习的分层工具调用策略（快速检索器、轻量排序器、慢速推理模型），让LLM根据用户历史自适应分配推理资源，在提升推荐准确率的同时降低推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式推荐方法对所有用户历史采用固定推理策略（要么全快、要么全慢），导致快模型在困难样本上精度差，慢模型在简单样本上浪费算力和延迟，缺乏自适应分配推理资源的能力。

Method: 构建包含三种互补工具（快速SID检索器、轻量候选排序器、慢速推理模型）的LLM系统，通过监督预热+代理强化学习训练一个规划器，动态决策调用何种工具；同时将物品间知识转化为自然语言解释，注入协同常识到慢速模型中。

Result: 在三个数据集上，该方法优于强基线，在保持准确率提升的同时，相比于统一的慢速推理策略显著降低了推理延迟。

Conclusion: 自适应推理资源分配策略能有效平衡生成式推荐中的精度与效率，通过工具学习与强化训练实现按需调用，是一个有前景的范式改进方向。

Abstract: Generative recommendation with Semantic IDs (SIDs) has emerged as a promising paradigm, yet existing methods apply a fixed inference strategy, either fast direct generation or slow chain-of-thought reasoning, uniformly across all user histories. This approach creates a trade-off: fast recommendation model produces suboptimal accuracy on hard samples, while always invoking slow reasoning incurs prohibitive latency and wastes computation on easy cases. To address this, we propose Think Fast, Think Slow, Then Act, a framework that learns to adaptively allocate reasoning effort per user sequence. Our system equips an LLM with three complementary tools: a fast SID-based retriever, a lightweight candidate ranker, and a slow reasoning model that generates explicit rationales before recommending. Crucially, we inject collaborative commonsense into the slow model by transforming item-to-item knowledge into natural language explanations. A planner, trained through supervised warm-up followed by agentic reinforcement learning, dynamically decides which tool to invoke. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms strong baselines, achieving consistent accuracy gains while reducing inference latency compared to uniform slow reasoning.

</details>


### [286] [HSUGA: LLM-Enhanced Recommendation with Hierarchical Semantic Understanding and Group-Aware Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11662)
*Guorui Li,Dugang Liu,Lei Li,Xing Tang,Zhong Ming*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出HSUGA方法，通过分层语义理解（HSU）和群体感知对齐（GAA）两个插件，分别解决LLM增强序列推荐中用户语义嵌入提取不可靠和利用策略单一的问题，在三个基准数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM增强的序列推荐方法存在两个局限：1）提取阶段直接输入长序列片段到LLM中提取用户偏好，长序列增加推理难度，导致用户嵌入不可靠；2）利用阶段对所有用户采用相同的语义嵌入利用策略，忽略了用户活跃度差异，导致次优性能。

Method: 提出HSUGA框架，包含两个插件：1）分层语义理解（HSU）：采用两阶段偏好挖掘，通过约束编辑操作建模偏好演化，提高语义提取可靠性；2）群体感知对齐（GAA）：根据用户活跃度调整语义利用强度，对活跃用户提供弱对齐，对稀疏数据用户提供更强引导。

Result: 在三个基准数据集上的大量实验证明了HSUGA的有效性和兼容性。

Conclusion: HSUGA通过解决语义提取不可靠和利用策略单一两个问题，有效提升了LLM增强序列推荐的性能，且作为插件具有良好兼容性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM)-enhanced sequential recommendation typically aims to improve two core components: user semantic embedding extraction and utilization. Despite promising results, existing methods still have two limitations: 1) In the extraction stage, most methods directly input long interaction sequence fragments into LLM for preference summarization. However, excessively long sequences increase inference difficulty, making it challenging to reliably infer accurate user embeddings. 2) In the utilization stage, most methods employ the same semantic embedding utilization strategy for all users, neglecting the differences caused by user activity levels, leading to suboptimal performance. To address these issues, we propose HSUGA, which introduces a simple yet effective plugin for each of the two core components: Hierarchical Semantic Understanding (HSU) and Group-Aware Alignment (GAA). HSU performs a staged two-phase preference mining and models preference evolution through constrained editing operations, thereby improving the reliability of user semantic extraction. GAA adjusts the intensity of semantic utilization based on user activity levels, providing weaker alignment for active users and stronger guidance for users with sparse historical data. Finally, extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and compatibility of HSUGA.

</details>


### [287] [Quality-Aware Collaborative Multi-Positive Contrastive Learning for Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11707)
*Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文针对序列推荐中对比学习的视图质量问题，提出QCMP-CL框架，通过协同多正例对比学习与质量感知机制，在保持语义一致性的同时增强视图多样性，并自适应调整不同质量视图的监督贡献，实验效果优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对比学习序列推荐方法存在三个问题：1）启发式数据增强可能导致关键物品丢失或转换模式被破坏，引发语义漂移；2）可学习增强方法多样性不足，仍需启发式辅助；3）不同视图的质量差异未被显式建模，加剧了假正例问题。

Method: 1）提出可学习协同序列增强模块，基于同目标序列和相似序列两种互补协同上下文生成两个增强视图，兼顾多样性与意图一致性；2）设计质量感知机制，从增强操作的置信度估计视图质量，并分配自适应权重，使高置信度视图提供更多监督，低置信度视图贡献更少。

Result: 在三个真实数据集上的大量实验表明，QCMP-CL优于最先进的基于对比学习的序列推荐基线方法。

Conclusion: QCMP-CL通过协同多正例对比学习与质量感知机制，有效解决了序列推荐中对比视图的语义漂移和假正例问题，验证了显式建模视图质量差异对提升推荐性能的重要性。

Abstract: The effectiveness of contrastive learning in sequential recommendation hinges on the construction of contrastive views, which ideally should be both semantically consistent and diverse. However, most existing CL-based methods rely on heuristic augmentations that are prone to removing crucial items or disrupting transition patterns, leading to semantic drift. While a few studies have explored learnable augmentations to improve view quality, they often suffer from limited diversity and still necessitate heuristic aids. Furthermore, the quality differences across views are rarely modeled explicitly and adaptively, aggravating the false-positive issue. To address these issues, we propose Quality-aware Collaborative Multi-Positive Contrastive Learning for sequential recommendation. First, we introduce a learnable collaborative sequence augmentation module that generates two augmented views under two complementary collaborative contexts, one based on same-target sequences and the other on similar sequences, thereby enhancing view diversity while preserving intent consistency.Second, we design a quality-aware mechanism, tightly integrated into the model representations, which estimates each view' s quality from the confidence of its augmentation operations and assigns adaptive weights to ensure that high-confidence views contribute more supervision while low-confidence ones contribute less.Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that QCMP-CL outperforms state-of-the-art CL-based sequential recommendation baselines.

</details>


### [288] [RecRM-Bench: Benchmarking Multidimensional Reward Modeling for Agentic Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11874)
*Wenwen Zeng,Jinhui Zhang,Hao Chen,Zhaoyu Hu,Yongqi Liang,Jiajun Chai,Dengcan Liu,Zhenfeng Liu,Shurui Yan,Minglong Xue,Xiaohan Wang,Wei Lin,Guojun Yin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了RecRM-Bench，最大的智能推荐系统基准测试，包含超百万条结构化数据，覆盖指令遵循、事实一致性、查询-物品相关性、细粒度用户行为预测四个评估维度，并构建了多维奖励模型与混合奖励函数框架，以解决当前强化学习方法仅依赖单维结果奖励的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法在智能推荐系统中仅使用基于最终用户交互的单维结果奖励，忽视了指令遵循、意图理解等关键中间能力，且缺乏标准化基准来支持多维奖励设计。

Method: 构建了包含超百万条结构化条目的RecRM-Bench基准，覆盖四个核心评估维度；提出了系统性框架用于构建多维奖励模型并整合混合奖励函数。

Result: 得到当前最大最全面的智能推荐系统基准数据集，可支持从语法合规到复杂意图理解的全方位评估。

Conclusion: RecRM-Bench为训练复杂奖励模型提供了基础数据集，为开发可靠且高能力的智能推荐系统奠定了坚实基础。

Abstract: The integration of Large Language Model (LLM) agents is transforming recommender systems from simple query-item matching towards deeply personalized and interactive recommendations. Reinforcement Learning (RL) provides an essential framework for the optimization of these agents in recommendation tasks. However, current methodologies remain limited by a reliance on single dimensional outcome-based rewards that focus exclusively on final user interactions, overlooking critical intermediate capabilities, such as instruction following and complex intent understanding. Despite the necessity for designing multi-dimensional reward, the field lacks a standardized benchmark to facilitate this development. To bridge this gap, we introduce RecRM-Bench, the largest and most comprehensive benchmark to date for agentic recommender systems. It comprises over 1 million structured entries across four core evaluation dimensions: instruction following, factual consistency, query-item relevance, and fine-grained user behavior prediction. By supporting comprehensive assessment from syntactic compliance to complex intent grounding and preference modeling, RecRM-Bench provides a foundational dataset for training sophisticated reward models. Furthermore, we propose a systematic framework for the construction of multi-dimensional reward models and the integration of a hybrid reward function, establishing a robust foundation for developing reliable and highly capable agentic recommender systems. The complete RecRM-Bench dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/wwzeng/RecRM-Bench.

</details>


### [289] [From Trajectories to Phenotypes: Disease Progression as Structural Priors for Multi-organ Imaging Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11958)
*Zian Wang,Lizhen Lan,Guangming Wang,Haosen Zhang,Minxuan Xu,Qing Li,Tianxing He,Mo Yang,Wenyue Mao,Yajing Zhang,Yan Li,Chengyan Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轨迹感知蒸馏框架，利用生成式疾病轨迹Transformer的知识来指导器官层面的影像衍生表型（IDP）编码器学习，通过几何保持对齐实现跨模态知识迁移，在159种疾病上提升了分类和发病时间预测性能，尤其对低患病率疾病效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 影像衍生表型（IDPs）仅提供静态快照，无法捕捉疾病的动态演化过程；而纵向电子健康记录中的疾病轨迹蕴含时序依赖和共病结构。作者假设IDPs与疾病轨迹之间存在部分共享的疾病相关结构，希望通过跨模态知识迁移弥补影像模态在动态信息上的不足。

Method: 提出轨迹感知蒸馏框架：1）利用纵向诊断序列训练群体规模的生成式疾病轨迹Transformer，获得受试者级别的轨迹表示；2）通过几何保持对齐（geometry-preserving alignment）将轨迹表示知识迁移至器官层面IDP编码器；3）下游预测时可利用交叉注意力融合轨迹与影像表示。

Result: 在UK Biobank的159种疾病上，轨迹感知预训练一致提升了分类AUC和发病时间预测MAE，低患病率疾病获益最大；IDP嵌入空间的相似性关系与轨迹空间一致，验证了部分对齐的表示几何。

Conclusion: 群体规模的生成式疾病模型可作为数据有限影像模态的结构先验，提升在现实队列约束下的鲁棒性，表明跨模态知识蒸馏在医学影像分析中具有重要潜力。

Abstract: Imaging-derived phenotypes (IDPs) summarize multi-organ physiology but provide only static snapshots of diseases that evolve over time. In contrast, longitudinal electronic health records encode disease trajectories through temporal dependencies among past diagnosis events and comorbidity structure. We hypothesize that IDPs and disease trajectories contain partially shared disease-relevant structure. We propose a trajectory-aware distillation framework that transfers structural knowledge from a generative disease trajectory Transformer into an organ-wise IDP encoder. A population-scale trajectory model trained on longitudinal diagnosis sequences produces subject-level embeddings that supervise IDP representation learning via geometry-preserving alignment. During downstream prediction, trajectory and imaging representations can also be fused via cross-attention. Across 159 diseases in the UK Biobank cohort, trajectory-aware pretraining consistently improves both discrimination (AUC) and time-to-onset prediction (MAE), with the largest gains for low-prevalence diseases. Similarity relationships in IDP embedding space also align with those in trajectory space, providing supportive evidence for partially aligned representation geometry. These results suggest that population-scale generative disease models can serve as structural priors for data-limited imaging modalities, improving robustness under realistic cohort constraints.

</details>


### [290] [Unlocking Crowdsourcing for Ontology Matching Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12226)
*Zhangcheng Qiang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向本体匹配（OM）验证的众包系统，通过差分可信度、一致性预填充和时间依赖信念三种机制确保众包质量，并支持与先进OM系统集成实现人在回路验证。两个真实案例验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM驱动的OM系统能发现更多映射关系，但传统依赖领域专家的验证方式成本高昂且不堪重负，亟需可扩展的验证方法。

Method: 提出三种众包质量保障机制：差分可信度（区分不同贡献者可信度）、一致性预填充（利用已有知识预填充答案）、时间依赖信念（随时间动态调整信念），构建可集成于OM系统的众包验证框架。

Result: 该众包系统可有效集成于SOTA OM系统，实现人在回路验证；两个真实用例证明了系统的有效性。

Conclusion: 众包可以作为OM验证的可扩展替代方案，三种领域特定机制有效保障了验证质量。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) pose new challenges for ontology matching (OM). While OM systems built on LLMs have shown remarkable capabilities in discovering more mappings, traditional OM validation that relies on domain experts has become overwhelming. In this study, we explore the use of crowdsourcing for OM validation and introduce a novel crowdsourcing system. We propose three domain-specific mechanisms, namely differential trustworthiness, coherence pre-filling, and time-dependent beliefs, to ensure the quality of crowdsourcing for OM validation. We demonstrate that our crowdsourcing system can be integrated with state-of-the-art OM systems to enable human-in-the-loop validation. Two real-world use cases illustrate the effectiveness of our crowdsourcing system.

</details>


### [291] [BatchBench: Toward a Workload-Aware Benchmark for Autoscaling Policies in Big Data Batch Processing -- A Proposed Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12272)
*Venkata Krishna Prasanth Budigi,Siri Chandana Sirigiri*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出BatchBench，一个用于统一评估云原生大数据处理中基于规则、学习和LLM智能体的自动扩缩容策略的开源基准框架，旨在解决该领域缺乏共享基准、跨论文比较困难的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动扩缩容策略（规则型、学习型、LLM智能体）的评估各自基于不同的基准、工作负载和成本模型，导致跨论文比较几乎不可能。社区缺乏一个共享的基准框架来公平比较这些不同范式的策略。

Method: 提出BatchBench框架，包含：(1) 从已有基准和集群轨迹中综合出的六类批量处理工作负载分类法；(2) 参数化工作负载生成器及基于KS检验和推土机距离的验证方法；(3) 五轴评估规范（成本、SLA达标率、缩放响应性、缩放抖动、决策可解释性），含LLM推理成本核算；(4) 标准化智能体接口，使LLM、强化学习和规则型策略可通过统一API评估。

Result: 本文是立场论文，贡献在于框架设计而非实证结果。BatchBench参考实现正在积极开发中，将作为开源发布。

Conclusion: BatchBench旨在为不同自动扩缩容范式提供公平的实验基础，讨论了预期的评估面、框架设计解决的研究问题，并给出了后续实证论文的路线图。

Abstract: Autoscaling has become a baseline expectation for cloud-native big data processing, and the design space has expanded beyond rule-based heuristics to include learned controllers and, most recently, large language model (LLM) agents. Yet despite a growing body of work spanning these paradigms, the community lacks a shared benchmark for comparing them. Existing evaluations rely on synthetic TPC-style queries, vendor blog posts with proprietary baselines, or narrow trace replays. Each new policy reports favorable numbers against a different baseline, on a different workload, with a different cost model, making cross-paper comparison effectively impossible. This is a position paper. We propose BatchBench, an open benchmarking framework designed to place rule-based, learned, and agentic autoscaling policies on equal experimental footing.
