The contribution is the design of the framework, not empirical results. We contribute: (1) a workload taxonomy of six batch processing classes synthesized from published autoscaling benchmarks and publicly released cluster traces; (2) the design of a parameterized workload generator with a validation methodology based on two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov and earth-mover distance; (3) a five-axis evaluation harness specification covering cost, SLA attainment, scaling responsiveness, scaling thrash, and decision interpretability, with first-class accounting for LLM inference cost; and (4) a standardized agent interface that lets LLM-based and reinforcement-learning autoscalers be evaluated alongside rule-based controllers with a single API. We discuss the expected evaluation surface, identify open research questions the framework is designed to answer, and outline a roadmap for the empirical paper that will follow. BatchBench's reference implementation is in active development and will be released as open source.

</details>


### [292] [EHR-RAGp: Retrieval-Augmented Prototype-Guided Foundation Model for Electronic Health Records](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12335)
*Saeed Shurrab,Mariam Al-Omari,Dana El Samad,Farah E. Shamout*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: EHR-RAGp提出了一种原型引导的检索增强框架，能够动态整合最相关的患者历史信息，在多个临床预测任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理长序列、异构事件和时间不规则性的电子健康记录数据时，往往依赖固定窗口或统一聚合，导致重要的临床信号被掩盖。

Method: 提出原型引导的检索模块（prototype-guided retrieval），作为对齐机制评估历史片段与预测任务的相关性，从而引导模型聚焦最有效的上下文信息。

Result: 在多个临床预测任务上，EHR-RAGp持续优于现有的EHR基础模型和基于Transformer的基线；且与现有临床基础模型集成后可获得显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: EHR-RAGp提供了一个可扩展且高效的框架，能够有效利用长程临床上下文来提升下游任务性能。

Abstract: Electronic Health Records (EHR) contain rich longitudinal patient information and are widely used in predictive modeling applications. However, effectively leveraging historical data remains challenging due to long trajectories, heterogeneous events, temporal irregularity, and the varying relevance of past clinical context. Existing approaches often rely on fixed windows or uniform aggregation, which can obscure clinically important signals. In this work, we introduce EHR-RAGp, a retrieval-augmented foundation model that dynamically integrates the most relevant patient history across diverse clinical event types. We propose a prototype-guided retrieval module that acts as an alignment mechanism and estimates the relevance of retrieved historical chunks with respect to a given prediction task, guiding the model towards the most informative context. Across multiple clinical prediction tasks, EHR-RAGp consistently outperforms state-of-the-art EHR foundation models and transformer-based baselines. Furthermore, integrating EHR-RAGp with existing clinical foundation models yields substantial performance gains. Overall, EHR-RAGp provides a scalable and efficient framework for leveraging long-range clinical context to improve downstream performance.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [293] [On the Impact of Crossover in Many-Objective Optimization: A Runtime Analysis of NSGA-III](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11201)
*Andre Opris*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文对NSGA-III算法在m-OJZJ问题上进行了理论运行时间分析，证明了使用交叉操作可以渐近地加速多目标优化过程，并给出了不使用交叉时的下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多目标进化算法（MOEA）在处理多目标优化问题方面取得了显著进展，但交叉操作在众多目标优化中的理论优势尚未得到充分理解，落后于实际应用。

Method: 对经典NSGA-III算法在m-目标m-OneJumpZeroJump函数上进行理论运行时间分析，比较有交叉和无交叉两种情况的性能差异。

Result: 对于任意目标数m，在巨大参数范围内，带交叉的NSGA-III比不带交叉的NSGA-III在优化m-OJZJ问题上渐近更快。同时给出了4-OJZJ问题上关闭交叉时的下界。

Conclusion: 交叉操作在多目标优化中具有重要的理论加速作用，为MOEAs的实际应用提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: In recent years, a theoretical understanding has rapidly advanced regarding how popular multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) can optimize many-objective problems. However, the benefits of using crossover in many-objective optimization are theoretically not understood, except for specifically designed benchmark functions tuned to particular crossover operators, and still lag significantly behind its practical use. In this paper, we build upon this line of research and present a theoretical runtime analysis of the widely used NSGA-III algorithm on the classical $m$-objective $m$-OneJumpZeroJump function ($m$-OJZJ for short). Our results demonstrate that NSGA-III with crossover optimizes $m$-OJZJ asymptotically faster than NSGA-III without crossover for any number $m$ of objectives for huge parameter regimes. We complement our analysis by providing a lower runtime bound on $4$-OJZJ when crossover is turned off.

</details>


### [294] [Leveraging Non-Equilibrium ECRAM Dynamics for Short-Term Plasticity in Neuromorphic Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11243)
*Alex Currie,Sean Borkholder,Nithil Harris Manimaran,Huayuan Han,Cory Merkel,Ke Xu,Tejasvi Das*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出一种跨层器件-电路-系统协同设计框架，将ECRAM器件的非平衡离子动力学（通常被视为器件缺陷）转化为短时程可塑性（STP）的计算资源，设计了延迟反馈LIF神经元架构，在电路层面实现突触易化和内在兴奋性调制，功耗仅2 pJ/脉冲，并在网络层面展示了频率选择性脉冲处理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物神经系统中STP对时序信息处理至关重要，但现有神经形态硬件难以高效实现；ECRAM器件虽天然具有瞬态电导调制特性，但通常被视为不良副作用或容忍的噪声，未被有效利用。

Method: 提出跨层（器件-电路-系统）协同设计框架，将ECRAM的易失性动力学转化为计算资源；设计延迟反馈LIF神经元架构与ECRAM突触协同工作，利用实验表征的ECRAM器件（1.5 KOhms/脉冲）构建紧凑行为模型进行电路仿真。

Result: 电路仿真在2 pJ/脉冲功耗下实现了两种关键STP行为（突触易化和内在兴奋性调制），且机制可推广至多种神经元拓扑；网络级分析展示了频率选择性脉冲处理能力，使单个突触可作为可调时间滤波器。

Conclusion: 非平衡ECRAM动力学可作为STP和时序计算的天然硬件基板，将器件缺陷转化为计算资源，为神经形态电路的时间信息处理提供了新的实现路径。

Abstract: Short-term plasticity (STP) is fundamental to temporal information processing in biological neural systems but remains difficult to realize efficiently in neuromorphic hardware. Memristive electrochemical random-access memory (ECRAM) devices naturally exhibit non-equilibrium ionic dynamics that produce transient conductance modulation; however, these behaviors are typically treated as undesirable variability or tolerated as side effects in memory-centric computing paradigms. In this work, we instead transform these volatile dynamics from a tolerated device artifact into a computational resource through a cross-layer device-circuit-system co-design framework. We introduce a delay-feedback leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neuron architecture co-designed with ECRAM synapses that exploits activity-dependent conductance modulation with negligible additional circuit overhead. The architecture integrates ECRAM-based synapses with a tunable delay-feedback spike-generation path, enabling transient device dynamics to directly modulate neuron excitability and synaptic efficacy. We used experimentally characterized ECRAM devices exhibiting transient conductance modulation (1.5 KOhms per spike) to develop a compact behavioral model suitable for circuit-level simulation. Circuit simulations demonstrate two key STP behaviors -- synaptic facilitation and intrinsic excitability modulation -- while consuming 2 pJ per spike, and the same device-driven mechanisms extend across multiple neuron topologies. Network-level analysis further demonstrates frequency-selective spike processing, allowing individual synapses to act as tunable temporal filters within spiking neural networks. This work demonstrates that non-equilibrium ECRAM dynamics can serve as a native hardware substrate for STP and temporal computation in neuromorphic circuits.

</details>


### [295] [Multi-Timescale Conductance Spiking Networks: A Sparse, Gradient-Trainable Framework with Rich Firing Dynamics for Enhanced Temporal Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11835)
*Alex Fulleda-Garcia,Saray Soldado-Magraner,Josep Maria Margarit-Taulé*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出多时间尺度电导脉冲网络（MTCSN），通过调控快、慢、超慢电导塑造I-V曲线，实现对神经元兴奋性的系统控制，无需代理梯度即可直接通过时间反向传播训练。在Mackey-Glass时间序列回归任务上，该模型优于LIF和AdLIF网络，同时具有显著更高的脉冲稀疏性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SNN神经元模型在梯度可训练性、动力学丰富性和活动稀疏性之间存在权衡，尤其在回归任务中，近似误差、噪声和脉冲离散化会严重降低连续值输出质量。现有SOTA方法依赖代理梯度训练简单现象学模型，对脉冲多样性和稀疏性的控制有限。

Method: 提出多时间尺度电导脉冲网络，通过调节快、慢、超慢三种时间尺度的电导来塑造神经元I-V曲线，实现系统性的兴奋性控制。推导了可微分的离散时间形式，支持直接通过时间反向传播（BPTT）训练，无需代理梯度近似。

Result: 在Mackey-Glass时间序列回归任务中，该模型在预测精度上优于LIF和SOTA AdLIF基线网络，同时在通信和计算两个层面上都表现出显著更高的脉冲稀疏性。

Conclusion: 多时间尺度电导脉冲神经元是面向能量感知的时序处理和神经形态实现的有前景的基础构件。

Abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) promise low-power event-driven computation for temporally rich tasks, but commonly used neuron models often trade off gradient-based trainability, dynamical richness, and high activity sparsity. These limitations are acute in regression, where approximation error, noise and spike discretization can severely degrade continuous-valued outputs. Indeed, many state-of-the-art (SOTA) SNNs rely on simple phenomenological dynamics trained with surrogate gradients and offer limited control over spiking diversity and sparsity. To overcome such limitations, we introduce multi-timescale conductance spiking networks, a gradient-trainable framework in which neural dynamics emerge from shaping the current-voltage (I-V) curve by tuning fast, slow and ultra-slow conductances. This parametrization allows systematic control over excitability, can be implemented efficiently in analog circuits, and yields rich firing regimes including tonic, phasic and bursting responses within a single model. We derive a discrete-time formulation of these differentiable dynamics, enabling direct backpropagation through time without surrogate-gradient approximations. To probe both trainability and accuracy, we evaluate feedforward networks of these neurons at the predictability limit of Mackey-Glass time-series regression and compare them to baseline LIF and SOTA AdLIF networks. Our model outperforms LIF and AdLIF networks, while exhibiting substantially sparser activity from both communication and computational perspectives. These results highlight multi-timescale conductance spiking neurons as a promising building block for energy-aware temporal processing and neuromorphic implementation.

</details>


### [296] [Black-Box Optimization of Mixed Binary-Continuous Variables: Challenges and Opportunities in Evolutionary Model Merging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12326)
*Md. Robiul Islam Niloy*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文对进化模型融合技术进行了结构化综述，将现有方法分为参数空间融合、数据流空间融合及混合方法三类。同时，首次正式将数据流空间融合问题刻画为一种包含混合二元-连续变量、高维搜索空间及条件依赖性的黑箱优化问题，并通过实验验证了结构化方法的有效性（准确率提升6.7%，搜索空间缩减51.4%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 进化模型融合方法虽然已在实践中展现出潜力，但其中数据流空间融合（DFS）所面临的优化挑战在文献中缺乏形式化的定义和深入理解，亟需从黑箱优化和进化计算的角度进行系统分析。

Method: 1）对进化模型融合技术进行结构化综述，按参数空间（PS）、数据流空间（DFS）和混合方法分类；2）将DFS融合问题形式化为混合二元-连续变量的黑箱优化问题，并通过实验比较结构化（尊重二元-连续条件依赖）与非结构化方法的性能差异。

Result: 结构化方法在准确率上比非结构化方法提升6.7%，同时将有效搜索空间缩减了51.4%。

Conclusion: 进化模型融合与黑箱优化领域之间存在重要的交叉点，本文通过形式化问题并指出具体开放问题，为未来研究提供了方向。

Abstract: Model merging has emerged as a cost-effective alternative to training large language models (LLMs) from scratch, enabling researchers to combine pre-trained models into more capable systems without full retraining. Evolutionary approaches to model merging have shown particular promise, automatically searching for optimal merging configurations across both parameter space (PS) and data flow space (DFS). However, the optimization challenges underlying these approaches -- particularly in DFS merging -- remain poorly understood and formally underspecified in the literature. This paper makes two contributions. First, we provide a structured survey of evolutionary model merging techniques, organizing them into three categories: parameter-space merging, data flow space merging, and hybrid approaches. Second, we formally characterize the DFS merging problem as a black-box optimization problem involving mixed binary-continuous variables, high-dimensional search spaces, and conditional dependencies between variable types -- challenges that standard optimization methods such as CMA-ES are not designed to handle. We provide preliminary empirical validation using real pre-trained language models, demonstrating that a structured approach respecting the binary-continuous conditional dependency outperforms an unstructured approach by 6.7% accuracy while reducing the effective search space by 51.4%. By connecting the model merging community with the broader evolutionary computation and black-box optimization literature, we identify concrete open problems and propose research directions to address them.

</details>


### [297] [A Family of Quaternion-Valued Differential Evolution Algorithms for Numerical Function Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12362)
*Gerardo Altamirano-Gomez,Álvaro Gallardo,Carlos Ignacio Hernández Castellanos*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一族四元数值差分进化(QDE)算法，利用四元数的代数与几何性质设计变异策略，在BBOB基准测试中相比传统实数DE实现了更快的收敛速度和更优的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近年研究表明，将AI模型扩展到复数、四元数等替代数系可提升紧凑性和准确性，但此类扩展在生物启发优化算法中尚未充分探索，尤其是四元数代数在计算智能领域仍属新兴方向。

Method: 提出了在四元数空间中直接操作的四元数值差分进化(QDE)算法族，设计了多种专门利用四元数代数与几何性质的变异策略。

Result: 在BBOB基准测试的多个函数类别上，QDE变体相比传统实数DE算法实现了更快的收敛速度和更优的求解性能。

Conclusion: 四元数空间中的差分进化算法能够有效利用四元数的结构特性，在连续函数优化任务上超越传统实数DE，为生物启发优化算法向替代数系的扩展提供了可行路径。

Abstract: The numerical optimization of continuous functions is a fundamental task in many scientific and engineering domains, ranging from mechanical design to training of artificial intelligence models. Among the most effective and widely used algorithms for this purpose is Differential Evolution (DE), known for its simplicity and strong performance. Recent research has shown that adapting AI models to operate over alternative number systems-such as complex numbers, quaternions, and geometric algebras-can improve model compactness and accuracy. However, such extensions remain underexplored in bio-inspired optimization algorithms. In particular, the use of quaternion algebra represents an emerging area in computational intelligence. This paper introduces a family of novel Quaternion-Valued Differential Evolution (QDE) algorithms that operate directly in the quaternion space. We propose several mutation strategies specifically designed to exploit the algebraic and geometric properties of quaternions. Results show that our QDE variants achieve faster convergence and superior performance on several function classes in the BBOB benchmark compared to the traditional real-valued DE algorithm.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [298] [Interpretable EEG Microstate Discovery via Variational Deep Embedding: A Systematic Architecture Search with Multi-Quadrant Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10947)
*Saheed Faremi,Andrea Visentin,Luca Longo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Conv-VaDE模型，通过卷积变分深度嵌入联合学习EEG微状态的地形重构与概率软聚类，解决了传统K-Means方法缺乏潜在表示、生成解码和可解释性的问题。在LEMON数据集上，通过架构搜索发现中等深度网络（L=4）在K=4时取得最佳性能（GEV=0.730，轮廓系数0.229），证明原理性架构搜索而非模型规模是发现可解释EEG微状态的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统EEG微状态分析方法（如Modified K-Means）直接在电极空间进行硬分配，无法学习潜在表征、不具备生成解码器，也不能将潜在配置解码为可验证的头皮地形图，限制了模型的透明度和可解释性。

Method: 提出卷积变分深度嵌入（Conv-VaDE）模型，在共享潜在空间中联合学习地形重构与概率软聚类；采用极性不变性方案；对聚类数（K=3-20）、潜在维度、网络深度、通道宽度进行四维网格搜索，系统评估架构设计对微状态表示质量、稳定性和可解释性的影响。

Result: 在LEMON闭眼静息态EEG数据集的10名被试上，架构搜索发现深度L=4出现在所有18个最优配置中；K=4时达到最佳GEV=0.730和轮廓系数0.229；中等深度网络配合紧凑通道宽度和小潜在维度在整个K范围内表现最优。

Conclusion: 原理性架构搜索而非模型规模，是实现通过变分深度嵌入进行可解释且稳定的EEG微状态发现的关键。

Abstract: EEG microstate analysis segments continuous brain electrical activity into brief, quasi-stable topographic configurations that reflect discrete functional brain states. Conventional approaches such as Modified K-Means operate directly in electrode space with hard assignment, offering no learned latent representation, no generative decoder, and no mechanism to decode latent configurations into verifiable scalp topographies, limiting both model transparency and interpretability. To address this, we present a Convolutional Variational Deep Embedding (Conv-VaDE) model that jointly learns topographic reconstruction and probabilistic soft clustering in a shared latent space. Conv-VaDE enables generative decoding of cluster prototypes into verifiable scalp topographies, replacing opaque hard partitioning with probabilistic soft assignment. A polarity invariance scheme and a four-dimensional grid search over cluster count (K from 3 to 20), latent dimensionality, network depth, and channel width are conducted to systematically reveal how each architectural design choice shapes the quality, stability, and interpretability of learned EEG microstate representations. The model is evaluated on the LEMON resting-state eyes-closed EEG dataset with ten participants using topographic template formation, clustering stability, and global explained variance (GEV). The architecture search reveals that depth L = 4 appears consistently across all 18 best-performing configurations, yielding a best-case GEV of 0.730 and a silhouette of 0.229 at K = 4 across the model sweeps, where moderately deep networks with compact channel widths and small latent dimensionality dominate across the full K range. These results establish that principled architecture search, rather than model scale, is the key to interpretable and stable EEG microstate discovery via variational deep embedding.

</details>


### [299] [QuIDE: Mastering the Quantized Intelligence Trade-off via Active Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10959)
*Xiantao Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出QuIDE指标，统一量化神经网络效率评估，通过智能指数I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1)综合压缩率、精度和延迟，实验发现任务相关的Pareto Knee（4-bit适合MNIST和大LLM，8-bit适合复杂CNN任务）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏统一的量化神经网络效率评估指标，现有方法无法同时捕捉压缩率、精度和延迟三者之间的权衡关系。

Method: 提出QuIDE指标，核心为智能指数I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1)，C为压缩率、P为精度、T为延迟。另提出精度门控变体I'，可标记原始I会误判的不可行配置。

Result: 在SimpleCNN（MNIST、CIFAR）、ResNet-18（ImageNet-1K）和Llama-3-8B六种设置下实验：4-bit在MNIST和大LLM最优，8-bit是复杂CNN任务的甜点（4-bit PTQ在ImageNet上精度崩溃）。

Conclusion: QuIDE提供了可复现的评估协议和可直接用于混合精度搜索的适应度函数，I'变体能正确标记不可行配置。

Abstract: There is currently no unified metric for evaluating the efficiency of quantized neural networks. We propose QuIDE, built around the Intelligence Index I = (C x P)/log_2(T+1), which collapses the compression-accuracy-latency trade-off into a single score. Experiments across six settings -- SimpleCNN (MNIST, CIFAR), ResNet-18 (ImageNet-1K), and Llama-3-8B -- show a task-dependent Pareto Knee. 4-bit quantization is optimal for MNIST and large LLMs, while 8-bit is the sweet spot for complex CNN tasks (ResNet-18 on ImageNet), where 4-bit PTQ collapses accuracy catastrophically. The accuracy-gated variant I' correctly flags these non-viable configurations that the raw I would reward. QuIDE provides a reproducible evaluation protocol and a ready-to-use fitness function for mixed-precision search.

</details>


### [300] [Steering Without Breaking: Mechanistically Informed Interventions for Discrete Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10971)
*Hanhan Zhou,Shamik Roy,Rashmi Gangadharaiah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文发现离散扩散语言模型中，传统均匀干预的控制方法会损害生成质量，尤其是在多属性控制时。通过稀疏自编码器分析，发现不同属性在去噪过程中有不同的"承诺"时间表。为此提出自适应调度器，仅在属性活跃形成阶段进行干预，在四类模型和七个任务上显著优于基线方法，多属性控制强度达93%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散语言模型(DLM)的控制生成方法直接沿用了自回归模型的思路，在所有去噪步骤中施加均匀干预。但实验表明这种均匀调度会严重损害生成质量，且多属性联合控制时损伤会累积加剧。因此需要理解不同属性的形成时间动态，并据此设计更合理的干预策略。

Method: 1) 在四个DLM（124M-8B参数）上训练稀疏自编码器，分析不同属性（如主题、情感）在去噪过程中承诺的时间表，发现属性在承诺时间、陡峭度和幅度上存在差异。2) 提出自适应调度器，仅在属性正在形成的步骤集中干预，其余步骤保持原样。3) 推导出自适应调度相对于均匀调度的优势可由承诺分布的一个离散统计量闭式刻画。4) 在四个DLM和七个控制任务上进行验证。

Result: 自适应调度方法在所有设置下均实现了精确控制，避免了均匀干预带来的质量退化。特别是在三属性联合控制这一挑战性任务中，达到93%的操控强度，比最强基线高出15个百分点，同时保持生成质量。

Conclusion: 离散扩散语言模型的控制生成需要匹配属性的形成动态，自适应调度策略在成本-控制权衡上具有理论上的闭式最优保证，且在实践中显著优于均匀干预方法。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion language models (DLMs) generate text by iteratively denoising all positions in parallel, offering an alternative to autoregressive models. Controlled generation methods for DLMs, imported from autoregressive models, apply uniform intervention at every denoising steps. We show this uniform schedule degrades quality, and the damage compounds when multiple attributes are steered jointly. To diagnose the failure, we train sparse autoencoders on four DLMs (124M-8B parameters) and find that different attributes commit on distinct schedules, varying in timing, sharpness, and magnitude. For instance, topic commits within the first 2\% of denoising, whereas sentiment emerges gradually over 20\% of the process. Consequently, uniform intervention wastes steering capacity on steps where the target attribute has already solidified or has yet to emerge. We propose a novel adaptive scheduler that concentrates interventions on the steps where an attribute is actively forming and leaves the rest of generation untouched. The cost-control trade-off admits a closed-form characterization: the advantage of adaptive over uniform scheduling is governed by a single dispersion statistic of the commitment distribution. Across four DLMs and seven steering tasks, our method achieves precise control without the degradation typical of uniform interventions. Especially on challenging simultaneous three-attribute control, it reaches up to 93\% steering strength, beating the strongest baseline by up to 15\% points while preserving generation quality.

</details>


### [301] [Scaling Laws and Tradeoffs in Recurrent Networks of Expressive Neurons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12049)
*Aaron Spieler,Georg Martius,Anna Levina*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过引入可独立调节神经元复杂度、宽度和连接性的ELM网络，研究在固定参数预算下如何最优分配神经元数量、单元复杂度和连接性。结果表明存在非平凡的最优权衡，且更大预算倾向于更多、更复杂的神经元，挑战了机器学习中简单单元的默认假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习默认使用极其简单的神经元单元，而皮层神经元是复杂、多时间尺度的处理器。作者将这一问题视为规范性架构问题，旨在探索在固定参数预算下，如何最优分配神经元数量、单元有效复杂度和连接性。

Method: 引入ELM网络（Expressive Leaky Memory Network），其循环层由可表达漏记忆神经元构成，可独立调节神经元数量N、每单元有效复杂度k_e和每单元连接性k_c。在神经形态SHD-Adding任务和Enwik8字符级语言建模上评估，并使用信息论模型解释权衡。

Result: 沿三个维度单独增加均能提升性能；固定预算下存在非平凡最优权衡；更大预算倾向于更多、更复杂的神经元；超参数扫描在三个数量级范围内追踪了近帕累托前沿的缩放律。

Conclusion: 机器学习中简单单元的默认设置并非显然最优，该工作为皮层依赖复杂时空整合器提供了规范性视角。

Abstract: Cortical neurons are complex, multi-timescale processors wired into recurrent circuits, shaped by long evolutionary pressure under stringent biological constraints. Mainstream machine learning, by contrast, predominantly builds models from extremely simple units, a default inherited from early neural-network theory. We treat this as a normative architectural question. How should one split a fixed parameter budget $P$ between the number of units $N$, per-unit effective complexity $k_e$, and per-unit connectivity $k_c$? What controls the optimal allocation? This calls for a model in which per-unit complexity can be tuned independently of width and connectivity. Accordingly, we introduce the ELM Network, whose recurrent layer is built from Expressive Leaky Memory (ELM) neurons, chosen to mirror functional components of cortical neurons. The architecture allows for individually adjusting $N$, $k_e$, and $k_c$ and trains stably across orders of magnitude in scale. We evaluate the model on two qualitatively different sequence benchmarks: the neuromorphic SHD-Adding task and Enwik8 character-level language modeling. Performance improves monotonically along each of the three axes individually. Under a fixed budget, a clear non-trivial optimum emerges in their tradeoff, and larger budgets favor both more and more complex neurons. A closed-form information-theoretic model captures these tradeoffs and attributes the diminishing returns at two ends to: per-neuron signal-to-noise saturation and across-neuron redundancy. A hyperparameter sweep spanning three orders of magnitude in trainable parameters traces a near-Pareto-frontier scaling law consistent with the framework. This suggests that the simple-unit default in ML is not obviously optimal once this tradeoff surface is probed, and offers a normative lens on cortex's reliance on complex spatio-temporal integrators.

</details>


### [302] [Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10973)
*Hangzhan Jin,Tianwei Ni,Lu Li,Pierre-Luc Bacon,Mohammad Hamdaqa,Doina Precup*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RPSFT方法，通过在微调中惩罚预训练权重矩阵主奇异向量块的投影旋转，来平衡SFT的领域内性能提升与领域外泛化退化，计算效率优于基于Hessian/Fisher信息的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SFT在提升领域内性能的同时会损害领域外泛化，先前工作指出这与预训练权重矩阵主奇异子空间的变化有关，但直接使用Hessian或Fisher信息识别损失敏感方向在大模型上计算成本过高。

Method: 提出Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning (RPSFT)，通过惩罚预训练权重矩阵中前k个奇异向量块的投影旋转，作为Fisher敏感方向的高效代理，在保留任务适配能力的同时限制不必要的旋转。

Result: 在多种模型族和规模下，使用数学推理数据进行微调，RPSFT在领域内/领域外权衡上优于标准SFT和强基线方法，更好地保留了预训练表示，并为下游RL微调提供了更强的初始化。

Conclusion: RPSFT作为一种计算高效的SFT方法，能够有效缓解微调中的领域外泛化退化问题，并增强下游强化学习微调的效果。

Abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) improves in-domain performance but can degrade out-of-domain (OOD) generalization. Prior work suggests that this degradation is related to changes in dominant singular subspaces of pretrained weight matrices. However, directly identifying loss-sensitive directions with Hessian or Fisher information is computationally expensive at LLM scale. In this work, we propose preserving projected rotations in pretrained singular subspaces as an efficient proxy for Fisher-sensitive directions, which we call Rotation-Preserving Supervised Fine-Tuning (RPSFT). RPSFT penalizes changes in the projected top-$k$ singular-vector block of each pretrained weight matrix, limiting unnecessary rotation while preserving task adaptation. Across model families and sizes trained on math reasoning data, RPSFT improves the in-domain/OOD trade-off over standard SFT and strong SFT baselines, better preserves pretrained representations, and provides stronger initializations for downstream RL fine-tuning. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/jinhangzhan/RPSFT.git}{https://github.com/jinhangzhan/RPSFT}.

</details>


### [303] [Solve the Loop: Attractor Models for Language and Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12466)
*Jacob Fein-Ashley,Paria Rashidinejad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Attractor Models，通过隐式微分求解不动点实现高效迭代精炼，在语言模型预训练和推理任务上显著优于现有方法，并发现“均衡内化”现象使得推理时可移除迭代求解器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 循环Transformer虽能通过迭代精炼提升性能，但存在训练不稳定、优化部署成本高、受限于固定小深度等问题。现有方法难以兼顾深度可扩展性与训练效率。

Method: 提出Attractor Model架构：主干模块先提出输出嵌入，吸引子模块通过求解不动点来精炼这些嵌入，梯度由隐式微分获得。训练内存不随有效深度增长，迭代次数由收敛条件自适应决定。

Result: 语言模型上，困惑度降低高达46.6%，下游准确率提升19.7%；770M参数模型超越用两倍数据训练的1.3B Transformer。推理任务上，27M参数模型在Sudoku-Extreme达91.4%，Maze-Hard达93.1%，远超Claude和GPT o3等前沿模型。

Conclusion: Attractor Models将循环转化为模型可内化的计算，使迭代精炼变得可扩展。均衡内化现象表明模型能学会将不动点求解器内化，推理时可移除求解器而性能几乎不降。

Abstract: Looped Transformers offer a promising alternative to purely feed-forward computation by iteratively refining latent representations, improving language modeling and reasoning. Yet recurrent architectures remain unstable to train, costly to optimize and deploy, and constrained to small, fixed recurrence depths. We introduce Attractor Models, in which a backbone module first proposes output embeddings, then an attractor module refines them by solving for the fixed point, with gradients obtained through implicit differentiation. Thus, training memory remains constant in effective depth, and iterations are chosen adaptively by convergence. Empirically, Attractor Models outperform existing models across two regimes, large-scale language-model pretraining and reasoning with tiny models. In language modeling, Attractor Models deliver a Pareto improvement over standard Transformers and stable looped models across sizes, improving perplexity by up to 46.6% and downstream accuracy by up to 19.7% while reducing training cost. Notably, a 770M Attractor Model outperforms a 1.3B Transformer trained on twice as many tokens. On challenging reasoning tasks, we show that our model with only 27M parameters and approximately 1000 examples achieves 91.4% accuracy on Sudoku-Extreme and 93.1% on Maze-Hard, scaling favorably where frontier models like Claude and GPT o3, fail completely, and specialized recursive reasoners collapse at larger sizes. Lastly, we show that Attractor Models exhibit a novel phenomenon, which we call equilibrium internalization: fixed-point training places the model's initial output embedding near equilibrium, allowing the solver to be removed at inference time with little degradation. Together, these results suggest that Attractor Models make iterative refinement scalable by turning recurrence into a computation the model can learn to internalize.

</details>


### [304] [Vertex-Softmax: Tight Transformer Verification via Exact Softmax Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10974)
*Navid Rezazadeh,Arash Gholami Davoodi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Vertex-Softmax方法，通过证明softmax在区间约束下的最优解位于顶点处，并利用阈值结构定理将搜索复杂度降至线性对数级别，从而在Transformer注意力机制的形式化验证中实现更紧的宽松界，显著提升认证准确率和下界，且计算成本远低于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer注意力机制的形式化验证方法在松弛softmax函数时忽略了与下游目标的耦合，导致不必要的松弛空间，需要更紧的界来提升验证效果。

Method: 首先证明softmax在区间约束下的精确最优解位于约束盒子的顶点处；然后建立阈值结构定理，通过对目标系数排序，将最优解限定在线性数量的候选解中；据此提出Vertex-Softmax原语，复杂度为序列长度的线性对数级别；并将其集成到CROWN风格的验证器中。

Result: 在MNIST、Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10的注意力模型上，Vertex-Softmax显著提升了认证准确率和下界，且一致地匹配或超越alpha-CROWN和分支定界基线方法，而计算成本仅为其一小部分。

Conclusion: Vertex-Softmax是从分数区间信息中可获得的最紧的可靠界，进一步改进需要额外的结构信息（如分数相关性、分数-值耦合）。该方法在保证形式化可靠性的同时，实现了效率与精度的双重提升。

Abstract: Certified verification of transformer attention requires bounding the softmax function over interval constraints on the pre-softmax scores. Existing verifiers relax softmax ndependently of the downstream objective, leaving avoidable slack. We prove that the exact optimum of this score-box problem is attained at a vertex of the constraint box, and establish a threshold structure theorem showing that, after sorting the objective coefficients, the optimum lies among only linearly many candidates, yielding the Vertex-Softmax primitive with log-linear complexity in the sequence length. We further prove a formal optimality result showing that Vertex-Softmax is the tightest sound bound obtainable from score intervals alone, characterizing precisely what additional structure (score correlations, score-value coupling) is needed for further improvement. Integrated into a CROWN Convex Relaxation based Optimization for Worst-case Neurons)-style verifier with a formal soundness guarantee, Vertex-Softmax significantly improves certified rates and substantially tightens lower bounds across MNIST, Fashion-MNIST, and CIFAR-10 attention models, while consistently matching or outperforming alpha-CROWN and branch-and-bound baselines at a fraction of their cost.

</details>


### [305] [Hierarchical Multi-Scale Graph Neural Networks: Scalable Heterophilous Learning with Oversmoothing and Oversquashing Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10975)
*Md Sazzad Hossen,Avimanyu Sahoo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HMH框架，通过层次化多视角HAAR变换和可学习谱滤波器，解决异配图中的度偏差聚合和过平滑问题，在节点和图分类任务上分别提升3%和7%，并保持近线性可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有谱图神经网络在处理异配图分类时存在两个关键问题：1）基于度的大节点主导聚合（hub-dominated aggregation），导致信息偏差；2）次优多项式滤波器引入近似误差，导致过平滑和远距离信号混合。亟需一种能同时解决度偏差和次优滤波的谱图学习框架。

Method: HMH包含三个核心模块：1）异配感知编码器，学习特征和结构感知的有符号亲和度；2）基于嵌入引导的软图层次构建，每层构造稀疏、正交、局部感知的HAAR基，在频域应用可学习谱滤波器；3）跳跃连接反池化层，将各层次输出合并回原始图，防止大节点主导和长程信号瓶颈。

Result: 在节点分类任务上提升最高3%，在图分类任务上提升最高7个百分点，同时保持近线性时间可扩展性。

Conclusion: HMH通过层次化HAAR变换和可学习谱滤波器，有效解决了异配图中的度偏差聚合和过平滑问题，在多个任务上超越现有谱基线方法，且具备良好的可扩展性。

Abstract: Graphs with heterophily, where adjacent nodes carry different labels, are prevalent in real-world applications, from social networks to molecular interactions. However, existing spectral Graph Neural Network (GNN) approaches tailored for heterophilous graph classification suffer from hub-dominated (node with large degree) aggregation and oversmoothing, as their suboptimal polynomial filters introduce approximation errors and blend distant signals. To address the degree-biased aggregation and suboptimal polynomial filtering, we introduce a Hierarchical Multi-view HAAR (HMH), a novel spectral graph-learning framework that scales in near-linear time . HMH first learns feature- and structure-aware signed affinities via a heterophily-aware encoder, then constructs a soft graph hierarchy guided by these embeddings. At each hierarchical level, HMH constructs a sparse, orthonormal, and locality-aware Haar basis to apply learnable spectral filters in the frequency domain. Finally, skip-connection unpooling layers combine outputs from all hierarchical levels back into the original graph, effectively preventing hub domination and long-range signal bottleneck (over-squashing). Experimentation shows that HMH outperforms state-of-the-art spectral baselines, achieving up to a 3% improvement on node classification and 7% points on graph classification datasets, all while maintaining linear scalability.

</details>


### [306] [LEAP: Unlocking dLLM Parallelism via Lookahead Early-Convergence Token Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10980)
*Haohui Zhang,Zhiye Wang,Xiaoying Gan,Xinbing Wang,Bo Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LEAP方法，通过检测早期收敛的token来加速扩散语言模型的并行解码，无需训练，平均减少约30%的去噪步骤。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散语言模型依赖高置信度阈值来保证条件独立性，但这严重限制了并行性的可扩展性；通过统计分析发现，大量token在去噪早期就已收敛到正确预测，但未达到标准置信度阈值，表明当前基于置信度的准则过于保守。

Method: LEAP是一种无需训练、即插即用的方法，利用未来上下文过滤和多序列叠加来检测早期收敛的token，通过验证早期收敛与正确性之间的对齐，实现对这些token的可靠早期解码。

Result: 相比基于置信度的解码，平均去噪步骤减少约30%；在GSM8K数据集上，结合dParallel可将解码加速至每步7.2个token，同时保持模型精度。

Conclusion: LEAP有效打破了高置信度先验的依赖，为并行解码提供了新范式，实现了更高效的扩散语言模型推理。

Abstract: Diffusion Language Models (dLLMs) have garnered significant attention for their potential in highly parallel processing. The parallel capabilities of existing dLLMs stem from the assumption of conditional independence at high confidence levels, which ensures negligible discrepancy between the marginal and joint distributions. However, the stringent confidence thresholds required to preserve accuracy severely constrain the scalability of parallelism. Through systematic token-level statistical analysis, we reveal that a substantial proportion of tokens converge to their correct predictions early in the denoising process yet fail to reach standard confidence thresholds, confirming that current confidence-based criteria are overly conservative. In response, we introduce LEAP (Lookahead Early-Convergence Token Detection for Accelerated Parallel Decoding). LEAP is a training-free, plug-and-play method that leverages future context filtering and multi-sequence superposition to detect early-converging tokens. By validating the alignment between early convergence and correctness, we enable reliable early decoding of these tokens. Benchmarking across diverse domains demonstrates that LEAP significantly lowers inference latency and decoding steps. Compared to confidence-based decoding, the average number of denoising steps is reduced by about 30%. On the GSM8K dataset, combining LEAP with dParallel accelerates decoding to 7.2 tokens per step while preserving model precision. LEAP effectively breaks the reliance on high-confidence priors, offering a novel paradigm for parallel decoding.

</details>


### [307] [$ξ$-DPO: Direct Preference Optimization via Ratio Reward Margin](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10981)
*Zhengyuan Fan,Zhonghua Wu,Yuxuan Du,Qun Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ξ-DPO方法，通过比率奖励边际替代SimPO中难以调节的超参数β和γ，实现无需试错的可解释偏好优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SimPO中的超参数β和γ联合调优困难，因其边际公式在不同奖励差距结构的数据集上缺乏可解释性，需反复试错调整。

Method: 首先将偏好目标等价转化为最小化奖励差距与最优边际之间的距离；然后定义选择与拒绝响应的比率形式奖励，消除β的影响，得到有界可解释的比率奖励边际ξ，ξ可直接从初始奖励差距分布确定。

Result: ξ-DPO消除了β的影响，ξ具有明确的物理含义（期望的响应间相对分离程度），可基于数据初始分布直接设定，无需反复调参。

Conclusion: ξ-DPO通过比率奖励边际解决了SimPO超参数难调问题，提供了一种更简单、可解释且高效的偏好优化方法。

Abstract: Reference-free preference optimization has emerged as an efficient alternative to reinforcement learning from human feedback, with Simple Preference Optimization(SimPO) demonstrating strong performance by eliminating the explicit reference model through a simple objective. However, the joint tuning of the hyperparameters $β$ and $γ$ in SimPO remains a central challenge. We argue that this difficulty arises because the margin formulation in SimPO is not easily interpretable across datasets with different reward gap structures. To better understand this issue, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of SimPO and find that $β$ implicitly controls sample filtering, while the effect of $γ$ depends on the reward gap structure of the dataset. Motivated by these observations, we propose $ξ$-DPO: Direct preference optimization via ratio reward margin. We first reformulate the preference objective through an equivalent transformation, changing the optimization target from maximizing the likelihood of reward gaps to minimizing the distance between reward gaps and optimal margins. Then, we redefine the reward in a ratio form between the chosen and rejected, which effectively cancels the effect of $β$ and yields a bounded and interpretable margin. This margin is called the ratio reward margin and is denoted by $ξ$. Unlike the margin $γ$ in SimPO, $ξ$ explicitly represents the desired relative separation between chosen and rejected responses and can be determined from the initial reward gap distribution, avoiding repeated trial-and-error tuning. ....

</details>


### [308] [TMPO: Trajectory Matching Policy Optimization for Diverse and Efficient Diffusion Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10983)
*Jiaming Li,Chenyu Zhu,Zhiyuan Ma,Nanxi Yi,Youjun Bao,Li Sun,Quanying Lv,Xiang Fang,Daizong Liu,Jianjun Li,Kun He,Bowen Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TMPO通过轨迹级奖励分布匹配替代传统标量奖励最大化，解决了扩散模型对齐中的奖励破解问题，在保持生成多样性的同时实现最优奖励-多样性平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL对齐扩散模型的方法存在严重的奖励破解问题，导致生成多样性和质量下降；根本原因在于这些方法追求模式寻找（mode-seeking），最大化期望奖励却未有效约束可接受轨迹的概率分布，导致集中在少数高奖励路径上。

Method: 提出TMPO方法：1) Softmax Trajectory Balance (Softmax-TB)目标，将K条轨迹的策略概率与奖励诱导的Boltzmann分布进行匹配，继承前向KL散度的模式覆盖特性；2) Dynamic Stochastic Tree Sampling，通过共享去噪前缀和动态分支调度减少大规模流匹配模型的多轨迹训练计算量。

Result: 在人类偏好、组合生成、文本渲染等对齐任务上，TMPO相比SOTA方法将生成多样性提升9.1%，在所有下游任务和效率指标上均达到竞争性表现，实现了奖励与多样性的最优权衡。

Conclusion: 轨迹级分布匹配能有效解决扩散模型对齐中的奖励破解问题，同时兼顾高奖励与高多样性，为RL对齐扩散模型提供了新范式。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown extraordinary potential in aligning diffusion models to downstream tasks, yet most of them still suffer from significant reward hacking, which degrades generative diversity and quality by inducing visual mode collapse and amplifying unreliable rewards. We identify the root cause as the mode-seeking nature of these methods, which maximize expected reward without effectively constraining probability distribution over acceptable trajectories, causing concentration on a few high-reward paths. In contrast, we propose Trajectory Matching Policy Optimization (TMPO), which replaces scalar reward maximization with trajectory-level reward distribution matching. Specifically, TMPO introduces a Softmax Trajectory Balance (Softmax-TB) objective to match the policy probabilities of K trajectories to a reward-induced Boltzmann distribution. We prove that this objective inherits the mode-covering property of forward KL divergence, preserving coverage over all acceptable trajectories while optimizing reward. To further reduce multi-trajectory training time on large-scale flow-matching models, TMPO incorporates Dynamic Stochastic Tree Sampling, where trajectories share denoising prefixes and branch at dynamically scheduled steps, reducing redundant computation while improving training effectiveness. Extensive results across diverse alignment tasks such as human preference, compositional generation and text rendering show that TMPO improves generative diversity over state-of-the-art methods by 9.1%, and achieves competitive performance in all downstream and efficiency metrics, attaining the optimal trade-off between reward and diversity.

</details>


### [309] [Structural Interpretations of Protein Language Model Representations via Differentiable Graph Partitioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10985)
*Siddhant Dutta,Edward Tan Beng Wai,Soumick Sarker,Pasan Gunawardane,Jagath C. Rajapakse*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SoftBlobGIN框架，将ESM-2蛋白语言模型表示投影到接触图上，通过可微Gumbel-softmax子结构池化实现结构感知的消息传递，在不重训语言模型的情况下提升功能预测性能并提供可审计的结构解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蛋白语言模型（如ESM-2）学习到的残基表示虽然性能强大，但特征难以解释，因为结构和进化信号编码在稠密的隐空间中。现有方法缺乏直接可审计的结构解释能力。

Method: 提出即插即用框架：将ESM-2表示投影到蛋白质接触图上，使用轻量级图同构网络（SoftBlobGIN）结合可微Gumbel-softmax子结构池化，进行结构感知消息传递并学习粗粒度的功能子结构。

Result: 酶分类准确率92.8%、macro-F1 0.898；结合位点检测残基AUROC从0.885提升至0.983；GO预测F_max 0.733；活性位点blob重要性是其他blob的1.85倍（ρ=0.339, p=0.009）；仅增加约1.1M参数。

Conclusion: 该框架作为蛋白语言模型的可解释结构伴侣，无需重训即可提供透明、可审计的预测，且能恢复生物上有意义的活性位点、功能簇和催化接触模式。

Abstract: Protein language models such as ESM-2 learn rich residue representations that achieve strong performance on protein function prediction, but their features remain difficult to interpret as structural $\&$ evolutionary signals are encoded in dense latent spaces. We propose a plug-$\&$-play framework that projects ESM-2 representations onto protein contact graphs $\&$ applies $\textbf{SoftBlobGIN}$, a lightweight Graph Isomorphism Network with differentiable Gumbel-softmax substructure pooling, to perform structure-aware message passing $\&$ learn coarse functional substructures for downstream prediction tasks. Across enzyme classification, SoftBlobGIN achieves 92.8\% accuracy $\&$ 0.898 macro-F1. Unlike post hoc analysis of protein language models alone, our method produces directly auditable structural explanations: GNNExplainer recovers biologically meaningful active-site residues, spatially localized functional clusters, $\&$ catalytic contact patterns. On binding-site detection, SoftBlobGIN improves residue AUROC from $0.885$ using an ESM-2 linear probe to $0.983$, indicating that these structural explanations are not recoverable from language-model features alone. Learned blob partitions provide an additional layer of interpretability by automatically grouping residues into functional substructures, with blobs containing annotated active-site residues showing $1.85\times$ higher importance than other blobs ($ρ{=}0.339$, $p{=}0.009$), without any active-site supervision. Our framework requires no retraining of the language model, adds only $\sim$1.1M parameters, $\&$ generalises across ProteinShake tasks, achieving $F_{\max}$ of $0.733$ on Gene Ontology prediction $\&$ AUROC of $0.969$ on binding-site detection. We position this as an interpretable structural companion to protein language models that makes their predictions more transparent $\&$ auditable.

</details>


### [310] [AESOP: Adversarial Execution-path Selection to Overload Deep Learning Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10987)
*Tingxi Li,Mingfang Ji,Ravishka Shemal Rathnasuriya,Simin Chen,Yitao Hu,Wei Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文揭示了机器学习推理管道中存在一种新型效率攻击表面：通过路径感知的对抗性目标选择，可在同一输入和预算下将FLOPs放大2,407倍（远超单模型基线117倍），并提出了AESOP框架进行攻击与评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法仅针对单模型，而实际部署中模型被组合成动态推理管道，上游中间预测决定下游负载，形成了单模型方法无法利用的效率攻击面。

Method: 形式化对抗路径选择问题，提出AESOP框架，结合漏洞引导的路径排序和自适应损失加权，在白色盒和灰色盒设置下进行攻击。

Result: 白色盒设置下实现2,407× FLOPs和419×延迟膨胀；灰色盒设置下实现58× FLOPs和17×延迟膨胀。系统级防御无法消除攻击，只能迫使管道在吞吐量崩溃（0.578→0.006输入/秒）和96.7%数据丢失之间选择。

Conclusion: 多模型推理管道的路径级攻击比单模型攻击强大一个数量级，且现有系统防御只能转移攻击方向而无法根本解决。

Abstract: Modern machine learning deployments increasingly compose specialized models into dynamic inference pipelines, where upstream components produce intermediate predictions that determine the workload and inputs of downstream components. The cost of processing an input is therefore not determined by any single model, but by two coupled factors: the per-inference cost of each invoked component and its workload volume. Because these pipelines run under hard real-time constraints, efficiency is a fundamental requirement for system availability. We show that this structure creates an efficiency-attack surface that existing methods targeting single models cannot exploit: on identical inputs and budgets, path-aware targeting inflates FLOPs by $2,407\times$ while the strongest single-model baseline achieves $117\times$ -- a $20\times$ gap attributable entirely to where the attack is directed. We formalize this as the adversarial path-selection problem and present AESOP, a framework combining vulnerability-guided path ranking with adaptive loss weighting. We evaluate AESOP on five pipelines plus a production-realistic deployment variant with batching, bounded buffering, and confidence-threshold defenses. AESOP achieves up to $2,407\times$ FLOPs and $419\times$ latency inflation in white-box setting and 58$\times$ FLOPs / 17$\times$ latency in gray-box settings. Under system-level defenses, the attack is not neutralized but redirected: pipelines are forced to choose between throughput collapse ($0.578 \to 0.006$ input/s) and $96.7\%$ data loss to sustain throughput.

</details>


### [311] [Seeing the Needle in the Haystack: Towards Weakly-Supervised Log Instance Anomaly Localization via Counterfactual Perturbation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10988)
*Yutszyuk Wong,Wentai Wu,Yuen-Ying Yeung,Weiwei Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LogMILP是一种基于多实例学习的弱监督日志异常定位框架，利用原型引导和反事实扰动一致性正则化，在仅使用包级标签的情况下实现实例级异常定位，在三个数据集上取得了有竞争力的检测性能和更可靠的定位效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模网络系统中日志数据量巨大，实例级标注成本过高，导致细粒度的异常定位困难。现有方法难以在仅使用粗粒度标签的情况下实现可靠的实例级异常定位。

Method: 提出LogMILP弱监督框架，采用多实例学习（MIL）范式，结合原型引导的结构化建模（prototype-guided structural modeling）和反事实扰动一致性正则化（counterfactual perturbation consistency regularization），使模型在仅使用包级标签的情况下识别关键日志条目。

Result: 在三个公开数据集上，LogMILP在包级异常检测方面具有竞争力的性能，同时在实例级定位方面显著更可靠。

Conclusion: LogMILP有效解决了弱监督下日志异常定位的难题，兼顾了检测性能与定位可靠性，且代码已开源。

Abstract: Log anomaly detection is a critical task for system operations and security assurance. However, in networked systems at scale, log data are generated at massive scale while instance-level annotations are prohibitively expensive, posing great difficulties to fine-grained anomaly localization. To address this challenge, we propose LogMILP (Log anomaly localization based on Multi-Instance Learning enhanced by prototypes and Perturbation), a weakly supervised framework that enables both bag-level anomaly detection and instance-level anomaly localization using only bag-level labels. Our method guides the model to pinpoint the critical log entries using prototype-guided structural modeling with counterfactual perturbation consistency regularization, thereby improving localization reliability and interpretability under coarse-grained supervision. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that LogMILP achieves competitive detection performance while yielding significantly more reliable instance-level localization. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/YUK1207/LogMILP.

</details>


### [312] [SURGE: Surrogate Gradient Adaptation in Binary Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10989)
*Haoyu Huang,Boyu Liu,Linlin Yang,Yanjing Li,Yuguang Yang,Xuhui Liu,Canyu Chen,Zhongqian Fu,Baochang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SURGE框架，通过可学习的梯度补偿机制解决二值神经网络中STE的梯度失配问题，在多个任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有二值神经网络训练依赖手工设计的梯度近似方法（如STE），存在梯度失配和固定范围梯度裁剪导致的信息丢失问题。

Method: 提出SURGE框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 双路径梯度补偿器(DPGC) - 为每个二值层构建全精度辅助分支，通过输出分解解耦梯度流，降低梯度估计偏差；2) 自适应梯度缩放器(AGS) - 基于最优缩放因子动态平衡分支间梯度贡献。

Result: 在图像分类、目标检测和语言理解任务上均超越现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: SURGE通过可学习的梯度补偿框架有效缓解了BNN训练中的梯度失配问题，具有理论支撑且泛化性强。

Abstract: The training of Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) is fundamentally based on gradient approximation for non-differentiable binarization operations (e.g., sign function). However, prevailing methods including the Straight-Through Estimator (STE) and its improved variants, rely on hand-crafted designs that suffer from gradient mismatch problem and information loss induced by fixed-range gradient clipping. To address this, we propose SURrogate GradiEnt Adaptation (SURGE), a novel learnable gradient compensation framework with theoretical grounding. SURGE mitigates gradient mismatch through auxiliary backpropagation. Specifically, we design a Dual-Path Gradient Compensator (DPGC) that constructs a parallel full-precision auxiliary branch for each binarized layer, decoupling gradient flow via output decomposition during backpropagation. DPGC enables bias-reduced gradient estimation by leveraging the full-precision branch to estimate components beyond STE's first-order approximation. To further enhance training stability, we introduce an Adaptive Gradient Scaler (AGS) based on an optimal scale factor to dynamically balance inter-branch gradient contributions via norm-based scaling. Experiments on image classification, object detection, and language understanding tasks demonstrate that SURGE performs best over state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [313] [Test-Time Personalization: A Diagnostic Framework and Probabilistic Fix for Scaling Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10991)
*Linhai Zhang,Yulan He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究通过增加推理时采样数量来提升LLM个性化效果，提出理论上限、诊断奖励模型失效机制，并设计概率化个性化奖励模型缓解两种失效模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM个性化方法只关注构建更好的模型或输入，将推理视为单次过程，忽视了在推理时通过多次采样+选择来提升个性化效果的可能性。

Method: 1) 理论推导：证明oracle选择下期望效用随候选数呈对数增长；2) 统一缩放定律：将奖励模型的Best-of-N曲线分解为可测的四个量，揭示两种失效模式（用户级坍缩和查询级奖励黑客）；3) 提出概率化个性化奖励模型，通过学习方差来缓解两种失效。

Result: 1) TTP在多个策略模型和个性化文本生成任务上实现一致的缩放效果；2) 提出的缩放定律与多种奖励模型变体的实际缩放曲线高度吻合。

Conclusion: 推理时计算缩放能有效提升LLM个性化效果，但需解决奖励模型的用户级坍缩和查询级奖励黑客两种失效模式，所提概率化奖励模型是有效解决方案。

Abstract: Existing approaches to LLM personalization focus on constructing better personalized models or inputs, while treating inference as a single-shot process. In this work, we study Test-Time Personalization (TTP) along an unexplored axis: scaling inference-time computation by sampling N candidates from a personalized policy model and selecting the best with a personalized reward model. We prove that oracle selection yields expected utility growing logarithmically with the number of sampled candidates, establishing a theoretical ceiling for test-time scaling. However, standard reward models fail to realize this potential. To diagnose why, we derive a unified scaling law that decomposes any reward model's Best-of-N curve into four measurable quantities and reveals two failure modes, user-level collapse (near-constant prediction for some users) and query-level reward hacking (negative correlation with true quality for some queries). Guided by this law, we propose a probabilistic personalized reward model whose learned variance effectively mitigates both failure modes. Experiments confirm both elements of our framework: TTP delivers consistent scaling across multiple policy models and personalized text generation tasks, and our scaling law closely matches observed scaling curves across reward-model variants.

</details>


### [314] [SkillGen: Verified Inference-Time Agent Skill Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10999)
*Yuchen Ma,Yue Huang,Han Bao,Haomin Zhuang,Swadheen Shukla,Michel Galley,Xiangliang Zhang,Stefan Feuerriegel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SkillGen是一个多智能体框架，能从智能体轨迹中自动合成可审计、可迁移的技能，通过对比归纳和干预验证机制显著提升LLM智能体性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量技能仍主要依赖手工编写，缺乏自动化的技能生成方法。

Method: 提出SkillGen多智能体框架：1) 对比归纳（对比成功与失败轨迹识别模式）；2) 候选技能生成与迭代精炼；3) 将技能建模为干预，通过对比有无技能时的结果来验证净效果。

Result: 在多种智能体和数据集上持续提升留出性能，优于现有技能生成基线，且生成的技能可在不同模型间迁移。

Conclusion: SkillGen通过自动化技能合成和因果验证机制，有效提升了LLM智能体的能力，技能具备可审计性和可迁移性。

Abstract: Skills are a promising way to improve LLM agent capabilities without retraining, while keeping the added procedure reusable and controllable. However, high-quality skills are still largely written by hand. We introduce SkillGen, a multi-agent framework that synthesizes a single auditable skill from trajectories generated by a base agent. The output is a human-readable artifact that can be inspected before use. Rather than merely summarizing trajectories, SkillGen leverages contrastive induction over both successful and failed trajectories to identify reusable success patterns, recurring failure modes, and behaviors that appear in nearby successes but are missing from failures. SkillGen then generates candidate skills and iteratively refines the skill. A key novelty in SkillGen is that we model agent skills as interventions to empirically verify the net effect of skills on the overall performance. Specifically, we compare outcomes on the same instances with and without the skill, so that we account for both repairs (cases where the skill fixes a baseline failure) and regressions (cases where the skill breaks a baseline success). Across a broad range of agents and datasets, SkillGen consistently improves held-out performance, outperforms existing skill-generation baselines, and produces skills that transfer across models.

</details>


### [315] [Finite Volume-Informed Neural Network Framework for 2D Shallow Water Equations: Rugged Loss Landscapes and the Importance of Data Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11001)
*Xiaofeng Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"Data-Guided FVM-PINN"框架，用可微分的有限体积（FVM）损失替代传统PINN的强形式残差，以求解浅水方程（SWE）。研究发现纯物理FVM-PINN训练在二维问题上容易陷入低动量平凡解（残差仅高7倍），而加入稀疏数据可将差距扩大到310倍。仅200个随机速度测量即可使速度场L2误差降低22倍，50个测量降低7倍。在真实Savannah River河段案例中，该方法通过时间窗口分解有效构建了精确代理模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN的强形式残差不适用于浅水方程（SWE），无法保证局部守恒、处理间断或利用实际应用中常用的边界拟合非结构网格，需要一种更鲁棒的替代方案。

Method: 提出Data-Guided FVM-PINN框架：用可微分的、良好平衡的Roe黎曼求解器有限体积（FVM）损失取代强形式残差，并在非结构网格上评估；同时引入稀疏观测数据引导训练，采用时间窗口分解处理长时间仿真。

Result: 纯物理FVM-PINN在二维问题中常陷入低动量平凡解（损失仅高7倍）；加入稀疏数据后差距扩大到310倍。200个随机速度测量使速度场L2误差降低22倍，50个测量降低7倍。FVM-PINN损失在稀疏数据下贡献约23%的误差降低。在Savannah River案例中成功构建精确代理模型。

Conclusion: Data-Guided FVM-PINN框架通过结合FVM损失和稀疏数据引导，有效解决了PINN在浅水方程中的退化问题，在真实复杂地形场景中表现良好。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are a simple surrogate-modelling paradigm for partial differential equations, but their standard strong-form residual formulation is ill suited to the shallow water equations (SWE). It cannot enforce local conservation, handle discontinuities, or leverage the boundary-conforming unstructured meshes used in real-world applications. We introduce ``Data-Guided FVM-PINN'', a framework that replaces the strong-form residual with a differentiable, well-balanced Roe Riemann-solver finite-volume (FVM) loss evaluated on unstructured meshes. The major finding is that physics-only FVM-PINN training often fails on realistic 2D problems: the network collapses to a trivial low-momentum state that nearly satisfies the FVM-PINN residual but bears no resemblance to the true flow. A loss-landscape diagnostic shows that the FVM-PINN loss at zero momentum is only about $7\times$ larger than at the trained solution, a shallow basin that an ordinary optimizer falls into; adding even sparse data turns this into a $310\times$ separation, breaking the degeneracy. On a 2D block-in-channel benchmark, just $200$ random velocity measurements drop the velocity-field $L_2$ error by $22\times$ versus physics-only; $50$ measurements still deliver a $7\times$ reduction. A controlled ablation isolates the contribution of the FVM-PINN loss: it reduces velocity-field $L_2$ by $\sim$$23\%$ in the sparse-data regime and is essentially neutral when dense reference data is available. On a real-world Savannah River reach ($1306$ cells, $3600$~s simulation, five Manning zones), the framework constructs an accurate surrogate from SRH-2D anchor data, with time-window decomposition reducing error monotonically via progressive initial-condition handoff.

</details>


### [316] [Simpson's Paradox in Behavioral Curves: How Aggregation Distorts Parametric Models of User Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11017)
*Chao Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了行为曲线建模中的辛普森悖论：由于生存偏差（幸存者偏差），聚合曲线会系统性扭曲个体行为参数估计，导致用户峰值曝光量被严重高估（Goodreads 3倍、Amazon 5.3倍偏差），并提出 Synthetic Null Calibration 方法校正分类问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统行为曲线建模（将参与度-曝光量数据拟合参数函数）在推荐系统、广告投放和临床剂量等领域广泛使用，但研究者发现聚合数据会产生系统性偏差。作者旨在揭示并量化这种由生存偏差（幸存者偏差）导致的辛普森悖论现象。

Method: 在 Goodreads（330万用户，9个类型）、Amazon Electronics（1800万评论）和 MovieLens-25M 三个大规模数据集上，分别从个体层面和聚合层面拟合行为曲线，比较峰值曝光量 n* 的差异。通过 MovieLens（D≈1）作为阴性对照验证机制。提出 Synthetic Null Calibration 方法校正个体分类中32%的假阳性率。

Result: Goodreads 个体用户峰值 n*≈11，聚合峰值 n*≈34（3倍偏差）；Amazon Electronics 出现5.3倍偏差；MovieLens 作为阴性对照未出现显著偏差。该偏差在不同类别粒度、参与度操作化和分类器校准下均稳健。个体分类中存在32%的假阳性率。

Conclusion: 凡是存在差异化流失（differential attrition）的场景，从聚合曲线估计个体行为参数都会引入系统性偏差。研究者应警惕这种辛普森悖论，并采用 Synthetic Null Calibration 等方法来校正偏差。

Abstract: Behavioral curve modeling -- fitting parametric functions to engagement-versus-exposure data -- is standard practice in recommendation, advertising, and clinical dosing. We show that aggregation introduces a systematic distortion: Simpson's paradox in behavioral curves. On Goodreads (3.3M users, 9 genres), individual users peak at n* approximately 11 exposures while the aggregate peaks at n* approximately 34 -- a 3x gap driven by survival bias. Amazon Electronics (18M reviews) shows a 5.3x distortion. MovieLens-25M (D approximately 1) serves as a negative control, confirming that survival bias -- not aggregation per se -- is the operative mechanism. The distortion is robust to category granularity, engagement operationalization, and classifier calibration. We develop Synthetic Null Calibration to address a 32% false positive rate in per-user classification. Our findings apply wherever individual behavioral parameters are estimated from aggregate curves under differential attrition.

</details>


### [317] [DisagMoE: Computation-Communication overlapped MoE Training via Disaggregated AF-Pipe Parallelism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11005)
*Zhichen Zeng,Chi-Chih Chang,Jiayi Wang,Zezhou Wang,Ningxin Zheng,Zheng Zhong,Cesar A. Stuardo,Dongyang Wang,Mohamed S. Abdelfattah,Haibin Lin,Banghua Zhu,Ang Li,Ziheng Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DisagMoE是一种解耦式MoE训练系统，通过分离注意力层和FFN层到不同GPU组、设计多阶段流水线和计算-通信屋顶线模型，在16节点8xH800集群上实现最高1.8倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE训练中专家并行(EP)面临严重的all-to-all通信瓶颈，且之前通过重叠通信与计算的方法未能解决注意力层和FFN层计算-通信比不平衡导致的网络瓶颈问题。

Method: 将注意力层和FFN层分配到不同的GPU组（解耦架构）；设计多阶段流水线，采用单向多对多通信；基于计算-通信屋顶线模型平衡GPU和网络带宽分配。

Result: 在16节点8xH800集群上，多个MoE模型训练效率最高提升1.8倍。

Conclusion: DisagMoE通过解耦注意力与FFN层的放置与调度，有效缓解了专家并行中的通信瓶颈，显著提升了MoE模型训练效率。

Abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures enable trillion-parameter LLMs with sparsely activated experts. Expert parallelism (EP) is a widely adopted MoE training strategy, but it suffers from severe all-to-all communication bottlenecks, which is exaggerated by the limited inter-node network bandwidth as the growing model size requires distributing experts across GPU nodes. Prior work focused on overlapping these all-to-all communications with feed-forward network (FFN) and self-attention computations, which often leaves residual network-bound stalls due to inherent imbalance in attention and FFN layers' computation-communication ratios. We present DisagMoE, a disaggregated MoE training system that jointly optimizes model placement and scheduling for maximal efficiency. DisagMoE separates attention and FFN layers into disjoint GPU groups, introduces a multi-stage pipeline with uni-directional, many-to-many communications, and employs a computation-communication roofline model to balance GPU and network bandwidth allocation among the attention and FFN groups. DisagMoE is implemented on Megatron-LM, and evaluation shows that DisagMoE improves training efficiency across multiple MoE models with up to 1.8x speedup on 16-node 8xH800 clusters.

</details>


### [318] [RT-Transformer: The Transformer Block as a Spherical State Estimator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11007)
*Peter Racioppo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明Transformer的核心组件（注意力、残差连接、归一化）可以从一个统一的几何估计问题中自然推导出来，将潜在状态建模为超球面上的方向，并利用切线平面上的噪声进行精度加权方向推断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Transformer架构中各核心组件之间的内在数学联系，试图从几何视角统一解释注意力机制、残差连接和归一化为何有效，而非将这些组件视为独立的人工设计选择。

Method: 将潜在状态建模为超球面上的方向，在切线平面定义噪声，通过精度加权方向推断过程——注意力聚合证据，残差连接实现增量更新，归一化将更新后的状态拉回超球面。

Result: 揭示了注意力、残差连接和归一化三者共同源于同一几何估计问题的数学结构，而非独立的架构设计。

Conclusion: Transformer组件的有效性可以从几何推理的角度得到统一解释，为理解和改进Transformer架构提供了新的理论基础。

Abstract: We show that the core components of the Transformer block -- attention, residual connections, and normalization -- arise naturally from a single geometric estimation problem. Modeling the latent state as a direction on the hypersphere, with noise defined in the tangent plane at the current estimate, yields a precision-weighted directional inference procedure in which attention aggregates evidence, residual connections implement incremental state updates, and normalization retracts the updated state back onto the hypersphere. Together, these components follow from the geometry of the estimation problem rather than being introduced as independent architectural choices.

</details>


### [319] [When and How to Canonize: A Generalization Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11008)
*Yonatan Sverdlov,Benjamin Friedman,Snir Hordan,Nadav Dym*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个理论框架，通过覆盖数（covering numbers）来分析群平均（group averaging）和规范变换（canonization）两种非不变架构的泛化误差。建立了严格的泛化层级：规范变换模型的最优误差界不超过结构不变模型和群平均模型，最差则退化为非不变基线。证明了存在最优和劣质规范变换，取决于其正则性。针对点云处理中的置换群，严格证明了字典序排序的覆盖数随维度指数增长，而希尔伯特曲线规范变换保证多项式增长，为后者在点云架构中的成功提供了首个理论依据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管不变性架构是处理对称数据的标准方法，但通过群平均或规范变换对非不变骨干网络实现不变性的策略越来越受关注，然而这些替代策略的理论泛化性质尚不明确。本文旨在填补这一理论空白。

Method: 引入覆盖数（covering numbers）作为分析工具，建立泛化误差的理论框架。通过比较规范变换、群平均、结构不变和非不变基线的覆盖数，推导出泛化层级。针对点云置换群，分别分析字典序排序和希尔伯特曲线规范变换的覆盖数增长率。

Result: 建立了泛化层级：规范变换的最优误差界 ≤ 结构不变和群平均 ≤ 最差退化为非不变基线。证明了规范变换的正则性决定其泛化性能。对于点云置换群，字典序排序覆盖数呈指数增长，希尔伯特曲线规范变换呈多项式增长。

Conclusion: 首次为希尔伯特曲线串行化在点云架构中的经验成功提供了严格的理论依据，实验支持了理论结论。

Abstract: While invariant architectures are standard for processing symmetric data, there is growing interest in achieving invariance by applying group averaging or canonization to non-invariant backbones. However, the theoretical generalization properties of these alternative strategies remain poorly understood. We introduce a theoretical framework to analyze the generalization error of these methods by bounding their covering numbers. We establish a rigorous generalization hierarchy: the error bounds of canonized models are at best equal to the error bounds of structurally invariant and group-averaged models, and at worst equal to the bounds of non-invariant baselines. Furthermore, we show that there exist optimal canonizations which attain the optimal error bounds, and poor canonizations which attain the non-invariant error bounds, and that this depends on the regularity of the canonization. Finally, applying this framework to permutation groups in point cloud processing, we rigorously prove that the covering number of lexicographical sorting grows exponentially with point cloud dimension, whereas Hilbert curve canonization guarantees polynomial growth. This provides the first formal theoretical justification for the empirical success of Hilbert curve serialization in state-of-the-art point cloud architectures. We conclude with experiments that support our theoretical claims.
  Code is available at https://github.com/yonatansverdlov/Canonization

</details>


### [320] [Localization Boosting for Growth Markets: Mitigating Cross-Locale Behavioral Bias in Learning-to-Rank](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11272)
*Suryaa Veerabathiran Seran,Ashwin Naresh Kumar,Tracy Holloway King,Jing Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对Adobe Express国际扩展中美国内容供给过多导致的跨地区曝光偏差问题，提出多目标学习框架，结合行为监督、VLM相关信号和地区感知提升，在五个地区实现了相关性与本地化可见性的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LTR模型依赖行为反馈训练，导致美国流行模板在非美国地区过度推荐，压制了本地内容的可发现性，降低了增长地区的排序质量。

Method: 提出多目标框架，融合三类信号：行为监督（点击）、VLM生成的相关性标注（辅助监督）、地区感知提升（locale-aware boosting）。

Result: 在五个地区，该模型在提升排序相关性的同时恢复了稳定的本地化表现，证明了解耦曝光偏差与语义监督的重要性。

Conclusion: 仅依赖点击训练会抑制语义特征，加入VLM标注可改善语义对齐但不足以保护本地内容可见性；多目标框架是更有效的解法。

Abstract: Adobe Express is expanding internationally, but the US has a disproportionately large content supply and interaction volume. Learning-to-rank (LTR) models trained primarily on behavioral feedback inherit this imbalance: templates popular in US are over-served in non-US locales. This cross-locale exposure bias suppresses local content discoverability and degrades ranking quality in growth locales.
  We show that click-only training suppresses semantically informative localization features. Adding vision-language model (VLM) graded relevance labels as auxiliary supervision alongside clicks improves semantic alignment but does not preserve local content visibility. We propose a multi-objective framework combining behavioral supervision, VLM-derived relevance signals, and locale-aware boosting. Across five locales, the resulting model improves relevance while restoring stable localization, demonstrating the importance of disentangling exposure from semantic supervision.

</details>


### [321] [ACSAC: Adaptive Chunk Size Actor-Critic with Causal Transformer Q-Network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11009)
*Qian Chen,Junqiao Zhao,Hongtu Zhou,Hang Yu,Yanping Zhao,Chen Ye,Guang Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出自适应块大小演员-评论家方法（ACSAC），通过因果Transformer评论家自适应选择动作块大小，解决长时域稀疏奖励任务中固定块大小无法平衡响应性与时间一致性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时域稀疏奖励任务中，单步TD学习因自举误差累积而失效；现有动作分块方法使用固定块大小，无法根据状态自适应调整，导致大块响应慢、小块动作不连贯，需针对具体任务调参。

Method: 提出ACSAC，利用因果Transformer评论家评估不同大小动作块的期望回报；在每个块边界自适应选择最大化期望回报的块大小，无需任务特定调参；证明其Bellman算子是压缩映射，唯一不动点为自适应策略的动作-价值函数。

Result: 在OGBench的长时域稀疏奖励操作任务中，在离线RL和离线到在线RL设定下均达到最先进性能。

Conclusion: ACSAC通过自适应块大小有效解决了固定分块策略的局限性，在长时域任务中展现出优越性能，且理论保证了收敛性。

Abstract: Long-horizon, sparse-reward tasks pose a fundamental challenge for reinforcement learning, since single-step TD learning suffers from bootstrapping error accumulation across successive Bellman updates. Actor-critic methods with action chunking address this by operating over temporally extended actions, which reduce the effective horizon, enable fast value backups, and support temporally consistent exploration. However, existing methods rely on a fixed chunk size and therefore cannot adaptively balance reactivity against temporal consistency. A large fixed chunk size reduces responsiveness to new observations, while a small one produces incoherent motions, forcing task-specific tuning of the chunk size. To address this limitation, we propose Adaptive Chunk Size Actor-Critic (ACSAC). ACSAC leverages a causal Transformer critic to evaluate expected returns for action chunks of different sizes. At each chunk boundary, it adaptively selects the chunk size that maximizes the expected return, supporting flexible, state-dependent chunk sizes without task-specific tuning. We prove that the ACSAC Bellman operator is a contraction whose unique fixed point is the action-value function of the adaptive policy. Experiments on OGBench demonstrate that ACSAC achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-horizon, sparse-reward manipulation tasks across both offline RL and offline-to-online RL settings.

</details>


### [322] [VERDI: Single-Call Confidence Estimation for Verification-Based LLM Judges via Decomposed Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11334)
*Jasmine Qi,Danylo Dantsev,Muyang Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VERDI是一种从结构化评判模型的推理痕迹中提取置信度信号的方法，无需额外推理调用，通过分解验证评估为子检查并推导三种结构信号，结合Platt缩放逻辑回归，在多个基准和实际系统中有效提升置信度校准，尤其解决了token对数概率不可用或饱和的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM-as-Judge系统广泛用于自动化评估，但从业者缺乏可靠的方法判断评判结果的可信度。标准后验置信度信号（token对数概率）在许多商业LLM中不可用，且在使用结构化JSON输出时会饱和（高于0.999），因此需要一种替代方法从模型自身产生的推理痕迹中提取可靠的置信度信号。

Method: VERDI将每个验证式评估分解为子检查，从中提取三种结构信号：步骤-判决对齐度（Step-Verdict Alignment）、声明级边际（Claim-Level Margin）和证据基础分数（Evidence Grounding Score），然后使用Platt缩放逻辑回归将这些信号组合为置信度分数，无需额外推理调用。

Result: 在三个公开基准上，VERDI在GPT-4.1-mini上达到AUROC 0.72-0.91，在GPT-5.4-mini上达到0.66-0.80。在Qwen3.5-4B/9B/27B上，答案token对数概率反校准（AUROC 0.32-0.49），VERDI达到0.56-0.70。在包含八个评分标准的实际系统中，事实性评分标准AUROC为0.73-0.88，跨模型迁移AUROC为0.66-0.69。3300万参数的NLI模型可作为正则表达式提取的可扩展替代方案。

Conclusion: VERDI提供了一种有效且无需额外推理调用的置信度提取方法，解决了LLM-as-Judge系统中置信度信号的可用性和校准问题，在多种模型和场景下表现稳定，且具备跨模型迁移能力和可扩展性。

Abstract: LLM-as-Judge systems are widely deployed for automated evaluation, yet practitioners lack reliable methods to know when a judge's verdict should be trusted. Token log-probabilities, the standard post-hoc confidence signal, are unavailable for many commercial LLMs and, even when accessible, saturate above 0.999 with structured JSON output.
  We introduce VERDI (VERification-Decomposed Inference), a method that extracts confidence from the reasoning trace a structured judge already produces, with no additional inference calls. VERDI decomposes each verification-style evaluation into sub-checks and derives three structural signals: Step-Verdict Alignment, Claim-Level Margin, and Evidence Grounding Score. We combine them with Platt-scaled logistic regression.
  On three public benchmarks, VERDI achieves AUROC 0.72-0.91 on GPT-4.1-mini and 0.66-0.80 on GPT-5.4-mini. On Qwen3.5-4B/9B/27B, where answer-token logprobs are anti-calibrated (higher confidence on errors, AUROC 0.32-0.49), VERDI achieves 0.56-0.70. We additionally validate on a production system with eight rubrics (AUROC 0.73-0.88 on factual rubrics), demonstrate cross-model transfer (AUROC 0.66-0.69), and show that a 33M-parameter NLI (Natural Language Inference) model provides a scalable alternative to regex extraction.

</details>


### [323] [A Comparative Study of Federated Learning Aggregation Strategies under Homogeneous and Heterogeneous Data Distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11010)
*Antonios Makris,Christos Dousis,Emmanouil Kritharakis,Stavros Bouras,Konstantinos Tserpes*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对联邦学习中多种聚合策略在同质和异质数据分布下进行了全面的实验比较，分析了不同聚合机制对模型精度、损失和系统效率的影响，发现聚合策略的效果因数据集特征和操作条件而异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习的性能受服务器端聚合策略的强烈影响，但目前缺乏对这些策略在不同数据分布下的系统性实验比较。

Method: 在基准图像分类数据集上，对多种联邦聚合策略进行实验对比，涵盖同质和异质数据分布，评估集中式精度、损失、聚合时间、训练时间和通信时间等指标。

Result: 不同聚合策略在不同数据集和数据分布下表现出明显的权衡关系，其有效性取决于数据集特征和操作条件。

Conclusion: 聚合策略的选择需要根据具体的数据集特性和数据分布情况进行调整，不存在通用的最优策略。

Abstract: Federated Learning has emerged as a transformative paradigm for collaborative machine learning across distributed environments. However, its performance is strongly influenced by the aggregation strategy used to combine local model updates at the server, which directly affects learning performance, robustness, and system behavior. This work presents a comprehensive experimental comparison of widely used federated aggregation strategies under both homogeneous and heterogeneous data distributions. Using benchmark image classification datasets, we analyze how different aggregation mechanisms respond to varying degrees of data heterogeneity, examining their impact on centralized accuracy and loss, and system-level efficiency metrics, including aggregation, training, and communication time. The results demonstrate that aggregation strategies exhibit distinct trade-offs across datasets and data distributions, with their effectiveness varying according to dataset characteristics and operating conditions.

</details>


### [324] [LoopUS: Recasting Pretrained LLMs into Looped Latent Refinement Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11011)
*Taekhyun Park,Yongjae Lee,Dohee Kim,Hyerim Bae*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LoopUS是一种后训练框架，能将标准预训练LLM转换为循环架构，通过稳定潜在循环提升推理性能，而无需从头训练或扩展生成轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有循环计算方法要么需要从头训练循环模型，要么需要破坏性改造，计算成本高且可能损害预训练能力。LoopUS旨在解决这些限制，提供低成本的后训练转换方案。

Method: LoopUS将预训练LLM重构为编码器、循环推理块和解码器三部分，包含四个核心组件：(1) 基于阶段表示动态的块分解；(2) 输入依赖的选择门控缓解隐状态漂移；(3) 随机深度监督实现长递归记忆高效学习；(4) 置信度头支持自适应早期退出。

Result: 在不扩展生成轨迹或需要从头训练的情况下，提升了面向推理的性能。

Conclusion: LoopUS成功将标准非循环模型转换为稳定的循环形式，有效提升了推理性能，为低成本增强LLM推理能力提供了新路径。

Abstract: Looped computation shows promise in improving the reasoning-oriented performance of LLMs by scaling test-time compute. However, existing approaches typically require either training recurrent models from scratch or applying disruptive retrofits, which involve substantial computational costs and may compromise pretrained capabilities. To address these limitations, we introduce \textbf{Looped Depth Up-Scaling} (LoopUS), a post-training framework that converts a standard pretrained LLM into a looped architecture. As a key technical contribution, LoopUS recasts the pretrained LLM into an encoder, a looped reasoning block, and a decoder. It operationalizes this latent-refinement architecture through four core components: (1) block decomposition, guided by staged representation dynamics; (2) an input-dependent selective gate to mitigate hidden-state drift; (3) random deep supervision for memory-efficient learning over long recursive horizons; and (4) a confidence head for adaptive early exiting. Collectively, these mechanisms transform a standard non-looped model into a looped form while stabilizing it against both computational bottlenecks and representation collapse. Through stable latent looping, LoopUS improves reasoning-oriented performance without extending the generated traces or requiring recurrent training from scratch. For more details, see https://thrillcrazyer.github.io/LoopUS

</details>


### [325] [Test-Time Compute for Dense Retrieval: Agentic Program Generation with Frozen Embedding Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11374)
*Han Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，通过在推理阶段对冻结的小型嵌入模型进行额外的计算（如softmax加权质心插值），可以显著提升其检索性能，且无需重新训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战"测试时计算仅对大型推理模型有益"的普遍认知，探索是否能让小型冻结的嵌入模型也通过额外推理计算受益。

Method: 使用代理程序搜索循环，探索259个候选推理程序，在冻结的嵌入API上迭代90代，最终发现一个参数免费的默认算法：softmax加权的局部top-K文档质心与查询插值。

Result: 该算法在7个嵌入模型族（参数规模横跨10倍范围）上均显著提升nDCG@10，且在完整BEIR验证集上每个模型都得到提升。

Conclusion: 测试时计算不仅能提升大型推理模型，也能有效提升小型冻结的嵌入模型，且最优方案简单、参数免费、泛化性强。

Abstract: Test-time compute is widely believed to benefit only large reasoning models. We show it also helps small embedding models. Most modern embedding checkpoints are distilled from large LLM backbones and inherit their representation space; a frozen embedding model should therefore benefit from extra inference compute without retraining. Using an agentic program-search loop, we explore 259 candidate inference programs over a frozen embedding API across ninety generations. The entire Pareto frontier collapses onto a single algebra: a softmax-weighted centroid of the local top-K documents interpolated with the query. This parameter-free default lifts nDCG@10 statistically significantly across seven embedding-model families spanning a tenfold parameter range, with held-out full-BEIR validation confirming the lift on every model tested.

</details>


### [326] [Backbone-Equated Diffusion OOD via Sparse Internal Snapshots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11014)
*Yadang Alexis Rouzoumka,Jean Pinsolle,Eugénie Terreaux,Christèle Morisseau,Jean-Philippe Ovarlez,Chengfang Ren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MBE协议和CFS检测器系列，证明冻结核扩散模型中的OOD信号集中在少量稀疏内部激活中，无需完整去噪轨迹或高容量头部。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型OOD检测器之间的公平比较困难，因为结论会因骨干网络选择、噪声参数化和测试时预算而异。需要统一的协议实现公平比较。

Method: 1) 提出Mutualized Backbone-Equated (MBE)协议，对齐不同扩散骨干的规范噪声水平和逻辑测试时成本；2) 提出Canonical Feature Snapshots (CFS)检测器族，仅使用少量冻结扩散骨干的内部激活进行OOD检测。

Result: 在CIFAR规模基准上，最强单次前向CFS变体为CFS(1x2)；较小解码器-only变体也极具竞争力。说明OOD信号集中在少量稀疏内部状态。

Conclusion: OOD信号主要来自少量稀疏内部激活而非完整去噪轨迹；通过条件编码器-解码器互补性、对角分数分离和低噪声稳定性等理论解释观察结果。

Abstract: Fair comparison between diffusion-based OOD detectors is challenging, as conclusions can vary with backbone choice, corruption parameterization, and test-time budget. We address this issue through a Mutualized Backbone-Equated (MBE) protocol that aligns canonical corruption levels and logical test-time cost across diffusion backbones. Within this setting, we introduce Canonical Feature Snapshots (CFS), a family of detectors that probes a frozen diffusion backbone using only a tiny number of native internal activations at canonical low-noise levels. On a controlled CIFAR-scale benchmark, the strongest one-forward CFS variant is CFS(1x2), while an even smaller decoder-only variant remains highly competitive. This shows that much of the relative-OOD signal exposed by frozen diffusion backbones is concentrated in a small number of sparse internal states, rather than requiring full denoising trajectories or high-capacity downstream heads. We further provide a local diagnostic theory explaining these observations through conditional encoder-decoder complementarity, diagonal-score separation, and low-noise corruption stability. The official implementation is available at https://github.com/RouzAY/cfs-diffusion-ood/.

</details>


### [327] [Enabling Performant and Flexible Model-Internal Observability for LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11093)
*Nengneng Yu,Sixian Xiong,Yibo Zhao,Wei Wang,Zaoxing Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DMI-Lib 是一个高速深度模型检查器，通过异步可观测性子系统实现内部状态的低开销实时访问，仅引入 0.4%-6.8% 的离线批推理开销和平均 6% 的在线服务开销，相比基线方法延迟降低 2-15 倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前推理工作负载日益依赖对模型内部状态的及时访问，但现有方案缺乏将内部可观测性作为一等公民的系统原语设计，导致与推理热路径耦合紧密、开销较高。

Method: 提出 DMI-Lib，包含：(1) 异步可观测性子系统，将观测与推理热路径解耦；(2) Ring²，一种 GPU-CPU 内存抽象，用于捕获和暂存张量；(3) 策略控制的主机后端，负责导出数据。支持在丰富内部信号和多样推理后端中灵活部署观测点。

Result: 离线批推理开销仅 0.4%-6.8%，在线服务平均开销 6%，延迟相比现有基线降低 2-15 倍。

Conclusion: DMI-Lib 有效实现了低开销、高灵活性的模型内部状态可观测性，适合实际生产环境中的推理监控与调试需求。

Abstract: Today's inference-time workloads increasingly depend on timely access to a model's internal states. We present DMI-Lib, a high-speed deep model inspector that treats internal observability as a first-class systems primitive, decoupling it from the inference hot path via an asynchronous observability substrate built from Ring^2, a GPU-CPU memory abstraction for capturing and staging tensors, and a policy-controlled host backend that exports them. DMI-Lib enables the placement of observation points across a rich space of internal signals and diverse inference backends while preserving serving optimizations and adhering to tight GPU memory budgets. Our experiments demonstrate that DMI-Lib incurs only 0.4%--6.8% overhead in offline batch inference and an average of 6% in moderate online serving, reducing latency overhead by 2x-15x compared to existing baselines with similar observability features. DMI-Lib is open-sourced at https://github.com/ProjectDMX/DMI.

</details>


### [328] [Efficient LLM Reasoning via Variational Posterior Guidance with Efficiency Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11019)
*Zizhao Chen,Yuying Li,Siting Lin,Lianxi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对大模型推理中的过度思考问题，本文提出VPG-EA框架，通过变分推理将后验分布（参考答案引导）的高效模式蒸馏到先验策略中，在不牺牲性能的前提下显著提升推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法通过设计精细的奖励函数来压缩推理链，但导致高质量样本在探索空间中极其稀疏，造成先验策略的采样瓶颈。

Method: 1. 理论上证明后验分布（由参考答案引导）比先验分布具有更高的期望效用。2. 将高效推理形式化为变分推理问题，提出效率感知的ELBO。3. 提出VPG-EA框架：参数共享的双流架构实例化后验与先验；通过交叉视角评估过滤伪高效路径；通过变分蒸馏将后验的高效模式单向迁移到先验。

Result: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B和7B上，综合效率指标ε³分别提升8.73%和12.37%，超越各规模最强基线。

Conclusion: 基于变分推理的后验蒸馏策略能够有效突破采样瓶颈，在不损害推理质量的前提下实现高效推理。

Abstract: Although large language models rely on chain-of-thought for complex reasoning, the overthinking phenomenon severely degrades inference efficiency. Existing reinforcement learning methods compress reasoning chains by designing elaborate reward functions, which renders high-quality samples extremely sparse in the exploration space and creates a sampling bottleneck for the prior policy. Inspired by cognitive science, we theoretically prove that a posterior distribution guided by reference answers achieves higher expected utility than the prior distribution, thus capable of breaking through the sampling bottleneck of high-quality samples. However, the posterior distribution is unavailable during inference. To this end, we formalize efficient reasoning as a variational inference problem and introduce an efficiency-aware evidence lower bound as the theoretical foundation. Based on this, we propose the VPG-EA framework.
