OverNaN is intended for practitioners working with small, incomplete, and imbalanced datasets in scientific and engineering domains where missingness is unavoidable and often informative.

</details>


### [403] [FERMI: Exploiting Relations for Membership Inference Against Tabular Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11527)
*Abtin Mahyar,Masoumeh Shafieinejad,Yuhan Liu,Xi He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FERMI方法，利用多表关系信息增强单表特征，实现对扩散模型生成的表格数据更有效的成员推断攻击，在白盒和黑盒设置下分别提升最高53%和22%的TPR@0.1FPR。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有成员推断攻击仅针对单表场景，忽略了真实敏感数据中的多表关联结构，导致隐私风险评估不准确。

Method: 提出FERMI方法，通过特征映射（Feature-mapping）将目标记录所在关系表的关联信息（如父表信号）转化为单表可用的特征，从而在仅目标表属性可观测的情况下利用多表关系信息进行成员推断。

Result: 在三种表格扩散架构和三个真实关系数据集上，FERMI在白盒设置下TPR@0.1FPR最高提升53%，黑盒设置下提升22%。

Conclusion: 多表关系信息对成员推断攻击有显著增益，现有单表隐私评估方法可能低估隐私风险，未来隐私保护需考虑多表关联场景。

Abstract: Diffusion models are the leading approach for tabular data synthesis and are increasingly used to share sensitive records. Whether they actually protect privacy has become a pressing question. Membership inference attacks are the standard tool for this purpose, yet existing attacks assume a single-table setting and ignore the multi-relational structure of real sensitive data. A core challenge in assessing privacy risks from membership inference attacks in multi-table settings is how to leverage auxiliary information from relations associated with the target table, such as its parent tables. Particularly, we study a practical setting in which such auxiliary information is available only when training the attack model. At inference time, the attacker observes only the attribute values of the target record from the target table. We propose FERMI (FEature-mapping for Relational Membership Inference), which resolves this gap by enriching single-table features with relational membership signal. Across three tabular diffusion architectures and three real-world relational datasets, FERMI consistently improves attack performance over single-table baselines, with TPR@$0.1$FPR rising by up to 53% over the single-table baseline in the white-box setting and 22% in the black-box setting.

</details>


### [404] [Multi-Narrow Transformation as a Single-Model Ensemble: Boundary Conditions, Mechanisms, and Failure Modes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11530)
*Tatsuhito Hasegawa,Taisei Tanaka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在参数预算大致匹配的条件下，是将模型容量集中在一个宽路径（Single-Wide）还是分散到多个窄路径（Multi-Narrow）组成的单模型集成（SME）中更有效。通过Multi-Narrow（MN）变换将基线CNN转化为多窄分支SME，发现MN的效果高度依赖于数据量：低数据场景下高划分的MN表现优异，而高数据场景下基线宽模型更优。原因在于高MN模型能学习更多样化、更少冗余的路径特征，低数据时多样性提升泛化，高数据时训练不平衡导致路径支配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单模型集成（SME）虽能在单网络中近似深度集成的优势，但在参数预算有限时，应如何分配模型能力——集中在一个宽路径还是分散到多个窄路径——这一问题尚未明确。

Method: 提出Multi-Narrow（MN）变换，将基线CNN转化为多个窄的、路径独立的分支组成的SME，同时大致保持原始参数预算。在多种数据规模、架构和数据集上系统比较Single-Wide和Multi-Narrow配置。

Result: MN的有效性高度依赖数据量：低数据时高度划分的MN显著优于基线；高数据时基线宽模型更优。该趋势在多种CNN架构和图像分类数据集上被复现。内部表征分析显示高MN模型路径特征更多样且冗余更少。

Conclusion: 低数据场景下MN的多样性广泛被利用并提升泛化，高数据场景下训练变得不平衡，预测被少数路径主导。研究为在有限预算下分配模型容量（宽度与成员数量之间）提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Single-model ensembles (SMEs) have attracted attention as a way to approximate some of the benefits of deep ensembles within a single network. However, under an approximately matched parameter budget, it remains unclear whether model capacity should be concentrated in a single wide pathway or redistributed into many narrow and independent members. We investigate this question through the Multi-Narrow (MN) transformation, which converts a baseline CNN into an SME of narrow, path-wise independent branches while approximately preserving the dominant parameter budget. We systematically compare Single-Wide and Multi-Narrow configurations across different training-data regimes, architectures, and datasets. The results show that the effectiveness of MN is strongly data-dependent: weakly partitioned or baseline-wide models are preferable in data-rich settings, whereas highly partitioned MN models consistently outperform the baseline in low-data settings. This tendency is reproduced across multiple CNN architectures and image-classification datasets, suggesting that it is not specific to a single benchmark or model family. Analysis of internal representations shows that high-MN models learn more diverse and less redundant path-wise features. In low-data regimes, this diversity is broadly utilized and improves generalization, whereas in data-rich regimes, training becomes imbalanced and prediction is dominated by a small subset of paths. These findings clarify when and why Multi-Narrow transformation is effective, and provide practical guidance for allocating model capacity between width and member multiplicity under a limited budget.

</details>


### [405] [Entropy Polarity in Reinforcement Fine-Tuning: Direction, Asymmetry, and Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11775)
*Jiazheng Zhang,Ziche Fu,Junrui Shen,Yunbin Zhao,Yunke Zhang,Zhiheng Xi,Long Ma,Chenxin An,Zhihao Zhang,Shichun Liu,Dingwei Zhu,Shihan Dou,Shaofan Liu,Han Li,Wiggin Zhou,Aiden Adams,Tao Gui,Fei Huang,Qi Zhang,Xuanjing Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出熵极性（entropy polarity）概念，揭示RLVR中token级别策略更新对熵的扩张/收缩影响，并据此提出PAPO算法，通过优势重加权实现自适应熵控制，在数学推理和智能体任务上超越基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有熵感知方法主要通过全局目标调控熵，但token级别的策略更新如何重塑熵的机制尚未被探索。

Method: 1. 建立RLVR中熵力学的理论框架，推导熵变化的一阶近似，得到熵极性（带符号的token级量）；2. 发现结构不对称性：高频高概率token倾向于收缩熵，低概率token或强分布校正才能扩张熵；3. 提出PAPO，通过优势重加权保留正负极性分支，并利用在线熵轨迹自适应分配优化压力。

Result: 熵极性可可靠预测熵变化；正负极性分支在保持探索与加强利用中互补；PAPO在数学推理和智能体基准上持续超越强基线，训练效率更高，奖励提升显著。

Conclusion: 本文从token级熵力学角度揭示了RLVR中熵调控的内在机制，PAPO算法通过自适应极性重加权有效平衡了探索与利用。

Abstract: Policy entropy has emerged as a fundamental measure for understanding and controlling exploration in reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for LLMs. However, existing entropy-aware methods mainly regulate entropy through global objectives, while the token-level mechanism by which sampled policy updates reshape policy entropy remains underexplored. In this work, we develop a theoretical framework of entropy mechanics in RLVR. Our analysis yields a first-order approximation of the entropy change, giving rise to entropy polarity, a signed token-level quantity that predicts how much a sampled update expands or contracts entropy. This analysis further reveals a structural asymmetry: reinforcing frequent high-probability tokens triggers contraction tendencies, whereas expansive tendencies typically require lower-probability samples or stronger distributional correction. Empirically, we show that entropy polarity reliably predicts entropy changes, and that positive and negative polarity branches play complementary roles in preserving exploration while strengthening exploitation. Building on these insights, we propose Polarity-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO), which preserves both polarity branches and implements entropy control through advantage reweighting. With the empirical entropy trajectory as an online phase signal, PAPO adaptively reallocates optimization pressure between entropy-expanding and entropy-contracting updates. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and agentic benchmarks show that PAPO consistently outperforms competitive baselines, while delivering superior training efficiency and substantial reward improvements.

</details>


### [406] [Primal-Dual Policy Optimization for Linear CMDPs with Adversarial Losses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11535)
*Kihyun Yu,Seoungbin Bae,Dabeen Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出首个针对在线有限时域对抗性线性CMDP的原始-对偶策略优化算法，在损失函数为对抗性（全信息反馈）、成本为随机（赌博机反馈）的设定下，实现了$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(K^{3/4})$的次线性遗憾和约束违反界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有线性CMDP工作主要针对随机环境（损失和成本固定或来自固定分布），无法应对对抗性变化的环境。本文旨在填补在线对抗性线性CMDP这一空白。

Method: 提出加权LogSumExp softmax策略族；设计原始-对偶策略优化算法，包含两个关键组件：周期性策略混合（periodic policy mixing）和正则化对偶更新（regularized dual update）；通过新的覆盖数论证来理论分析。

Result: 在对抗性损失（全信息反馈）和随机成本（赌博机反馈）的线性CMDP设定下，首次实现$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(K^{3/4})$的次线性遗憾和约束违反界。

Conclusion: 通过理论分析和数值实验验证了算法的有效性，表明所提方法能有效应对对抗性环境中的线性约束MDP问题。

Abstract: Existing work on linear constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs) has primarily focused on stochastic settings, where the losses and costs are either fixed or drawn from fixed distributions. However, such formulations are inherently vulnerable to adversarially changing environments. To overcome this limitation, we propose a primal-dual policy optimization algorithm for online finite-horizon {adversarial} linear CMDPs, where the losses are adversarially chosen under full-information feedback and the costs are stochastic under bandit feedback. Our algorithm is the \emph{first} to achieve sublinear regret and constraint violation bounds in this setting, both bounded by $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(K^{3/4})$, where $K$ denotes the number of episodes. The algorithm introduces and runs with a new class of policies, which we call weighted LogSumExp softmax policies, designed to adapt to adversarially chosen loss functions. Our main result stems from the following key contributions: (i) a new covering number argument for the weighted LogSumExp softmax policies, and (ii) two novel algorithmic components -- periodic policy mixing and a regularized dual update -- which allow us to effectively control both the covering number and the dual variable. We also report numerical results that validate our theoretical findings on the performance of the algorithm.

</details>


### [407] [ROMER: Expert Replacement and Router Calibration for Robust MoE LLMs on Analog Compute-in-Memory Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11800)
*Wenyong Zhou,Yuannuo Feng,Yizhe Chen,Taiqiang Wu,Wendong Xu,Wenbo Qi,Zhengwu Liu,Wang Kang,Ngai Wong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了噪声环境下基于混合专家架构的大语言模型，发现硬件噪声会破坏专家负载平衡并导致路由决策失效，提出了名为ROMER的后训练校准框架，通过替换激活不足的专家和标准化路由logits来恢复性能，在多个模型上将困惑度降低高达59.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管MoE架构的LLM通过稀疏激活实现了可扩展性，但其频繁的专家切换导致内存带宽瓶颈，计算存储一体架构可以缓解此问题。然而，模拟CIM系统存在硬件缺陷会扰动存储的权重，其对MoE模型的影响尚未被探索，因此需要填补这一研究空白。

Method: 提出ROMER后训练校准框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 用高频专家替换激活不足的专家以恢复负载平衡；(2) 通过基于百分位数的归一化重新校准路由器logits，以稳定噪声环境下的路由决策。噪声模型基于真实芯片测量校准。

Result: 在DeepSeek-MoE、Qwen-MoE和OLMoE上，ROMER在真实芯片噪声条件下分别将困惑度降低了58.6%、58.8%和59.8%，并在多个基准测试中验证了其有效性和泛化能力。

Conclusion: 硬件噪声会严重干扰MoE模型的专家负载平衡和路由决策，ROMER能够有效缓解这一问题，且对不同的MoE架构具有通用性，为MoE模型在CIM硬件上的实际部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) with mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures achieve remarkable scalability by sparsely activating a subset of experts per token, yet their frequent expert switching creates memory bandwidth bottlenecks that compute-in-memory (CIM) architectures are well-suited to mitigate. However, analog CIM systems suffer from inherent hardware imperfections that perturb stored weights, and its negative impact on MoE-based LLMs in noisy CIM environments remains unexplored. In this work, we present the first systematic investigation of MoE-based LLMs under noise model calibrated with real chip measurements, revealing that hardware noise critically disrupts expert load balance and renders clean-trained routing decisions consistently suboptimal. Based on these findings, we propose ROMER, a post-training calibration framework that (1) replaces underactivated experts with high-frequency ones to restore load balance, and (2) recalibrates router logits via percentile-based normalization to stabilize routing under noise. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that ROMER achieves up to 58.6\%, 58.8\%, and 59.8\% reduction in perplexity under real-chip noise conditions for DeepSeek-MoE, Qwen-MoE, and OLMoE, respectively, establishing its effectiveness and generalizability across diverse MoE architectures.

</details>


### [408] [Fast MoE Inference via Predictive Prefetching and Expert Replication](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11537)
*Ankit Jyothish,Ali Jannesari,Aishwarya Sarkar,Joseph Zuber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种动态专家复制策略，通过预测过载专家并复制它们来处理后续批次的token，从而提升MoE架构的GPU利用率、减少负载不均衡和推理延迟，在Switch-base模型上实现约3倍推理加速且保持90-95%的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE推理存在GPU利用率低、负载不均衡、延迟高的问题，原因是专家激活稀疏导致多个token等待同一专家计算。

Method: 提出动态专家复制策略：预测可能过载的专家，复制它们用于后续批次token，复制的专家跨层并发处理批次token，从而改善并行性。

Result: 在Switch-base-128和Switch-base-256上实验，达到接近100%的GPU利用率，推理速度提升最高3倍，同时保持约90-95%的基线性能。

Conclusion: 动态专家复制策略有效解决了MoE推理中的负载不均衡和GPU利用率低问题，在保持大部分性能的同时显著加速推理。

Abstract: The Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture has become a fundamental building block in state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs), improving domain-specific expertise in LLMs and scaling model capacity without proportionally increasing their computational overhead. However, MoE inference often suffers from suboptimal GPU utilization, load imbalance, and elevated latency arising from multiple tokens waiting on the same experts for their computation which arises from sparsity of expert activation. To address these challenges, we propose a dynamic expert replication strategy that predicts which experts are likely to be overloaded and replicates them for upcoming batches of tokens. The replicated experts process batch tokens concurrently across layers, which leads to improved parallelism, shorter GPU idle time, and significantly faster inference. Experimental evaluations conducted on large-scale MoE models, including Switch-base-128 and Switch-base-256, demonstrate that our method achieves near-complete GPU utilization (approx 100%), leading to upto 3x improvement in inference speed while preserving approximately 90-95% of the performance of baseline architectures

</details>


### [409] [More Edits, More Stable: Understanding the Lifelong Normalization in Sequential Model Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11836)
*Xin Ma,Wei Chen,Qi Liu,Derong Xu,Zhi Zheng,Tong Xu,Enhong Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对终身模型编辑中的灾难性遗忘和模型崩溃问题，揭示了核心策略"终身归一化(LN)"的稳定机制，从理论上证明了其通过自增强稳定循环、渐近正交性和有界范数来缓解遗忘，并基于此提出改进方法StableEdit，通过显式预热阶段和完全白化进一步增强稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 终身模型编辑面临灾难性遗忘和模型崩溃两大难题，而现有方法中广泛使用的终身归一化(LN)策略虽有效但机制不明确，像"黑箱"一样难以理解其在长期稳定性中的精确作用。

Method: 首先对LN进行理论分析，揭示其自增强稳定循环机制，证明结合岭正则化回归时LN能使参数更新具有渐近正交性和有界范数。基于此提出StableEdit，通过显式预热阶段和完全白化来增强这一稳定循环。

Result: 实验验证了理论分析的正确性，StableEdit在长期稳定性上表现优异，且计算开销极小。

Conclusion: 首次为终身归一化提供了理论解释，证明其通过自增强稳定循环缓解遗忘和崩溃，StableEdit进一步强化了这一机制，为终身模型编辑提供了更稳定的解决方案。

Abstract: Lifelong Model Editing aims to continuously update evolving facts in Large Language Models while preserving unrelated knowledge and general capabilities, yet it remains plagued by catastrophic forgetting and model collapse. Empirically, we find that recent editors resilient over long horizons share the same core strategy: Lifelong Normalization (LN), which normalizes value gradients using running statistics. Removing LN causes immediate performance collapse, and we observe a counter-intuitive positive cumulative effect where early edits can promote the success of future edits. Yet the mechanism of LN remains a "black box", leaving its precise role in lifelong stability poorly understood. In this work, we provide the first theoretical account of LN in the lifelong regime. Our analysis reveals a self-reinforcing stability loop and proves that, when combined with ridge-regularized regression, LN yields parameter updates with asymptotic orthogonality and bounded norms, directly mitigating forgetting and systemic collapse. Based on these insights, we derive StableEdit, which strengthens this stability loop via an explicit warm-up stage and full whitening, improving long-horizon stability at minimal overhead. Extensive experiments validate our theory and demonstrate competitive performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/MINE-USTC/StableEdit.

</details>


### [410] [Sharpen Your Flow: Sharpness-Aware Sampling for Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11547)
*Aditi Gupta,Soon Hoe Lim,Annan Yu,N. Benjamin Erichson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SharpEuler是一种无需训练的采样器，通过离线估计预训练流匹配模型中速度场变化最剧烈的区域，生成非均匀时间步长网格，在不增加模型评估次数的前提下提升采样质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流匹配模型生成样本需要多次神经网络评估，如何在固定评估预算内有效分配计算资源是关键问题——不仅是如何积分流，更在于采样器应将预算花在哪些时间步上。

Method: 离线校准：沿校准轨迹用有限差分估计速度场变化最剧烈的位置，构建求解器感知的sharpness轮廓；平滑后通过分位数变换转换为任意预算的时间步网格；测试时使用与均匀调度相同数量的欧拉积分步数。

Result: 在固定预算下改善了样本质量，减少了模态间泄漏（inter-mode leakage），增加了模态覆盖率（mode coverage）。

Conclusion: SharpEuler通过数值原理（加速度是离散化误差主源）、变分原理（基于sharpness的幂律时间步密度）和统计保证（有限样本校准在终端分布层面稳定）三个原则得到了理论支撑。

Abstract: Flow matching models generate samples by numerically integrating a learned velocity field, with each integration step requiring a neural network evaluation. Fast generation therefore requires using a small fixed evaluation budget effectively: the key question is not only how to integrate the flow, but where the sampler should spend its steps. We propose SharpEuler, a training-free sampler that profiles a pretrained model offline by estimating where the learned velocity field changes most rapidly along calibration trajectories. This finite-difference estimate defines a solver-aware sharpness profile, which is smoothed and converted by a quantile transform into a timestep grid for any desired inference budget. At test time, sampling remains ordinary Euler integration with the same number of model evaluations as a uniform schedule. We justify SharpEuler using three principles: a numerical principle identifying trajectory acceleration as the leading source of Euler discretization error, a variational principle deriving sharpness-based power-law timestep densities, and a statistical guarantee showing that the finite-sample calibrated sampler is stable at the terminal distribution level. Our experiments show that SharpEuler improves sample quality at fixed budgets, reducing inter-mode leakage and increasing mode coverage.

</details>


### [411] [GEAR: Granularity-Adaptive Advantage Reweighting for LLM Agents via Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11853)
*Sijia Li,Yuchen Huang,Zifan Liu,Yanping Li,Jingjing Fu,Li Zhao,Jiang Bian,Ling Zhang,Jun Zhang,Rui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GEAR框架，通过自适应粒度的信用分配（基于自蒸馏的token级和segment级信号）来改进GRPO优势估计，在数学推理和工具使用任务上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习作为LLM agent的post-training方法通常只使用粗粒度的outcome-level奖励，缺乏细粒度的信用分配机制，难以在长程轨迹中准确分配局部信用。

Method: 提出GEAR框架：通过on-policy学生与ground-truth条件教师之间的自蒸馏获得参考引导的散度信号，该散度在语义偏离起始点出现尖峰。以这些尖峰作为自适应信用区域锚点，对齐时保留token级分辨率，偏离时将连续片段分组为自适应segment并用散度调制其优势。

Result: 在8个数学推理和agentic工具使用基准上与Qwen3 4B和8B模型实验，GEAR一致优于标准GRPO、自蒸馏基线和token/segment级信用分配方法。在GRPO基线准确率较低的基准上提升达20%。

Conclusion: 自适应粒度优势重加权方案在挑战性长程任务中尤为有效，为LLM agent的细粒度信用分配提供了可行方向。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a widely used post-training approach for LLM agents, where training commonly relies on outcome-level rewards that provide only coarse supervision. While finer-grained credit assignment is promising for effective policy updates, obtaining reliable local credit and assigning it to the right parts of the long-horizon trajectory remains an open challenge. In this paper, we propose Granularity-adaptivE Advantage Reweighting (GEAR), an adaptive-granularity credit assignment framework that reshapes the trajectory-level GRPO advantage using token- and segment-level signals derived from self-distillation. GEAR compares an on-policy student with a ground-truth-conditioned teacher to obtain a reference-guided divergence signal for identifying adaptive segment boundaries and modulating local advantage weights. This divergence often spikes at the onset of a semantic deviation, while later tokens in the same autoregressive continuation may return to low divergence. GEAR therefore treats such spikes as anchors for adaptive credit regions: where the student remains aligned with the teacher, token-level resolution is preserved; where it departs, GEAR groups the corresponding continuation into an adaptive segment and uses the divergence at the departure point to modulate the segment' s advantage. Experiments across eight mathematical reasoning and agentic tool-use benchmarks with Qwen3 4B and 8B models show that GEAR consistently outperforms standard GRPO, self-distillation-only baselines, and token- or turn-level credit-assignment methods. The gains are especially strong on benchmarks with lower GRPO baseline accuracy, reaching up to around 20\% over GRPO, suggesting that the proposed adaptive reweighting scheme is especially useful in more challenging long-horizon settings.

</details>


### [412] [VNDUQE: Information-Theoretic Novelty Detection using Deep Variational Information Bottleneck](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11551)
*Aryan Gondkar,Hayder Radha,Yiming Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出VNDUQE方法，利用深度变分信息瓶颈（VIB）进行OOD检测，通过KL散度和预测熵两种信息论度量实现远近OOD的互补检测，在MNIST上取得95.3%平均AUROC，相比MSP提升32个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最大softmax概率（MSP）基线缺乏理论基础且校准不良，需要更可靠的OOD检测方法以保障神经网络在安全关键应用中的部署。

Method: 基于深度变分信息瓶颈（VIB）框架，显式约束表示中的信息流；训练时在MNIST上保留部分数字类别，测试时利用KL散度和预测熵进行OOD检测，并采用并行策略结合两者。

Result: KL散度在远OOD（噪声）上达100% AUROC；预测熵在近OOD（新数字类别）上达94.7% AUROC；并行策略平均AUROC 95.3%，TPR@5%FPR为92%，比MSP提升32个百分点；VIB压缩（β=10⁻³）将ECE降低38%。

Conclusion: 信息论约束能产生根本上更可靠的不确定性估计，支持主动学习中基于校准的异常检测阈值选择，为昂贵计算oracle的查询提供原则性方法。

Abstract: Detecting out-of-distribution (OOD) samples is critical for safe deployment of neural networks in safety-critical applications. While maximum softmax probability (MSP) provides a simple baseline, it lacks theoretical grounding and suffers from miscalibration. We propose VNDUQE (VIB-based Novelty Detection and Uncertainty Quantification for Nondestructive Evaluation), which investigates novelty detection through the Deep Variational Information Bottleneck (VIB), which explicitly constrains information flow through learned representations. We train VIB models on MNIST with held-out digit classes and evaluate OOD detection using information-theoretic metrics: KL divergence and prediction entropy. Our results reveal complementary detection signals: KL divergence achieves perfect detection (100\% AUROC on noise) on far-OOD samples (noise, domain shift), while prediction entropy excels at near-OOD detection (94.7\% AUROC on novel digit classes). A parallel detection strategy combining both metrics achieves 95.3\% average AUROC and 92\% true positive rate at 5\% false positive rate, which is a 32 percentage point improvement over baseline MSP (85.0\% AUROC, 60.1\% TPR). Compression via the information bottleneck principle ($β=10^{-3}$) reduces Expected Calibration Error by 38\%, demonstrating that information-theoretic constraints produce fundamentally more reliable uncertainty estimates. These findings directly support active learning with expensive computational oracles, where well-calibrated novelty detection enables principled threshold selection for oracle queries.

</details>


### [413] [A Controlled Counterexample to Strong Proxy-Based Explanations of OOD Performance: in a Fixed Pretraining-and-Probing Setup](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11554)
*Hongmin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明任务无关的结构代理（如epiplexity）对预训练语料库的排序可能与下游OOD准确率排序相反，说明结构代理可能无法追踪任务相关的关键结构，即使是在受控设置中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望检验任务无关的结构代理是否必须与下游OOD探针准确率排序一致，以验证其作为预训练迁移解释工具的有效性边界。

Method: 首先进行理论构造，分离形式结构量、操作代理和目标任务相关结构；然后在合成序列模型实验中，使用三种随机种子，比较结构代理排序与OOD准确率排序的一致性。

Result: 在主要全样本评估下，三种种子中有两种出现OOD准确率排序与代理排序相反的现象；辅助诊断和消融实验支持相同的解释。

Conclusion: 结构代理可以失效：代理衡量的是总学习结构，但OOD性能由任务相关结构驱动，两者可能不一致。但这并不否定所有结构解释，而是划定了强代理解释的边界。

Abstract: Task-agnostic structure proxies are often used to interpret why one pretraining corpus transfers better than another, but such explanations require the proxy to track the structure that matters for the downstream task. We test this requirement in a fixed pretraining-and-probing setup motivated by computationally bounded notions of learned structure, including epiplexity. The core question is whether a proxy ranking of two pretraining datasets must agree with their ranking by OOD probe accuracy. We show that it need not. First, we give a controlled construction in which a formal structure quantity, its operational proxy, and the task-relevant structure for a target family separate. We then instantiate the same mechanism in a synthetic sequence-model experiment: under the primary all-sample evaluation, the OOD accuracy ranking reverses the proxy ranking in two of three seeds, with auxiliary diagnostics and ablations supporting the same interpretation. The counterexample does not reject structure-based explanations in general; it identifies a boundary on strong proxy-based explanations. A proxy for total learned structure can fail to track the task-relevant structure that drives OOD performance, even in a controlled setting.

</details>


### [414] [A Composite Activation Function for Learning Stable Binary Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11558)
*Seokhun Park,Choeun Kim,Kwanho Lee,Sehyun Park,Insung Kong,Yongdai Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种光滑的Heaviside激活函数近似——重尾激活函数(HTAF)，通过sigmoid-tanh复合构造实现稳定梯度训练，并基于此设计了可解释的隐式概念瓶颈模型(ICBM)，在多种神经网络架构上实现了与标准模型相当或更优的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Heaviside激活函数（阶跃函数）具有计算高效、内存节省和可解释性等优势，但其非可微性阻碍了基于梯度的优化，导致训练困难。

Method: 提出HTAF作为Heaviside函数的光滑近似，由sigmoid和tanh复合而成，能在零点附近保持大梯度，同时在尾部区域梯度衰减较慢。基于此设计隐式概念瓶颈模型(ICBM)。

Result: HTAF能够稳定训练脉冲神经网络(SNN)、二值神经网络(BNN)和深度Heaviside神经网络。ICBM在多种架构和图像数据集上实现了稳定的离散化，预测性能达到或超过标准模型。

Conclusion: HTAF解决了非可微激活函数的梯度优化难题，ICBM为可解释性图像模型提供了新的有效范式。

Abstract: Activation functions play a central role in neural networks by shaping internal representations. Recently, learning binary activation representations has attracted significant attention due to their advantages in computational and memory efficiency, as well as interpretability. However, training neural networks with Heaviside activations remains challenging, as their non-differentiability obstructs standard gradient-based optimization. In this paper, we propose Heavy Tailed Activation Function (HTAF), a smooth approximation to the Heaviside function that enables stable training with gradient-based optimization. We construct HTAF as a sigmoid hyperbolic tangent composite function and theoretically show that it maintains a large gradient mass around zero inputs while exhibiting slower gradient decay in the tail regions. We show that Spiking Neural Networks, Binary Neural Networks and Deep Heaviside neural Networks can be trained stably using HTAF with gradient-based optimization. Finally, we introduce Implicit Concept Bottleneck Models (ICBMs), an interpretable image model that leverages HTAF to induce discrete feature representations. Extensive experiments across various architectures and image datasets demonstrate that ICBM enables stable discretization while achieving prediction performance comparable to or better than standard models.

</details>


### [415] [OUI as a Structural Observable: Towards an Activation-Centric View of Neural Network Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11570)
*Alberto Fernández-Hernández,Jose I. Mestre,Cristian Pérez-Corral,Manuel F. Dolz,Jose Duato,Enrique S. Quintana-Ortí*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出过拟合-欠拟合指标（OUI）作为一种基于激活函数的早期、无标签信号，用于在收敛前揭示网络训练状态，并在监督学习、强化学习和在线控制中验证其有效性，进而倡导以激活为中心的训练动态理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前深度学习训练评估主要依赖外部指标（损失、准确率等），而网络内部结构的演化过程仍缺乏有效观测工具。作者希望找到一个能早期、无标签地反映网络训练状态的内部可观测信号。

Method: 提出OUI（Overfitting--Underfitting Indicator），一种基于激活函数的指标。在监督学习中预测权重衰减机制，在强化学习（PPO actor-critic）中早期区分学习率机制，在在线控制中驱动逐层权重衰减自适应。

Result: OUI能在收敛前早期、无标签地揭示网络是否进入不良或良好的训练状态，并在多个任务（监督学习、强化学习、在线控制）中一致有效。

Conclusion: OUI是走向以激活为中心的训练动态理论的实证支点，结合激活模式比参数更早稳定的近期证据，预示着更广阔的研究方向。

Abstract: Activation functions are what make deep networks expressive: without them, the model collapses to a linear map. Yet we still evaluate training mostly from the outside, through loss, accuracy, return, or final calibration, while the internal structural evolution of the network remains largely unobserved. In this paper, we argue that the Overfitting--Underfitting Indicator (OUI) should be understood as a first practical observable of that internal structure. Across our recent results, OUI consistently appears as an early, label-free, activation-based signal that reveals whether a network is entering a poor or promising training regime before convergence. In supervised learning, it anticipates weight decay regimes; in reinforcement learning, it discriminates learning-rate regimes early in PPO actor--critic; and in online control, it can drive layer-wise weight decay adaptation. Read together with recent evidence that activation patterns tend to stabilize earlier than parameters, these results suggest a broader research direction: an activation-centric theory of training dynamics. OUI is becoming an empirical foothold toward this theory.

</details>


### [416] [FedOUI: OUI-Guided Client Weighting for Federated Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11571)
*Alberto Fernández-Hernández,Jose I. Mestre,Cristian Pérez-Corral,Manuel F. Dolz,Jose Duato,Enrique S. Quintana-Ortí*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedOUI，一种基于过拟合-欠拟合指标（OUI）的联邦学习聚合规则，利用客户端模型内部激活结构来加权聚合，在高度非IID和噪声条件下优于FedAvg、FedProx等基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习聚合方法通常仅依赖数据集大小或梯度层面的信息，忽略了客户端模型在训练过程中如何组织其输入空间的内部信号，导致在非IID和噪声条件下聚合质量不佳。

Method: 提出FedOUI：每个客户端在发送本地更新时，附加上在固定探针批次上计算的OUI值（基于激活的无标签指标）；服务器根据OUI分布进行平滑重加权，对结构异常的客户端赋予较低权重。

Result: 在CIFAR-10强非IID划分和噪声客户端条件下，FedOUI相比FedAvg、FedProx和梯度对齐基线方法，在强异质性场景下聚合质量提升最明显，且保持轻量级和可解释性。

Conclusion: 客户端模型的内部激活结构可以为联邦聚合提供超越客户端大小和梯度几何的有用信息，OUI-based加权是一种有效且轻量的聚合改进策略。

Abstract: Federated learning usually aggregates client updates using dataset size or gradient-level criteria, while overlooking internal signals about how each client model is organizing its input space during training. We introduce FedOUI, a simple aggregation rule based on the Overfitting-Underfitting Indicator (OUI), an activation-based and label-free metric. Each participating client sends its local update together with a OUI value computed on a fixed probe batch, and the server estimates the round-wise OUI distribution to assign lower weights to structurally atypical clients through a smooth reweighting rule. We evaluate FedOUI on CIFAR-10 under strong non-IID partitioning and noisy-client conditions, comparing it with FedAvg, FedProx, and a gradient-alignment baseline. The clearest gains appear under strong heterogeneity, where OUI-based weighting improves aggregation quality while remaining lightweight and interpretable. These results show that internal activation structure can provide useful information for federated aggregation beyond client size and gradient geometry.

</details>


### [417] [Learning Weakly Communicating Average-Reward CMDPs: Strong Duality and Improved Regret](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11586)
*Kihyun Yu,Beomhan Baek,Dabeen Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了弱连通平均奖励约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDPs），建立了强对偶性，并提出了一个剪裁值迭代算法，实现了$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$的遗憾和约束违规界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弱连通平均奖励CMDPs缺乏线性规划形式，导致非凸性，现有方法无法保证强对偶性；同时现有算法在遗憾和约束违规界限上不够优。

Method: 通过剖析占据测度集的几何结构证明强对偶性；基于此提出 primal-dual clipped value iteration 算法，结合有限时域近似来稳定对偶变量。

Result: 算法实现了$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$的遗憾和约束违规界限，优于已知最优结果。

Conclusion: 证明了弱连通平均奖励CMDPs的强对偶性，并提出了改进界限的高效学习算法。

Abstract: We study infinite-horizon average-reward constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs) under the weakly communicating assumption. Our contributions are twofold. First, we establish strong duality for weakly communicating average-reward CMDPs over stationary policies with finite state and action spaces. Despite the absence of a linear programming formulation and the resulting nonconvexity under the weakly communicating setting, we show that strong duality still holds by carefully exploiting the geometric structure of the occupation measure set. Second, building on this result, we propose a primal--dual clipped value iteration algorithm for learning weakly communicating average-reward linear CMDPs. Our algorithm achieves regret and constraint violation bounds of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{2/3})$, improving upon the best known bounds, where $T$ denotes the number of interactions. Our approach extends clipped value iteration to the constrained setting and adapts it to a finite-horizon approximation, which stabilizes the dual variable and is crucial for achieving improved regret bounds. To analyze this, we develop a novel approach based on strong duality that enables the decomposition of the composite Lagrangian regret into separate bounds on regret and constraint violation.

</details>


### [418] [Stargazer: A Scalable Model-Fitting Benchmark Environment for AI Agents under Astrophysical Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.15664)
*Xinge Liu,Terry Jingchen Zhang,Bernhard Schölkopf,Zhijing Jin,Kristen Menou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Stargazer是一个用于评估AI智能体在物理驱动的模型拟合任务中表现的可扩展环境，包含120个径向速度时间序列分析任务。评估发现前沿AI智能体在数值优化上表现良好，但常无法恢复正确的物理参数，增加测试时计算量效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主AI智能体兴起，需要动态的、带有内置反馈的基准环境来评估它们在科研工作中的能力，尤其是在科学基础任务上的表现。

Method: 构建了Stargazer环境，包含120个径向速度时间序列分析任务（3个难度等级，含20个真实档案案例），覆盖从高信噪比单行星系统到复杂的多行星配置。评估了8个前沿AI智能体的表现。

Result: 智能体在数值拟合（统计拟合优度）上表现尚可，但在恢复正确物理系统参数上经常失败；即使配备基础技能，这一局限依然存在；增加测试时计算量只能带来边际收益，过多的token使用往往反映递归失败循环而非有意义的探索。

Conclusion: Stargazer为在具有实际研究意义的模型拟合问题上训练、评估、构建框架和扩展策略提供了机会，其设计方法可推广到科学领域的其他模型拟合问题。

Abstract: The rise of autonomous AI agents suggests that dynamic benchmark environments with built-in feedback on scientifically grounded tasks are needed to evaluate the capabilities of these agents in research work. We introduce Stargazer, a scalable environment for evaluating AI agents on dynamic, iterative physics-grounded model-fitting tasks using inference on radial-velocity (RV) time series data. Stargazer comprises 120 tasks across three difficulty tiers, including 20 real archival cases, covering diverse scenarios ranging from high-SNR single-planet systems to complex multi-planetary configurations requiring involved low-SNR analysis. Our evaluation of eight frontier agents reveals a gap between numerical optimization and adherence to physical constraints: although agents often achieve a good statistical fit, they frequently fail to recover correct physical system parameters, a limitation that persists even when agents are equipped with vanilla skills. Furthermore, increasing test-time compute yields only marginal gains, with excessive token usage often reflecting recursive failure loops rather than meaningful exploration. Stargazer presents an opportunity to train, evaluate, scaffold, and scale strategies on a model-fitting problem of practical research relevance today. Our methodology to design a simulation-driven environment for AI agents presumably generalizes to many other model-fitting problems across scientific domains. Source code and the project website are available at https://github.com/AIPS-UofT/Stargazer and https://aips-uoft.github.io/Stargazer/, respectively.

</details>


### [419] [Not How Many, But Which: Parameter Placement in Low-Rank Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12207)
*Arijit Sehanobish,Charles Lovering*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究探讨LoRA适配器中B矩阵的k个可训练参数的选择问题。在SFT微调下，随机选择和基于信息的选择表现相当；但在GRPO训练中，随机选择无法提升性能，而基于梯度信息的选择能恢复标准LoRA的精度。这种差异源于梯度结构：SFT梯度低秩且方向稳定，GRPO梯度高秩且步间近似正交。提出的评分方法可在10秒内以低于0.5%的训练成本识别关键参数，这些参数集中在残差流写入投影上（V、O、Down），在1.5B-8B模型间稳定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究给定固定预算k个可训练参数时，参数选择是否影响LoRA微调性能，并揭示不同训练范式（SFT vs GRPO）下参数选择策略有效性的根本原因。

Method: 对比随机参数选择与基于梯度信息的选择在SFT和GRPO两种训练范式下的表现，通过分析梯度结构（秩、方向稳定性、步间正交性）解释差异，提出快速评分方法识别关键参数。

Result: SFT下随机与信息选择表现相当；GRPO下随机选择无效，梯度信息选择有效。关键参数集中在V、O、Down投影上，在不同模型家族和规模（1.5B-8B）上保持稳定。

Conclusion: 参数放置问题存在训练范式依赖性，梯度结构是决定因素。提出的快速评分方法能高效识别关键参数，为不同训练场景下的LoRA参数分配提供指导。

Abstract: We study the \textit{parameter placement problem}: given a fixed budget of $k$ trainable entries within the B matrix of a LoRA adapter (A frozen), does the choice of which $k$ matter? Under supervised fine-tuning, random and informed subsets achieve comparable performance. Under GRPO on base models, random placement fails to improve over the base model, while gradient-informed placement recovers standard LoRA accuracy. This regime dependence traces to gradient structure: SFT gradients are low-rank and directionally stable, so any subset accumulates coherent updates; GRPO gradients are high-rank and near-orthogonal across steps, so only elements with consistently signed gradients retain the learning signal. Our scoring procedure identifies these critical parameters in under 10 seconds at less than 0.5% of training cost. Selected parameters concentrate on residual-stream-writing projections (V, O, Down), stable across model families and scales (1.5B - 8B).

</details>


### [420] [SoK: Unlearnability and Unlearning for Model Dememorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11592)
*Mengying Zhang,Derui Wang,Ruoxi Sun,Xiaoyu Xia,Shuang Hao,Minhui Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次系统整合了机器学习中的两种反记忆方法——可用性投毒（不可学习性）和机器遗忘，通过统一分类、实证评估和理论保证，揭示了这两种方法在对抗浅层反记忆方面的脆弱性及其相互影响，并提出了首个经认证遗忘的深度理论保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有不可学习性和机器遗忘方法存在浅层反记忆问题（如权重扰动下遗忘声称失效）、输入扰动影响下游遗忘效果、遗忘可能恢复被隐藏的领域知识等问题，且缺乏形式化保证和统一分析框架。

Method: 提出了统一分类法整合不可学习性与可扩展遗忘方法；通过实证评估揭示主流方法的鲁棒性、相互作用及浅层反记忆问题；为经认证遗忘的模型提供了首个反记忆深度的理论保证。

Result: 发现不可学习性和遗忘均存在浅层反记忆问题（权重扰动导致虚假遗忘/不可学习）；输入扰动影响下游遗忘效果；遗忘可能意外恢复不可学习性隐藏的知识；并首次从理论上保证了反记忆深度。

Conclusion: 为在整个ML生命周期中统一反记忆机制、实现敏感知识的更深层不可记忆状态奠定了基础。

Abstract: Advanced model dememorization methods, including availability poisoning (unlearnability) and machine unlearning, are emerging as key safeguards against data misuse in machine learning (ML). At the training stage, unlearnability embeds imperceptible perturbations into data before release to reduce learnability. At the post-training stage, unlearning removes previously acquired information from models to prevent unauthorized disclosure or use. While both defenses aim to preserve the right to withhold knowledge, their vulnerabilities and shared foundations remain unclear. Specifically, both unlearnability and unlearning suffer from issues such as shallow dememorization, leading to falsely claimed data learnability reduction or forgetting in the presence of weight perturbations. Moreover, input perturbations may affect the effectiveness of downstream unlearning, while unlearning may inadvertently recover domain knowledge hidden by unlearnability. This interplay calls for deeper investigation. Finally, there is a lack of formal guarantees to provide theoretical insights into current defenses against shallow dememorization. In this Systematization of Knowledge, we present the first integrated analysis of model dememorization approaches leveraging unlearnability and unlearning. Our contributions are threefold: (i) a unified taxonomy of unlearnability and scalable unlearning methods; (ii) an empirical evaluation revealing the robustness, interplay, and shallow dememorization of leading methods; and (iii) the first theoretical guarantee on dememorization depth for models processed through certified unlearning. These results lay the foundation for unifying dememorization mechanisms across the ML lifecycle to achieve a deeper immemor state for sensitive knowledge.

</details>


### [421] [Predicting Decisions of AI Agents from Limited Interaction through Text-Tabular Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12411)
*Eilam Shapira,Moshe Tennenholtz,Roi Reichart*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究AI agent如何在未知环境中预测陌生对手的下一个决策，提出了一种基于表格基础模型+LLM-as-Observer的跨目标自适应文本-表格预测方法，在13个前沿LLM智能体训练、91个hold-out智能体测试中，该方法优于直接LLM提示预测，AUC提升约4点，议价错误率降低14%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实场景中AI agent常需与陌生对手（LLM或基于规则的智能体）进行自然语言谈判交易，但对手的LLM、提示词、控制逻辑等均不可见，每次决策都有金钱后果，因此需要从少量交互中预测对手的下一步决策，以实现自适应谈判。

Method: 将问题建模为目标自适应文本-表格预测任务：每个决策点作为表格行，包含结构化游戏状态、出价历史和对话文本。模型基于表格基础模型，引入LLM-as-Observer：用小规模冻结LLM读取决策时状态和对话，丢弃其回答，仅取其隐藏状态作为决策导向特征，使LLM充当编码器而非直接少样本预测器。

Result: 在13个前沿LLM智能体上训练、91个未见过的脚手架智能体上测试，完整模型优于直接LLM-as-Predictor提示和纯游戏+文本特征基线。K=16时，Observer特征在两项任务上AUC提升约4点，议价出价预测误差降低14%。

Conclusion: 将对手预测公式化为目标自适应文本-表格任务可实现有效自适应；LLM隐藏表征能暴露直接提示无法提取的决策相关信号，验证了LLM作为编码器而非预测器的优越性。

Abstract: AI agents negotiate and transact in natural language with unfamiliar counterparts: a buyer bot facing an unknown seller, or a procurement assistant negotiating with a supplier. In such interactions, the counterpart's LLM, prompts, control logic, and rule-based fallbacks are hidden, while each decision can have monetary consequences. We ask whether an agent can predict an unfamiliar counterpart's next decision from a few interactions. To avoid real-world logging confounds, we study this problem in controlled bargaining and negotiation games, formulating it as target-adaptive text-tabular prediction: each decision point is a table row combining structured game state, offer history, and dialogue, while $K$ previous games of the same target agent, i.e., the counterpart being modeled, are provided in the prompt as labeled adaptation examples. Our model is built on a tabular foundation model that represents rows using game-state features and LLM-based text representations, and adds LLM-as-Observer as an additional representation: a small frozen LLM reads the decision-time state and dialogue; its answer is discarded, and its hidden state becomes a decision-oriented feature, making the LLM an encoder rather than a direct few-shot predictor. Training on 13 frontier-LLM agents and testing on 91 held-out scaffolded agents, the full model outperforms direct LLM-as-Predictor prompting and game+text features baselines. Within this tabular model, Observer features contribute beyond the other feature schemes: at $K=16$, they improve response-prediction AUC by about 4 points across both tasks and reduce bargaining offer-prediction error by 14%. These results show that formulating counterpart prediction as a target-adaptive text-tabular task enables effective adaptation, and that hidden LLM representations expose decision-relevant signals that direct prompting does not surface.

</details>


### [422] [EpiCastBench: Datasets and Benchmarks for Multivariate Epidemic Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11598)
*Madhurima Panja,Danny D'Agostino,Huitao Li,Tanujit Chakraborty,Nan Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EpiCastBench是一个大规模流行病预测基准框架，包含40个多变量数据集，系统评估了15种预测模型，旨在推动该领域的标准化和可重复性研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前流行病预测领域缺乏高质量的多变量基准数据集，限制了稳健预测方法的开发。现有研究多采用独立的单变量方法，无法捕捉复杂的时间依赖关系，亟需标准化的评估框架来推动研究进展。

Method: 构建了包含40个多变量流行病数据集的EpiCastBench框架，涵盖多种传染病和地理区域；建立了统一的预测评估标准（包括预测周期、预处理流程、多种评估指标和统计显著性检验）；在此框架上系统评估了15种多元预测模型（从统计基线到深度学习及基础模型）。

Result: 提供了40个经过整理的多变量流行病数据集，分析了其全局特征和结构模式，并对15种多元预测模型进行了全面评估。

Conclusion: EpiCastBench为流行病预测研究提供了标准化的基准框架，有助于推动该领域的可重复性研究和模型比较，所有数据集和代码均已公开。

Abstract: The increasing adoption of data-driven decision-making in public health has established epidemic forecasting as a critical area of research. Recent advances in multivariate forecasting models better capture complex temporal dependencies than conventional univariate approaches, which model individual series independently. Despite this potential, the development of robust epidemic forecasting methods is constrained by the lack of high-quality benchmarks comprising diverse multivariate datasets across infectious diseases and geographical regions. To address this gap, we present EpiCastBench, a large-scale benchmarking framework featuring 40 curated (correlated) multivariate epidemic datasets. These publicly available datasets span a wide range of infectious diseases and exhibit diverse characteristics in terms of temporal granularity, series length, and sparsity. We analyze these datasets to identify their global features and structural patterns. To ensure reproducibility and fair comparison, we establish standardized evaluation settings, including a unified forecasting horizon, consistent preprocessing pipelines, diverse performance metrics, and statistical significance testing. By leveraging this framework, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 15 multivariate forecasting models spanning statistical baselines to state-of-the-art deep learning and foundation models. All datasets and code are publicly available on Kaggle (https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aimltsf/epicastbench) and GitHub (https://github.com/aimltsf/EpiCastBench).

</details>


### [423] [ORCE: Order-Aware Alignment of Verbalized Confidence in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12446)
*Chen Li,Xiaoling Hu,Songzhu Zheng,Jiawei Zhou,Chao Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出解耦且顺序感知的框架，先生成答案再估计置信度，通过基于排序的强化学习优化口头置信度校准，在保持答案准确性的同时提升校准效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有口头置信度方法将答案生成与置信度生成联合优化，可能导致置信度对齐目标干扰答案准确性。

Method: 解耦框架：先固定答案，再基于问答对估计置信度；通过多次采样构建代理正确性似然，采用基于排序的强化学习目标优化置信度与正确性似然的对齐。

Result: 在推理和知识密集型基准测试上，该方法在保持答案准确性的同时，提升了校准性能和失败预测能力。

Conclusion: 通过解耦置信度估计与答案生成，并优化跨响应的置信度相对排序，可以更可靠地对齐口头置信度。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often produce answers with high certainty even when they are incorrect, making reliable confidence estimation essential for deployment in real-world scenarios. Verbalized confidence, where models explicitly state their confidence in natural language, provides a flexible and user-facing uncertainty signal that can be applied even when token logits are unavailable. However, existing verbalized-confidence methods often optimize answer generation and confidence generation jointly, which can cause confidence-alignment objectives to interfere with answer accuracy. In this work, we propose a decoupled and order-aware framework for verbalized confidence calibration. Our method first generates an answer and then estimates confidence conditioned on the fixed question--answer pair, allowing confidence optimization without directly perturbing the answer-generation process. To align confidence with correctness likelihood, we construct a sampling-based surrogate from multiple model completions and optimize rank-based reinforcement learning objectives that encourage responses with higher estimated correctness likelihood to receive higher verbalized confidence. Experiments on reasoning and knowledge-intensive benchmarks show that our method improves calibration and failure prediction performance while largely preserving answer accuracy. These results demonstrate that verbalized confidence can be more reliably aligned by decoupling confidence estimation from answer generation and optimizing the relative ordering of confidence across responses.

</details>


### [424] [Targeted Tests for LLM Reasoning: An Audit-Constrained Protocol](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11599)
*Hongmin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种审计约束的协议用于目标推理评估，通过组件语法生成提示变体并进行语义和提取审计，实例化CAPS方法并与均匀采样对比，结果表明该方法贡献在于方法论层面，而非性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有固定推理基准无法捕捉提示呈现方式变化对模型行为的影响，而缺乏审计的提示变体研究可能混淆真正的模型错误与无效扰动、提取伪影和搜索过程不匹配等问题。

Method: 提出审计约束协议：从有限组件语法生成提示变体，确定性渲染，在固定查询预算下评估，仅通过语义和提取审计后才算作模型错误。实例化CAPS（组件自适应提示采样），基于分数的采样器，并与等预算的均匀组件采样对比，在相同任务库、渲染器、模型接口、解码设置和审计流程下比较。

Result: 审计协议能识别确认的模型错误提示键，同时排除格式和提取伪影，但CAPS在审计产出或独特提示键发现上并未优于均匀采样。

Conclusion: 方法论贡献：目标提示变体可以在可重构、可审查、预算匹配的协议下研究，代理引导策略应基于审计产出而非原始不匹配计数或选择的个别示例来判断。

Abstract: Fixed reasoning benchmarks evaluate canonical prompts, but semantically valid changes in presentation can still change model behavior. Studies of prompt variation can reveal such failures, but without audit they can mix genuine model errors with invalid perturbations, extraction artifacts, and unmatched search procedures. We propose an audit-constrained protocol for targeted reasoning evaluation. Prompt variants are generated from a finite component grammar, rendered deterministically, evaluated under a fixed query budget, and counted as model errors only after semantic and extraction audit. Within this protocol we instantiate Component-Adaptive Prompt Sampling (CAPS), a score-based sampler over prompt components, and compare it with equal-budget uniform component sampling under the same task bank, renderer, model interface, decoding settings, and audit procedure. Across three audited slices, the protocol identifies confirmed model-error prompt keys while excluding formatting and extraction artifacts, but matched comparisons do not show that CAPS improves audited yield or unique prompt-key discovery over uniform sampling. The contribution is methodological: targeted prompt variation can be studied under a reconstructable, reviewable, budget-matched protocol, and proxy-guided policies should be judged by audited yield rather than raw mismatch counts or selected examples alone.

</details>


### [425] [Multi-Stream LLMs: Unblocking Language Models with Parallel Streams of Thoughts, Inputs and Outputs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12460)
*Guinan Su,Yanwu Yang,Xueyan Li,Jonas Geiping*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将大语言模型从单流消息格式（如ChatGPT）转向多流并行计算范式，通过为每个角色分配独立的输入/输出流，使模型能够同时进行阅读、思考、行动和交互，从而突破传统顺序消息交换的瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI智能体基于ChatGPT等指令微调模型的顺序消息交换格式，存在单流瓶颈：代理无法在阅读时生成输出、无法在写作时接收新信息、无法在思考时行动等，严重限制了智能体的能力和效率。

Method: 将指令微调从顺序消息格式切换到多并行计算流，为每个角色（用户、系统、自身、工具）分配独立的输入和输出流，使模型每次前向传播时同时从多个输入流读取并在多个输出流生成token，且各流之间的因果依赖关系保持。

Result: 该方法能够解决上述可用性限制，提高模型并行化效率，通过更好的关注点分离提升安全性，并改善模型的可监控性。

Conclusion: 通过数据驱动的格式变更（从单流到多流），可以解除当前LLM智能体的架构瓶颈，提升效率、安全性和可监控性。

Abstract: The continued improvements in language model capability have unlocked their widespread use as drivers of autonomous agents, for example in coding or computer use applications. However, the core of these systems has not changed much since early instruction-tuned models like ChatGPT. Even advanced AI agents function on message exchange formats, successively exchanging messages with users, systems, with itself (i.e. chain-of-thought) and tools in a single stream of computation. This bottleneck to a single stream in chat models leads to a number of limitations: the agent cannot act (generate output) while reading, and in reverse, cannot react to new information while writing. Similarly, the agent cannot act while thinking and cannot think while reading or acting on information.
  In this work, we show that models can be unblocked by switching from instruction-tuning for sequential message formats to instruction-tuning for multiple, parallel streams of computation, splitting each role into a separate stream. Every forward pass of the language model then simultaneously reads from multiple input streams and generates tokens in multiple output streams, all of which causally depend on earlier timesteps. We argue that this data-driven change remedies a number of usability limitations as outlined above, improves model efficiency through parallelization, improves model security through better separation of concerns and can further improve model monitorability.

</details>


### [426] [From Generic Correlation to Input-Specific Credit in On-Policy Self Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11613)
*Guobin Shen,Lei Huang,Xiang Cheng,Chenxiao Zhao,Jindong Li,Dongcheng Zhao,Xing Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对在线自蒸馏中token奖励的本质进行了理论分析，证明其衡量的是响应与反馈之间的逐点互信息(pMI)，并发现pMI可能被输入通用捷径而非特定推理所提升。基于此提出CREDIT方法，通过批对比基线分离输入特定组件，在编码、科学推理和工具使用等基准上取得最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线自蒸馏虽在经验上成功，但其token奖励究竟衡量什么、分配何种信用仍不明确，缺乏理论理解。

Method: 首先从后验兼容性角度证明自蒸馏token奖励是贝叶斯滤波增量，其轨迹和等于响应与反馈间的逐点互信息(pMI)。然后分解教师对数概率以区分输入特定推理和输入通用捷径。最后提出CREDIT方法，采用批对比基线分离输入特定组件。

Result: 在编码、科学推理和工具使用基准上，CREDIT在两个模型家族上均取得最优聚合性能，且计算开销可忽略。

Conclusion: CREDIT作为一种教师侧的对比pMI目标代理，能有效惩罚在无关输入下仍保持高概率的响应，从而提升性能。

Abstract: On-policy self-distillation has emerged as a promising paradigm for post-training language models, in which the model conditions on environment feedback to serve as its own teacher, providing dense token-level rewards without external teacher models or step-level annotations. Despite its empirical success, what this reward actually measures and what kind of credit it assigns remain unclear. Under a posterior-compatibility interpretation of feedback conditioning, standard in the implicit-reward literature, we show that the self-distillation token reward is a Bayesian filtering increment whose trajectory sum is exactly the pointwise mutual information between the response and the feedback given the input. This pMI can be raised by input-specific reasoning or by input-generic shortcuts, so we further decompose the teacher log-probability along the input axis. Based on this analysis, we propose CREDIT (Contrastive REward from DIsTillation), which isolates the input-specific component with a batch-contrastive baseline. At the sequence level, CREDIT is a teacher-side surrogate for a contrastive pMI objective that also penalizes responses remaining likely under unrelated inputs. Across coding, scientific reasoning, and tool-use benchmarks on two model families, CREDIT delivers the strongest aggregate performance at negligible additional compute.

</details>


### [427] [KV-Fold: One-Step KV-Cache Recurrence for Long-Context Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12471)
*Alireza Nadali,Patrick Cooper,Ashutosh Trivedi,Alvaro Velasquez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出KV-Fold，一种无需训练的长上下文推理协议，通过将KV缓存作为左折叠累加器实现稳定高效的序列块间递归，在128K上下文内实现100%精确检索，且仅需单张40GB GPU。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长上下文推理方法要么需要修改模型架构或额外训练，要么（如流式方法）在有限内存下牺牲信息保真度。作者希望找到一种无需训练、不改变架构、且能保持长距离精确检索的方法。

Method: 受函数式编程中foldl（左折叠）启发，将KV缓存视为跨块累加器：每个步骤处理当前块时，模型以之前累积的KV缓存为前缀进行注意力计算，然后将新产生的键值追加到缓存中，再传递给下一个块。这一过程逐块重复，形成块到块的递归。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B上的长海捞针测试中，在16K到128K上下文、链深度达511的152次试验中实现100%精确检索；每步漂移短暂上升后稳定在平坦平台；对10000倍数值精度变化不敏感；在不同块大小和模型家族间表现一致；仅需单张40GB GPU。

Conclusion: 冻结的预训练Transformer已经支持稳定的KV缓存递归形式，KV-Fold以一种实用的方式实现了无需架构修改或额外训练的长上下文推理，在保持长距离精确检索的同时，仅需一系列可处理的向前传播。

Abstract: We introduce KV-Fold, a simple, training-free long-context inference protocol that treats the key-value (KV) cache as the accumulator in a left fold over sequence chunks. At each step, the model processes the next chunk conditioned on the accumulated cache, appends the newly produced keys and values, and passes the enlarged cache forward; the same one-step update is applied repeatedly, analogous to foldl in functional programming. Building on the KV cache concatenation primitive introduced for latent multi-agent communication, we repurpose it as a chunk-to-chunk recurrence for long-context inference. When processing chunk t, the model attends to the KV cache carried from earlier chunks as a prefix, reusing its internal state across segments without modifying or retraining the model. Despite its simplicity, the induced recurrence is stable: per-step drift rises briefly and then saturates into a flat plateau that persists across deep chains. This plateau is insensitive to a 10,000x change in numerical precision, robust across chunk sizes, and consistent across model families. At the task level, KV-Fold preserves exact information over long distances. On a needle-in-a-haystack benchmark, it achieves 100% exact-match retrieval across 152 trials spanning contexts from 16K to 128K tokens and chain depths up to 511 on Llama-3.1-8B, while remaining within the memory limits of a single 40GB GPU. Compared to streaming methods, which trade fidelity for bounded memory, KV-Fold maintains long-range retrieval while operating as a sequence of tractable forward passes. Overall, our results show that frozen pretrained transformers already support a stable form of KV-cache recurrence, providing a practical route to long-context inference without architectural changes or training.

</details>


### [428] [MIST: Reliable Streaming Decision Trees for Online Class-Incremental Learning via McDiarmid Bound](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11617)
*Phu-Hoa Pham,Chi-Nguyen Tran,Nguyen Lam Phu Quy,Dao Sy Duy Minh,Huynh Trung Kiet,Long Tran-Thanh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MIST算法，通过McDiarmid置信半径、贝叶斯继承协议和KLL分位数草图三个组件，解决了流式决策树在在线类增量学习中因信息增益随类别数缩放导致的校准失效问题，实现了与类别数无关的稳定分裂准则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有流式决策树在在线类增量学习中失败，根源在于信息增益的范围随类别数K对数增长，导致Hoeffding置信半径必然随K增大，从而无法实现与K无关的分裂准则，使得流式决策树在持续学习中的潜在优势无法发挥。

Method: MIST包含三个集成组件：(1) 基于McDiarmid不等式的紧致、与K无关的Gini分裂置信半径，作为结构正则化器；(2) 贝叶斯继承协议，通过截断高斯矩将父节点统计量投影到子节点，在分裂最保守时具有最强的方差缩减保证；(3) 每叶KLL分位数草图，支持连续阈值评估和几何自适应叶节点预测。

Result: 在标准表和压力测试表流上，MIST在近高斯基准上与全局参数方法竞争力相当，且在非高斯几何数据上（现有SOTA方法失效时）表现出独特的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: MIST通过理论驱动的设计从根本上解决了流式决策树在持续学习中的校准问题，为非高斯流数据提供了健壮的增量学习方案。

Abstract: Streaming decision trees are natural candidates for open-world continual learning, as they perform local updates, enjoy bounded memory, and static decision boundaries. Despite these, they still fail in online class-incremental learning due to two coupled miscalibrations: (i) their split criterion grows unreliable as the class count K expands, and (ii) the absence of knowledge transfer at split time. Both failures share a common root: the range of Information Gain intrinsically scales with log2 K. Consequently, any Hoeffding-style confidence radius derived from it must inevitably grow with the class count, making a K-independent split criterion structurally impossible, taking away the potential benefits of applying streaming decision trees to continual learning. To fix this issue, we present MIST (McDiarmid Incremental Streaming Tree), which resolves both failures through three integrated components: (i) a tight, K-independent McDiarmid confidence radius for Gini splitting that acts as a structural regulariser; (ii) a Bayesian inheritance protocol that projects parent statistics to child nodes via truncated-Gaussian moments, with variance reduction guarantees strongest precisely when splitting is most conservative; and (iii) per-leaf KLL quantile sketches that support both continuous threshold evaluation and geometry-adaptive leaf prediction from a single data structure. On standard and stress-test tabular streams, MIST is competitive with global parametric methods on near-Gaussian benchmarks and uniquely robust on non-Gaussian geometry where SOTA benchmarks collapse.

</details>


### [429] [Routers Learn the Geometry of Their Experts: Geometric Coupling in Sparse Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12476)
*Sagi Ahrac,Noya Hochwald,Mor Geva*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了稀疏混合专家（SMoE）模型中路由器与专家之间的几何耦合机制，发现路由器权重与专家权重在相同输入方向上累积梯度，辅助负载均衡损失会破坏这种耦合，并提出了基于几何耦合的无参数在线K-Means路由方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SMoE模型训练面临路由崩溃和辅助负载均衡损失降低专业化的问题，作者希望通过理解路由决策的机制性形成过程来克服这些困难。

Method: 1. 理论分析路由器与专家权重的几何耦合关系；2. 在1B SMoE模型上实证验证路由分数与专家神经元激活的相关性；3. 分析辅助损失对几何耦合的破坏作用；4. 提出无参数在线K-Means路由器，基于余弦相似度分配token。

Result: 1. 验证了路由器与专家之间的几何耦合；2. 辅助负荷均衡损失使不同路由方向相似度提升近三倍，破坏耦合结构；3. K-Means路由器实现了最低的负载不均衡，仅带来适度的困惑度增加。

Conclusion: 几何耦合是SMoE路由有效性的核心机制，路由器通过学习形成支持有效分工的分配几何结构。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) models enable scaling language models efficiently, but training them remains challenging, as routing can collapse onto few experts and auxiliary load-balancing losses can reduce specialization. Motivated by these hurdles, we study how routing decisions in SMoEs are formed mechanistically. First, we reveal a geometric coupling between routers and their corresponding experts. For a given token, the router weights for the selected expert and the expert weights processing it receive gradients along the same input direction, differing only in scalar coefficients. Thus, matched router--expert directions accumulate the same routed token history. This theoretical coupling also appears empirically in routing dynamics. In a $1$B SMoE trained from scratch, higher router scores predict stronger expert neuron activations, showing that routing decisions are mirrored inside the selected expert. Next, we analyze the effects of auxiliary load balancing on the router--expert geometric coupling, showing that such losses break this structure by spreading input-directed gradients across router weights, making distinct router directions nearly three times more similar to each other. Last, we demonstrate the centrality of geometric coupling for effective routing with a parameter-free online K-Means router, in which each expert maintains a running average of the hidden states routed to it and tokens are assigned based on cosine similarity. Compared with auxiliary-loss and loss-free balancing, this router achieves the lowest load imbalance with only a modest perplexity increase, indicating that geometric coupling captures a substantial part of what the router learns. Overall, our results explain how routers form assignment geometry that supports an effective division of labor.

</details>


### [430] [Evolutionary Task Discovery: Advancing Reasoning Frontiers via Skill Composition and Complexity Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11666)
*Liqin Ye,Yanbin Yin,Michael Galarnyk,Yuzhao Heng,Sudheer Chava,Chao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EvoTD是一个通过结构化进化算子（交叉与变异）在算法技能与复杂度双轴流形上搜索，并配合最近发展区过滤器进行数据合成的框架，能有效提升LLM推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM后训练范式（如RLVR）受限于训练数据的多样性与复杂度，而主流数据合成方法（无结构变异或探索）存在同质性坍缩问题，无法系统扩展推理边界。

Method: 提出EvoTD框架：1) 将数据合成建模为算法技能与复杂度属性双轴流形上的有向搜索；2) 引入结构化进化算子——交叉算子合成新技能组合增强多样性，参数变异算子缩放结构约束（如输入大小、树深度）驱动鲁棒泛化；3) 集成动态最近发展区过滤器，确保任务处于模型可学习范围内。

Result: EvoTD在多种模型架构、预训练范式和规模上一致性地实现了显著的推理能力提升，证明了结构化进化课程可以有效支持推理改进。

Conclusion: 结构化进化课程的数据合成策略优于无结构变异方法，能系统性扩展推理边界，具有跨架构、跨尺度的良好泛化性。

Abstract: The reasoning frontier of Large Language Models (LLMs) has advanced significantly through modern post-training paradigms (e.g., Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR)). However, the efficacy of these methods remains fundamentally constrained by the diversity and complexity of the training data. One practical solution is data synthesis; yet, prevalent methods relying on unstructured mutation or exploration suffer from homogeneity collapse, failing to systematically expand the reasoning frontier. To overcome this, we propose Evoutionary Task Discovery (EvoTD), a framework that treats data synthesis as a directed search over a dual-axis manifold of Algorithmic Skills and Complexity Attributes. We introduce structured evolutionary operators to navigate this space: a Crossover operator that synthesizes novel skill compositions to enhance diversity, and a Parametric Mutation operator that scales structural constraints (e.g., input size, tree depth) to drive robust generalization. Crucially, we integrate a dynamic Zone of Proximal Development filter, ensuring tasks lie within the learnable region of the model. Empirically, EvoTD delivers substantial reasoning gains that generalize consistently across model architectures, pretraining regimes, and scales, demonstrating that structured evolutionary curricula can effectively support reasoning improvement. We release our code on https://github.com/liqinye/EvoTD.

</details>


### [431] [MEME: Multi-entity & Evolving Memory Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12477)
*Seokwon Jung,Alexander Rubinstein,Arnas Uselis,Sangdoo Yun,Seong Joon Oh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MEME基准测试定义了多实体、演化环境下的六项任务（包括级联、缺失和删除等依赖推理任务）。实验发现，现有记忆系统在依赖推理任务上几乎完全失效（级联3%，缺失1%），且提示优化、更深度检索、减少填充噪声和更强LLM均无法弥补差距。仅文件型智能体搭配Claude Opus 4.7可部分弥补，但成本增加约70倍，不具备可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准仅评估单实体更新场景，缺乏对多实体、演化环境中记忆系统能力的全面评估，尤其是依赖推理和状态变更后的推理能力。

Method: 定义了六项任务（包括级联、缺失、删除等依赖推理任务），在100个受控情节中评估了涵盖三种记忆范式的六种记忆系统，并进行了多种优化尝试。

Result: 所有记忆系统在依赖推理任务上几乎崩溃（级联3%，缺失1%）；各种优化尝试均无效；仅文件型智能体搭配Claude Opus 4.7可部分弥补，但成本增加70倍。

Conclusion: 当前记忆系统在多实体演化环境中的依赖推理能力严重不足，且现有方法无法在不显著增加成本的情况下解决这一问题。

Abstract: LLM-based agents increasingly operate in persistent environments where they must store, update, and reason over information across many sessions. While prior benchmarks evaluate only single-entity updates, MEME defines six tasks spanning the full space defined by the multi-entity and evolving axes, including three not scored by prior work: Cascade and Absence (dependency reasoning) and Deletion (post-removal state). Evaluating six memory systems spanning three memory paradigms on 100 controlled episodes, we find that all systems collapse on dependency reasoning under the default configuration (Cascade: 3%, Absence: 1% in average accuracy) despite adequate static retrieval performance. Prompt optimization, deeper retrieval, reduced filler noise, and most stronger LLMs fail to close this gap. Only a file-based agent paired with Claude Opus 4.7 as its internal LLM partially closes the gap, but at ~70x the baseline cost, indicating closure currently depends on configurations that are not practical at scale. Code and data are available on the project page: https://seokwonjung-jay.github.io/meme-eval/.

</details>


### [432] [Partial Model Sharing Improves Byzantine Resilience in Federated Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11684)
*Ehsan Lari,Reza Arablouei,Stefan Werner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种拜占庭鲁棒的联邦共形预测方法，通过部分模型共享（训练阶段）和直方图非一致性分数（校准阶段）来同时防御训练和校准过程中的攻击，在多种攻击场景下实现了更接近名义覆盖率和更紧的预测区间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒联邦共形预测方法主要强化校准阶段，但忽略了训练阶段也可能受到拜占庭攻击。本文旨在同时保护联邦训练和共形校准两个阶段。

Method: 1) 训练阶段：部分模型共享，仅交换部分模型参数，限制攻击面并削弱恶意更新；2) 校准阶段：将非一致性分数压缩为直方图特征向量，服务器基于距离计算恶意分数检测拜占庭客户端，并仅用良性客户端估计共形分位数。

Result: 在多种拜占庭攻击场景下，相比标准FCP，该方法实现了更接近名义覆盖率的预测区间，且区间更紧凑。

Conclusion: 该方法为联邦不确定性量化提供了一种鲁棒且通信高效的新方案，同时防御了训练和校准阶段的拜占庭攻击。

Abstract: We propose a Byzantine-resilient federated conformal prediction (FCP) method that leverages partial model sharing, where only a subset of model parameters is exchanged each round. Unlike existing robust FCP approaches that primarily harden the calibration stage, our method protects both the federated training and conformal calibration phases. During training, partial sharing inherently restricts the attack surface and attenuates poisoned updates while reducing communication. During calibration, clients compress their non-conformity scores into histogram-based characterization vectors, enabling the server to detect Byzantine clients via distance-based maliciousness scores and to estimate the conformal quantile using only benign contributors. Experiments across diverse Byzantine attack scenarios show that the proposed method achieves closer-to-nominal coverage with substantially tighter prediction intervals than standard FCP, establishing a robust and communication-efficient approach to federated uncertainty quantification.

</details>


### [433] [Shaping Zero-Shot Coordination via State Blocking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11688)
*Mingu Kang,Sunwoo Lee,Yonghyeon Jo,Seungyul Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出状态阻塞协调（SBC）框架，通过状态阻塞生成虚拟环境来诱导多样化交互场景，无需直接修改环境即可提升零样本协调性能，在多个基准测试中包括与人类伙伴的泛化均表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本协调方法主要通过增加训练时的伙伴多样性来提升泛化能力，但这种方式往往难以可靠地泛化到未见过的伙伴。因此，需要一种更有效的框架来解决这一局限。

Method: 提出State-Blocked Coordination (SBC)框架，通过状态阻塞（state blocking）生成一系列虚拟环境，使智能体能够体验各种次优伙伴策略，从而在不直接修改环境的情况下诱导多样化的交互场景。

Result: 在多个基准测试中，SBC在零样本协调任务上展现出优越性能，包括对未见过的伙伴及人类伙伴均表现出强大的泛化能力。

Conclusion: SBC提供了一种简单而有效的零样本协调框架，通过状态阻塞生成虚拟环境增强智能体对次优伙伴策略的适应性，显著提升了零样本协调的泛化性能。

Abstract: Zero-shot coordination (ZSC) aims to enable agents to cooperate with independently trained partners without prior interaction, a key requirement for real-world multi-agent systems and human-AI collaboration. Existing approaches have largely emphasized increasing partner diversity during training, yet such strategies often fall short of achieving reliable generalization to unseen partners. We introduce State-Blocked Coordination (SBC), a simple yet effective framework that improves ZSC by inducing diverse interaction scenarios without direct environment modification. Specifically, SBC generates a family of virtual environments through state blocking, allowing agents to experience a wide range of suboptimal partner policies. Across multiple benchmarks, SBC demonstrates superior performance in zero-shot coordination, including strong generalization to human partners.

</details>


### [434] [Compositional Neural Operators for Multi-Dimensional Fluid Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11691)
*Hamda Hmida,Hsiu-Wen Chang,Youssef Mesri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 Compositional Neural Operators (CompNO)，通过将复杂 PDE 分解为基础模块（对流、扩散、非线性对流及泊松求解器）的模块化框架，利用预训练的基础算子组合来求解 2D 物理系统，在多个方程上验证了其提升适应性、可解释性和模块复用能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 PDE 数值求解计算昂贵，机器学习方法缺乏泛化能力，而科学基础模型的编码-解码方法预训练成本高且可解释性有限。

Method: 将复杂 PDE 分解为预训练的基础神经算子模块库（对流、扩散、非线性对流块 + 泊松求解器），通过 Adaptation Block 中的 Aggregator 学习非线性交互，结合数据损失和基于物理的残差进行组装。

Result: 在对流-扩散方程、Burgers 方程和不可压 Navier-Stokes 方程上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了适应性、模型可解释性，并支持预训练模块在新物理系统中的复用。

Conclusion: 从基础算子学习能够提升模型对新物理系统的适应能力和可解释性，模块化预训练算子的复用是构建通用科学基础模型的有效路径。

Abstract: Partial differential equations (PDEs) govern diverse physical phenomena, yet high-fidelity numerical solutions are computationally expensive and Machine Learning approaches lack generalization. While Scientific Foundation Models (SFMs) aim to provide universal surrogates, typical encoding-decoding approaches suffer from high pretraining costs and limited interpretability. In this paper, we propose Compositional Neural Operators (CompNO) for 2D systems, a framework that decomposes complex PDEs into a library of Foundation Blocks. Each block is a specialized Neural Operator pretrained on elementary physics. This modular library contains convection, diffusion, and nonlinear convection blocks as well as a Poisson Solver, enabling the framework to address the pressure-velocity coupling. These experts are assembled via an Adaptation Block featuring an Aggregator. This aggregator learns nonlinear interactions by minimizing data loss and physics-based residuals driven from governing equations. The proposed approach has been evaluated on the Convection-Diffusion equation, the Burgers' equation, and the Incompressible Navier-Stokes equation. Our results demonstrate that learning from elementary operators significantly improves adaptability, enhances model interpretability and facilitates the reuse of pretrained blocks when adapting to new physical systems.

</details>


### [435] [Augmented Lagrangian Method for Last-Iterate Convergence for Constrained MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11694)
*Michael Lu,Max Qiushi Lin,Mo Chen,Sharan Vaswani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对无限时域折扣约束马尔可夫决策过程(CMDP)，提出基于经典非精确增广拉格朗日(AL)方法的通用框架，证明了其在表格设置和log-linear策略下的最后迭代(last-iterate)收敛性，并扩展到非线性策略的连续控制任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CMDP理论保证多针对混合策略(mixture policy)，但部署时计算和内存开销大，实际中需使用单一的最后迭代策略。现有最后迭代收敛的研究多局限于表格设置或实际中少用的算法变体，存在理论与实践的脱节。

Method: 采用经典的非精确增广拉格朗日(AL)方法作为框架，在表格设置中结合投影Q上升(PQA)求解AL子问题；推广到log-linear策略使用投影变体PQA；进一步扩展到非线性策略处理连续控制任务。

Result: 在表格设置中建立了全局最后迭代收敛性保证；在log-linear策略下实现了与先前工作可比拟的最后迭代收敛保证；在连续控制任务中展示了框架的可扩展性。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于AL方法的通用框架能够有效解决CMDPs中最后迭代收敛的理论与实践脱节问题，兼容从简单表格到复杂非线性策略的各种场景。

Abstract: We study policy optimization for infinite-horizon, discounted constrained Markov decision processes (CMDPs). While existing theoretical guarantees typically hold for the mixture policy, deploying such a policy is computationally and memory intensive. This leads to a practical mismatch where a single (last-iterate) policy must be deployed. Recent theoretical works have thus focused on proving last-iterate convergence, but are largely limited to the tabular setting or to algorithmic variants that are rarely used in practice. To address this, we use the classic inexact augmented Lagrangian ($\texttt{AL}$) method from constrained optimization, and propose a general framework with provable last-iterate convergence for CMDPs. We first focus on the tabular setting and propose to solve the $\texttt{AL}$ sub-problem with projected Q-ascent ($\texttt{PQA}$). Combining the theoretical guarantees of $\texttt{PQA}$ and the standard $\texttt{AL}$ analysis enables us to establish global last-iterate convergence. We generalize these results to handle log-linear policies, and demonstrate that an efficient, projected variant of $\texttt{PQA}$ can achieve last-iterate convergence with comparable guarantees as prior work. Finally, we demonstrate that our framework scales to complex non-linear policies, and evaluate it on continuous control tasks.

</details>


### [436] [GRAFT: Graph-Tokenized LLMs for Tool Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11706)
*Xinyi Gao,Xinyu Ren,Junliang Yu,Tong Chen,Quoc Viet Hung Nguyen,Hongzhi Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GRAFT是一种将工具图内化为特殊token表示的框架，通过图标记化和在策略工具上下文蒸馏，解决了LLM在多步工具规划中依赖关系不匹配和错误累积的问题，实现了SOTA的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将工具依赖建模为图并通过检索、序列化等外部方式与LLM结合，但都遵循匹配范式，无法使工具选择与子任务结构对齐，导致生成的计划语义合理却违反图约束，且错误会累积传播。

Method: 提出GRAFT框架：(1) 图标记化：将每个工具节点映射为专用特殊token，在表征空间中学习有向工具依赖；(2) 在策略工具上下文蒸馏：在模型自身采样的轨迹上进行训练，蒸馏逐步规划信号。

Result: 在精确序列匹配和依赖合法性指标上达到SOTA性能，支持更可靠的LLM工具规划。

Conclusion: GRAFT通过将工具依赖内化到模型表征空间中，而不是外部注入，有效解决了工具规划中的对齐和错误累积问题，适用于复杂工作流场景。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to complete complex tasks by selecting and coordinating external tools across multiple steps. This requires aligning tool choices with subtask intent while satisfying directional execution dependencies among tools. To do this, existing methods model these dependencies as tool graphs and incorporate the graphs with LLMs through retrieval, serialization, or prompt-level injection. However, these external graph-use strategies all follow a matching paradigm, which often fails to align tool choices with the underlying subtask structure, producing semantically plausible plans that violate graph constraints. This issue is further exacerbated by error accumulation, where an early incorrect tool selection shifts the plan into an invalid graph state and causes subsequent predictions to drift away from the valid execution path. To address these challenges, we propose GRAFT, a graph-tokenized language model framework for dependency-aware tool planning. GRAFT internalizes the tool graph by mapping each tool node to a dedicated special token and learning directed tool dependencies within the representation space. It further introduces on-policy tool context distillation, training the model on its own sampled trajectories while distilling stepwise planning signals. Experiments show that GRAFT achieves state-of-the-art performance in exact sequence matching and dependency legality, supporting more reliable LLM tool planning in complex workflows.

</details>


### [437] [Unlocking Compositional Generalization in Continual Few-Shot Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11710)
*Phu-Quy Nguyen-Lam,Phu-Hoa Pham,Dao Sy Duy Minh,Chi-Nguyen Tran,Huynh Trung Kiet,Long Tran-Thanh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的持续学习范式，通过解耦表示学习与组合推理，利用自监督ViT的补丁级语义几何特性，在训练时优化槽表示以保持类整体特征，推理时动态组合槽来匹配新场景，实现了少样本学习中的新概念泛化并减少了灾难性遗忘。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的以对象为中心的表征方法在少样本学习中未能充分发挥潜力，持续学习模型要么将场景压缩为全局嵌入，要么使用部分级匹配目标导致表示与已见模式过度绑定，无法泛化到真正的新概念。作者识别出这种结构性冲突，因此需要一种严格解耦表示学习与组合推理的新范式。

Method: 采用双阶段策略：训练阶段，利用自监督ViT的补丁级语义几何特性，优化槽表示（slot representations）使其完全服务于全局类别身份，保持高度可泛化的对象级几何结构；推理阶段，冻结的槽被动态组合以匹配新场景。这种范式利用冻结骨干网络防止表示漂移，轻量级的整体优化保留了特征用于新概念迁移的能力。

Result: 在标准持续学习基准上，该方法在未见概念泛化和最小遗忘方面均达到了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: 本文证明了严格解耦表示学习与组合推理能够有效解决持续学习中的结构性冲突，为少样本学习和新概念泛化提供了一种新范式。

Abstract: Object-centric representations promise a key property for few-shot learning: Rather than treating a scene as a single unit, a model can decompose it into individual object-level parts that can be matched and compared across different concepts. In practice, this potential is rarely realized. Continual learners either collapse scenes into global embeddings, or train with part-level matching objectives that tie representations too closely to seen patterns, leaving them unable to generalize to truly novel concepts. In this paper, we identify this fundamental structural conflict and pioneer a new paradigm that strictly decouples representation learning from compositional inference. Leveraging the inherent patch-level semantic geometry of self-supervised Vision Transformers (ViTs), our framework employs a dual-phase strategy. During training, slot representations are optimized entirely toward holistic class identity, preserving highly generalizable, object-level geometries. At inference, preserved slots are dynamically composed to match novel scenes. We demonstrate that this paradigm offers dual structural benefits: The frozen backbone naturally prevents representation drift, while our lightweight, holistic optimization preserves the features' capacity for novel-concept transfer. Extensive experiments validate this approach, achieving state-of-the-art unseen-concept generalization and minimal forgetting across standard continual learning benchmarks.

</details>


### [438] [Debiased Model-based Representations for Sample-efficient Continuous Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11711)
*Jiafei Lyu,Zichuan Lin,Scott Fujimoto,Kai Yang,Yangkun Chen,Saiyong Yang,Zongqing Lu,Deheng Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DR.Q算法通过最大化当前状态-动作对与下一状态间的互信息，并结合衰减优先级经验回放，解决了模型表示方法中信息捕获不足和过拟合问题，在连续控制任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于模型的表示方法在离线策略学习中存在两个问题：(1) 未能捕获足够的变量相关信息；(2) 对回放缓冲区中的早期经验过拟合。这些问题导致表示和演员-评论家学习产生偏差，性能不佳。

Method: 提出DR.Q算法，核心包括两点：(1) 显式最大化当前状态-动作对表示与下一状态之间的互信息，同时最小化它们的偏差；(2) 采用衰减优先级经验回放（faded prioritized experience replay）来采样转换。

Result: 在多个连续控制基准任务上使用单组超参数进行评估，DR.Q能够匹配或超越近期强基线方法，部分情况下大幅领先。

Conclusion: DR.Q通过互信息最大化与衰减优先级回放有效缓解了模型表示方法的偏差问题，在连续控制任务上取得了强劲性能，代码已开源。

Abstract: Model-based representations recently stand out as a promising framework that embeds latent dynamics information into the representations for downstream off-policy actor-critic learning. It implicitly combines the advantages of both model-free and model-based approaches while avoiding the training costs associated with model-based methods. Nevertheless, existing model-based representation methods can fail to capture sufficient information about relevant variables and can overfit to early experiences in the replay buffer. These incur biases in representation and actor-critic learning, leading to inferior performance. To address this, we propose Debiased model-based Representations for Q-learning, tagged DR.Q algorithm. DR.Q explicitly maximizes the mutual information between the representations of the current state-action pair and the next state besides minimizing their deviations, and samples transitions with faded prioritized experience replay. We evaluate DR.Q on numerous continuous control benchmarks with a single set of hyperparameters, and the results demonstrate that DR.Q can match or surpass recent strong baselines, sometimes outperforming them by a large margin. Our code is available at https://github.com/dmksjfl/DR.Q.

</details>


### [439] [Block-R1: Rethinking the Role of Block Size in Multi-domain Reinforcement Learning for Diffusion Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11726)
*Yan Jiang,Ruihong Qiu,Zi Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从领域冲突的角度系统研究了扩散大语言模型(dLLM)在多领域RL后训练中的块大小(block size)问题，构建了Block-R1-41K数据集和Block-R1基准，并提出了一种基于样本级最佳训练块大小的跨域后训练方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究仅关注推理阶段块大小对单个领域的影响，忽略了多领域场景下块大小引发的领域冲突问题，而这种冲突会显著影响基于rollout的RL后训练效果。

Method: (1) 形式化定义了多领域RL中dLLM的领域块大小冲突问题；(2) 构建Block-R1-41K数据集，为每个样本标注最佳改进训练块大小，并设计块大小冲突分数(Block Size Conflict Score)；(3) 建立Block-R1基准，支持单领域和跨领域RL后训练；(4) 提出基于样本级最佳训练块大小的跨域后训练方法。

Result: 在13个数据集、7种最新RL算法和多种dLLM主干网络上进行了广泛实验验证，开源了基准和数据集。

Conclusion: 块大小是多领域dLLM RL后训练的关键因素，提出的样本级最佳块大小选择方法能有效缓解领域冲突，提升跨域后训练效果。

Abstract: Recently, reinforcement learning (RL) has been widely applied during post-training for diffusion large language models (dLLMs) to enhance reasoning with block-wise semi-autoregressive generation. Block size has therefore become a vital factor in dLLMs, since it determines the parallel decoding granularity and affects the rollout trajectories during RL optimisation, e.g., GRPO.
